// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_autograd.c ===
/*
 * nc_autograd.c — Tape-based automatic differentiation engine.
 *
 * Records operations during forward pass, then replays backwards
 * to compute gradients. Same approach as PyTorch's autograd.
 *
 * Flow:
 *   Forward:  a → op → b → op → c → loss
 *   Backward: ∂loss/∂c → ∂loss/∂b → ∂loss/∂a (chain rule)
 *
 * This is what makes NC a real AI training platform.
 */

#include "../include/nc.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Autograd Tensor — extends NcTensor with gradient tracking
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef enum {
    OP_AG_NONE,
    OP_AG_ADD,
    OP_AG_SUB,
    OP_AG_MUL,           /* element-wise */
    OP_AG_MATMUL,
    OP_AG_RELU,
    OP_AG_SIGMOID,
    OP_AG_TANH,
    OP_AG_SOFTMAX,
    OP_AG_SCALE,          /* scalar multiply */
    OP_AG_SUM,
    OP_AG_MEAN,
    OP_AG_MSE_LOSS,
    OP_AG_CE_LOSS,        /* binary cross-entropy (legacy) */
    OP_AG_RESHAPE,
    OP_AG_TRANSPOSE,
    OP_AG_SOFTMAX_CE,     /* multiclass softmax cross-entropy (correct for LM) */
    OP_AG_GELU,           /* GELU activation */
    OP_AG_LAYER_NORM,     /* layer normalization */
} AutogradOp;

typedef struct AGTensor {
    float          *data;
    float          *grad;
    int            *shape;
    int             ndim;
    int             size;
    bool            requires_grad;
    AutogradOp      op;
    struct AGTensor *parent_a;
    struct AGTensor *parent_b;
    float           scalar_cache;  /* for scale backward */
    int             refcount;
} AGTensor;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tape — dynamically-sized operation recorder for backward pass
 *
 *  Previously: static array of 4096 entries, silently dropped ops.
 *  Now: dynamic realloc, grows as needed, warns on extreme sizes.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    AGTensor   *output;
    AGTensor   *input_a;
    AGTensor   *input_b;
    AutogradOp  op;
} TapeEntry;

#define TAPE_INIT_CAP   4096
#define TAPE_WARN_CAP   262144   /* warn if tape exceeds 256k ops */

static TapeEntry *tape = NULL;
static int tape_len = 0;
static int tape_cap = 0;
static bool recording = true;

static void tape_record(AGTensor *out, AGTensor *a, AGTensor *b, AutogradOp op) {
    if (!recording) return;

    /* Initialize on first use */
    if (!tape) {
        tape_cap = TAPE_INIT_CAP;
        tape = calloc(tape_cap, sizeof(TapeEntry));
    }

    /* Grow if needed */
    if (tape_len >= tape_cap) {
        int new_cap = tape_cap * 2;
        if (new_cap > TAPE_WARN_CAP && tape_cap <= TAPE_WARN_CAP) {
            fprintf(stderr, "[NC Autograd] WARNING: tape grew to %d ops — "
                    "possible graph explosion. Check for loops.\n", new_cap);
        }
        TapeEntry *new_tape = realloc(tape, sizeof(TapeEntry) * new_cap);
        if (!new_tape) {
            fprintf(stderr, "[NC Autograd] FATAL: tape realloc failed at %d ops.\n", new_cap);
            return;
        }
        tape = new_tape;
        tape_cap = new_cap;
    }

    tape[tape_len++] = (TapeEntry){out, a, b, op};
}

void nc_autograd_reset_tape(void) { tape_len = 0; }
void nc_autograd_enable(void) { recording = true; }
void nc_autograd_disable(void) { recording = false; }

void nc_autograd_free_tape(void) {
    free(tape);
    tape = NULL;
    tape_len = 0;
    tape_cap = 0;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  AGTensor lifecycle
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

AGTensor *ag_tensor_new(int ndim, int *shape, bool requires_grad) {
    AGTensor *t = calloc(1, sizeof(AGTensor));
    t->ndim = ndim;
    t->shape = malloc(sizeof(int) * ndim);
    memcpy(t->shape, shape, sizeof(int) * ndim);
    t->size = 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < ndim; i++) t->size *= shape[i];
    t->data = calloc(t->size, sizeof(float));
    t->grad = requires_grad ? calloc(t->size, sizeof(float)) : NULL;
    t->requires_grad = requires_grad;
    t->op = OP_AG_NONE;
    t->parent_a = t->parent_b = NULL;
    t->refcount = 1;
    return t;
}

AGTensor *ag_tensor_from_data(float *data, int ndim, int *shape, bool requires_grad) {
    AGTensor *t = ag_tensor_new(ndim, shape, requires_grad);
    memcpy(t->data, data, sizeof(float) * t->size);
    return t;
}

void ag_tensor_free(AGTensor *t) {
    if (!t) return;
    t->refcount--;
    if (t->refcount <= 0) {
        free(t->data);
        free(t->grad);
        free(t->shape);
        free(t);
    }
}

void ag_tensor_zero_grad(AGTensor *t) {
    if (t->grad) memset(t->grad, 0, sizeof(float) * t->size);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Forward operations (record to tape)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

AGTensor *ag_add(AGTensor *a, AGTensor *b) {
    assert(a->size == b->size);
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad || b->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) out->data[i] = a->data[i] + b->data[i];
    out->op = OP_AG_ADD; out->parent_a = a; out->parent_b = b;
    tape_record(out, a, b, OP_AG_ADD);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_sub(AGTensor *a, AGTensor *b) {
    assert(a->size == b->size);
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad || b->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) out->data[i] = a->data[i] - b->data[i];
    out->op = OP_AG_SUB; out->parent_a = a; out->parent_b = b;
    tape_record(out, a, b, OP_AG_SUB);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_mul(AGTensor *a, AGTensor *b) {
    assert(a->size == b->size);
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad || b->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) out->data[i] = a->data[i] * b->data[i];
    out->op = OP_AG_MUL; out->parent_a = a; out->parent_b = b;
    tape_record(out, a, b, OP_AG_MUL);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_matmul(AGTensor *a, AGTensor *b) {
    assert(a->ndim == 2 && b->ndim == 2 && a->shape[1] == b->shape[0]);
    int M = a->shape[0], K = a->shape[1], N = b->shape[1];
    int shape[2] = {M, N};
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(2, shape, a->requires_grad || b->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
        for (int j = 0; j < N; j++) {
            float sum = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < K; k++) sum += a->data[i * K + k] * b->data[k * N + j];
            out->data[i * N + j] = sum;
        }
    out->op = OP_AG_MATMUL; out->parent_a = a; out->parent_b = b;
    tape_record(out, a, b, OP_AG_MATMUL);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_relu(AGTensor *a) {
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) out->data[i] = a->data[i] > 0 ? a->data[i] : 0;
    out->op = OP_AG_RELU; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_RELU);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_sigmoid(AGTensor *a) {
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) out->data[i] = 1.0f / (1.0f + expf(-a->data[i]));
    out->op = OP_AG_SIGMOID; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_SIGMOID);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_tanh_op(AGTensor *a) {
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) out->data[i] = tanhf(a->data[i]);
    out->op = OP_AG_TANH; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_TANH);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_scale(AGTensor *a, float s) {
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) out->data[i] = a->data[i] * s;
    out->op = OP_AG_SCALE; out->parent_a = a; out->scalar_cache = s;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_SCALE);
    return out;
}

float ag_sum(AGTensor *a) {
    float s = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) s += a->data[i];
    return s;
}

float ag_mean(AGTensor *a) { return ag_sum(a) / (float)a->size; }

/* ── Loss functions ────────────────────────────────────────── */

AGTensor *ag_mse_loss(AGTensor *pred, AGTensor *target) {
    assert(pred->size == target->size);
    int shape[1] = {1};
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(1, shape, true);
    float sum = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < pred->size; i++) {
        float diff = pred->data[i] - target->data[i];
        sum += diff * diff;
    }
    out->data[0] = sum / (float)pred->size;
    out->op = OP_AG_MSE_LOSS; out->parent_a = pred; out->parent_b = target;
    tape_record(out, pred, target, OP_AG_MSE_LOSS);
    return out;
}

AGTensor *ag_cross_entropy_loss(AGTensor *logits, AGTensor *targets) {
    int shape[1] = {1};
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(1, shape, true);
    float sum = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < logits->size; i++) {
        float p = 1.0f / (1.0f + expf(-logits->data[i]));
        if (p < 1e-7f) p = 1e-7f;
        if (p > 1.0f - 1e-7f) p = 1.0f - 1e-7f;
        sum += -(targets->data[i] * logf(p) + (1 - targets->data[i]) * logf(1 - p));
    }
    out->data[0] = sum / (float)logits->size;
    out->op = OP_AG_CE_LOSS; out->parent_a = logits; out->parent_b = targets;
    tape_record(out, logits, targets, OP_AG_CE_LOSS);
    return out;
}

/* ── Multiclass softmax cross-entropy (correct for language modeling) ── */
/*    logits: [seq_len, vocab_size]                                      */
/*    targets: [seq_len, 1] — integer class indices stored as float      */
AGTensor *ag_softmax_ce_loss(AGTensor *logits, AGTensor *targets) {
    assert(logits->ndim == 2);
    int S = logits->shape[0], V = logits->shape[1];
    int shape[1] = {1};
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(1, shape, true);
    float total = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < S; i++) {
        int tgt = (int)targets->data[i];
        if (tgt < 0 || tgt >= V) tgt = 0;
        /* numerically stable log-softmax */
        float mx = logits->data[i * V];
        for (int j = 1; j < V; j++)
            if (logits->data[i * V + j] > mx) mx = logits->data[i * V + j];
        float sum_exp = 0;
        for (int j = 0; j < V; j++)
            sum_exp += expf(logits->data[i * V + j] - mx);
        float log_sum = logf(sum_exp) + mx;
        total += log_sum - logits->data[i * V + tgt];
    }
    out->data[0] = total / (float)S;
    out->op = OP_AG_SOFTMAX_CE; out->parent_a = logits; out->parent_b = targets;
    tape_record(out, logits, targets, OP_AG_SOFTMAX_CE);
    return out;
}

/* ── Softmax forward (row-wise) ────────────────────────────── */
AGTensor *ag_softmax(AGTensor *a) {
    assert(a->ndim == 2);
    int R = a->shape[0], C = a->shape[1];
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < R; i++) {
        float mx = a->data[i * C];
        for (int j = 1; j < C; j++)
            if (a->data[i * C + j] > mx) mx = a->data[i * C + j];
        float sum = 0;
        for (int j = 0; j < C; j++) {
            out->data[i * C + j] = expf(a->data[i * C + j] - mx);
            sum += out->data[i * C + j];
        }
        for (int j = 0; j < C; j++) out->data[i * C + j] /= sum;
    }
    out->op = OP_AG_SOFTMAX; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_SOFTMAX);
    return out;
}

/* ── Sum → scalar tensor ───────────────────────────────────── */
AGTensor *ag_sum_tensor(AGTensor *a) {
    int shape[1] = {1};
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(1, shape, a->requires_grad);
    float s = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) s += a->data[i];
    out->data[0] = s;
    out->op = OP_AG_SUM; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_SUM);
    return out;
}

/* ── Mean → scalar tensor ──────────────────────────────────── */
AGTensor *ag_mean_tensor(AGTensor *a) {
    int shape[1] = {1};
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(1, shape, a->requires_grad);
    float s = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) s += a->data[i];
    out->data[0] = s / (float)a->size;
    out->op = OP_AG_MEAN; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_MEAN);
    return out;
}

/* ── Transpose (2D) ────────────────────────────────────────── */
AGTensor *ag_transpose(AGTensor *a) {
    assert(a->ndim == 2);
    int M = a->shape[0], N = a->shape[1];
    int shape[2] = {N, M};
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(2, shape, a->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
        for (int j = 0; j < N; j++)
            out->data[j * M + i] = a->data[i * N + j];
    out->op = OP_AG_TRANSPOSE; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_TRANSPOSE);
    return out;
}

/* ── Reshape ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
AGTensor *ag_reshape(AGTensor *a, int new_ndim, int *new_shape) {
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(new_ndim, new_shape, a->requires_grad);
    assert(out->size == a->size);
    memcpy(out->data, a->data, sizeof(float) * a->size);
    out->op = OP_AG_RESHAPE; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_RESHAPE);
    return out;
}

/* ── GELU activation ───────────────────────────────────────── */
AGTensor *ag_gelu(AGTensor *a) {
    AGTensor *out = ag_tensor_new(a->ndim, a->shape, a->requires_grad);
    for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) {
        float x = a->data[i];
        float x3 = x * x * x;
        float inner = 0.7978845608f * (x + 0.044715f * x3);
        out->data[i] = 0.5f * x * (1.0f + tanhf(inner));
    }
    out->op = OP_AG_GELU; out->parent_a = a;
    tape_record(out, a, NULL, OP_AG_GELU);
    return out;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Backward pass — the core of autograd
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void accumulate_grad(AGTensor *t, float *grad, int size) {
    if (!t || !t->requires_grad || !t->grad) return;
    for (int i = 0; i < size && i < t->size; i++)
        t->grad[i] += grad[i];
}

void ag_backward(AGTensor *loss) {
    if (!loss->grad) loss->grad = calloc(loss->size, sizeof(float));
    loss->grad[0] = 1.0f;  /* ∂loss/∂loss = 1 */

    /* Walk tape backwards (reverse-mode AD) */
    for (int t = tape_len - 1; t >= 0; t--) {
        TapeEntry *e = &tape[t];
        AGTensor *out = e->output;
        AGTensor *a = e->input_a;
        AGTensor *b = e->input_b;

        if (!out->grad) continue;

        switch (e->op) {
        case OP_AG_ADD:
            accumulate_grad(a, out->grad, out->size);
            accumulate_grad(b, out->grad, out->size);
            break;

        case OP_AG_SUB:
            accumulate_grad(a, out->grad, out->size);
            if (b && b->requires_grad) {
                float *neg = malloc(sizeof(float) * out->size);
                for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++) neg[i] = -out->grad[i];
                accumulate_grad(b, neg, out->size);
                free(neg);
            }
            break;

        case OP_AG_MUL:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++)
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[i] * b->data[i];
            }
            if (b && b->requires_grad && b->grad) {
                for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++)
                    b->grad[i] += out->grad[i] * a->data[i];
            }
            break;

        case OP_AG_MATMUL: {
            /* ∂L/∂A = ∂L/∂C · Bᵀ,  ∂L/∂B = Aᵀ · ∂L/∂C */
            int M = a->shape[0], K = a->shape[1], N = b->shape[1];
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
                    for (int k = 0; k < K; k++) {
                        float s = 0;
                        for (int j = 0; j < N; j++)
                            s += out->grad[i * N + j] * b->data[k * N + j];
                        a->grad[i * K + k] += s;
                    }
            }
            if (b && b->requires_grad && b->grad) {
                for (int k = 0; k < K; k++)
                    for (int j = 0; j < N; j++) {
                        float s = 0;
                        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
                            s += a->data[i * K + k] * out->grad[i * N + j];
                        b->grad[k * N + j] += s;
                    }
            }
            break;
        }

        case OP_AG_RELU:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad)
                for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++)
                    a->grad[i] += (a->data[i] > 0) ? out->grad[i] : 0;
            break;

        case OP_AG_SIGMOID:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad)
                for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++) {
                    float s = out->data[i];
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[i] * s * (1 - s);
                }
            break;

        case OP_AG_TANH:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad)
                for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++) {
                    float th = out->data[i];
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[i] * (1 - th * th);
                }
            break;

        case OP_AG_SCALE:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad)
                for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++)
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[i] * out->scalar_cache;
            break;

        case OP_AG_MSE_LOSS:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                float scale = 2.0f / (float)a->size;
                for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++)
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[0] * scale * (a->data[i] - b->data[i]);
            }
            break;

        case OP_AG_CE_LOSS:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                float scale = 1.0f / (float)a->size;
                for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) {
                    float p = 1.0f / (1.0f + expf(-a->data[i]));
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[0] * scale * (p - b->data[i]);
                }
            }
            break;

        /* ── Multiclass softmax CE backward ────────── */
        /*    d_logits[i,j] = (softmax(logits)[i,j] - one_hot(target[i])[j]) / S */
        case OP_AG_SOFTMAX_CE: {
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                int S = a->shape[0], V = a->shape[1];
                float inv_s = out->grad[0] / (float)S;
                for (int i = 0; i < S; i++) {
                    int tgt = (int)b->data[i];
                    if (tgt < 0 || tgt >= V) tgt = 0;
                    float mx = a->data[i * V];
                    for (int j = 1; j < V; j++)
                        if (a->data[i * V + j] > mx) mx = a->data[i * V + j];
                    float sum_exp = 0;
                    for (int j = 0; j < V; j++)
                        sum_exp += expf(a->data[i * V + j] - mx);
                    for (int j = 0; j < V; j++) {
                        float sm = expf(a->data[i * V + j] - mx) / sum_exp;
                        a->grad[i * V + j] += inv_s * (sm - (j == tgt ? 1.0f : 0.0f));
                    }
                }
            }
            break;
        }

        /* ── Softmax backward ──────────────────────── */
        /*    d_a[i,j] = sum_k (out[i,k] * (delta_jk - out[i,j]) * d_out[i,k]) */
        case OP_AG_SOFTMAX: {
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                int R = out->shape[0], C = out->shape[1];
                for (int i = 0; i < R; i++) {
                    float dot = 0;
                    for (int j = 0; j < C; j++)
                        dot += out->data[i * C + j] * out->grad[i * C + j];
                    for (int j = 0; j < C; j++)
                        a->grad[i * C + j] += out->data[i * C + j] * (out->grad[i * C + j] - dot);
                }
            }
            break;
        }

        /* ── Sum backward ──────────────────────────── */
        /*    d_a[i] = d_out[0] for all i */
        case OP_AG_SUM:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++)
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[0];
            }
            break;

        /* ── Mean backward ─────────────────────────── */
        /*    d_a[i] = d_out[0] / N */
        case OP_AG_MEAN:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                float inv_n = 1.0f / (float)a->size;
                for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++)
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[0] * inv_n;
            }
            break;

        /* ── Transpose backward ────────────────────── */
        /*    d_a = transpose(d_out) */
        case OP_AG_TRANSPOSE: {
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                int M = a->shape[0], N = a->shape[1];
                for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
                    for (int j = 0; j < N; j++)
                        a->grad[i * N + j] += out->grad[j * M + i];
            }
            break;
        }

        /* ── Reshape backward ──────────────────────── */
        /*    d_a = reshape(d_out, original_shape) — just copy grads */
        case OP_AG_RESHAPE:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++)
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[i];
            }
            break;

        /* ── GELU backward ─────────────────────────── */
        /*    gelu'(x) = 0.5*(1+tanh(k)) + 0.5*x*(1-tanh(k)^2)*k' */
        /*    where k = 0.7978845608*(x + 0.044715*x^3) */
        case OP_AG_GELU:
            if (a->requires_grad && a->grad) {
                for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++) {
                    float x = a->data[i];
                    float x3 = x * x * x;
                    float inner = 0.7978845608f * (x + 0.044715f * x3);
                    float th = tanhf(inner);
                    float dth = 1.0f - th * th;
                    float dinner = 0.7978845608f * (1.0f + 0.134145f * x * x);
                    float grad = 0.5f * (1.0f + th) + 0.5f * x * dth * dinner;
                    a->grad[i] += out->grad[i] * grad;
                }
            }
            break;

        default:
            fprintf(stderr, "[NC Autograd] WARNING: no backward for op %d\n", e->op);
            break;
        }
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Optimizers
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    float lr;
    float beta1, beta2, epsilon;
    float *m;   /* first moment */
    float *v;   /* second moment */
    int    step;
    int    size;
} AdamState;

/* SGD: param = param - lr * grad */
void ag_sgd_step(AGTensor **params, int n, float lr) {
    for (int p = 0; p < n; p++) {
        if (!params[p]->requires_grad || !params[p]->grad) continue;
        for (int i = 0; i < params[p]->size; i++)
            params[p]->data[i] -= lr * params[p]->grad[i];
    }
}

/* Adam optimizer */
AdamState *ag_adam_new(int total_params, float lr, float beta1, float beta2, float eps) {
    AdamState *s = calloc(1, sizeof(AdamState));
    s->lr = lr;
    s->beta1 = beta1;
    s->beta2 = beta2;
    s->epsilon = eps;
    s->m = calloc(total_params, sizeof(float));
    s->v = calloc(total_params, sizeof(float));
    s->step = 0;
    s->size = total_params;
    return s;
}

void ag_adam_step(AdamState *state, AGTensor **params, int n) {
    state->step++;
    int offset = 0;
    for (int p = 0; p < n; p++) {
        if (!params[p]->requires_grad || !params[p]->grad) continue;
        for (int i = 0; i < params[p]->size; i++) {
            int idx = offset + i;
            if (idx >= state->size) break;
            float g = params[p]->grad[i];
            state->m[idx] = state->beta1 * state->m[idx] + (1 - state->beta1) * g;
            state->v[idx] = state->beta2 * state->v[idx] + (1 - state->beta2) * g * g;
            float m_hat = state->m[idx] / (1 - powf(state->beta1, state->step));
            float v_hat = state->v[idx] / (1 - powf(state->beta2, state->step));
            params[p]->data[i] -= state->lr * m_hat / (sqrtf(v_hat) + state->epsilon);
        }
        offset += params[p]->size;
    }
}

void ag_adam_free(AdamState *s) {
    free(s->m); free(s->v); free(s);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Neural Network Layers
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    AGTensor *weights;
    AGTensor *bias;
    int       in_features;
    int       out_features;
} AGLinear;

AGLinear *ag_linear_new(int in_f, int out_f) {
    AGLinear *l = malloc(sizeof(AGLinear));
    l->in_features = in_f;
    l->out_features = out_f;
    int w_shape[2] = {in_f, out_f};
    l->weights = ag_tensor_new(2, w_shape, true);
    float scale = sqrtf(2.0f / (in_f + out_f));
    for (int i = 0; i < in_f * out_f; i++)
        l->weights->data[i] = ((float)rand() / RAND_MAX * 2 - 1) * scale;
    int b_shape[1] = {out_f};
    l->bias = ag_tensor_new(1, b_shape, true);
    return l;
}

AGTensor *ag_linear_forward(AGLinear *l, AGTensor *input) {
    AGTensor *out = ag_matmul(input, l->weights);
    for (int i = 0; i < out->size; i++)
        out->data[i] += l->bias->data[i % l->out_features];
    return out;
}

void ag_linear_free(AGLinear *l) {
    ag_tensor_free(l->weights);
    ag_tensor_free(l->bias);
    free(l);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Training loop helper
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ag_train_step(AGLinear **layers, int n_layers,
                   AGTensor *input, AGTensor *target,
                   float lr, float *out_loss) {
    /* Forward */
    nc_autograd_reset_tape();
    AGTensor *x = input;
    for (int i = 0; i < n_layers; i++) {
        x = ag_linear_forward(layers[i], x);
        if (i < n_layers - 1) x = ag_relu(x);
    }

    /* Loss */
    AGTensor *loss = ag_mse_loss(x, target);
    *out_loss = loss->data[0];

    /* Backward */
    ag_backward(loss);

    /* Collect params */
    int n_params = n_layers * 2;
    AGTensor **params = malloc(sizeof(AGTensor *) * n_params);
    for (int i = 0; i < n_layers; i++) {
        params[i * 2] = layers[i]->weights;
        params[i * 2 + 1] = layers[i]->bias;
    }

    /* Update */
    ag_sgd_step(params, n_params, lr);

    /* Zero grads */
    for (int i = 0; i < n_params; i++)
        ag_tensor_zero_grad(params[i]);

    free(params);
}

void ag_print_tensor(AGTensor *t, const char *name) {
    printf("  %s: shape=[", name);
    for (int i = 0; i < t->ndim; i++) {
        if (i > 0) printf(",");
        printf("%d", t->shape[i]);
    }
    printf("] data=[");
    int show = t->size > 6 ? 3 : t->size;
    for (int i = 0; i < show; i++) { if (i > 0) printf(", "); printf("%.4f", t->data[i]); }
    if (t->size > 6) printf(", ... ");
    printf("]\n");
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Bridge: AGTensor ↔ NcTensorHandle
 *
 *  This bridges the autograd system with the new first-class
 *  tensor value type. Eventually AGTensor should be replaced
 *  entirely by NcTensorHandle, but for now we bridge them.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Wrap an NcTensorHandle as an AGTensor (shares data, no copy) */
AGTensor *ag_from_handle(NcTensorHandle *h) {
    if (!h) return NULL;
    AGTensor *t = calloc(1, sizeof(AGTensor));
    t->ndim = h->ndim;
    t->shape = malloc(sizeof(int) * h->ndim);
    memcpy(t->shape, h->shape, sizeof(int) * h->ndim);
    t->size = h->size;
    t->data = h->data;   /* shared — do NOT free via ag_tensor_free */
    t->grad = h->grad;   /* shared */
    t->requires_grad = h->requires_grad;
    t->op = OP_AG_NONE;
    t->parent_a = t->parent_b = NULL;
    t->refcount = 99;     /* sentinel: shared ownership */
    return t;
}

/* Copy AGTensor grads back to NcTensorHandle */
void ag_sync_grads_to_handle(AGTensor *ag, NcTensorHandle *h) {
    if (!ag || !h || !ag->grad || !h->grad) return;
    memcpy(h->grad, ag->grad, sizeof(float) * h->size);
}

/* Create NcTensorHandle from AGTensor (copies data + grad) */
NcTensorHandle *ag_to_handle(AGTensor *ag) {
    if (!ag) return NULL;
    NcTensorHandle *h = nc_tensor_handle_new(ag->ndim, ag->shape, ag->requires_grad);
    memcpy(h->data, ag->data, sizeof(float) * ag->size);
    if (ag->grad && h->grad)
        memcpy(h->grad, ag->grad, sizeof(float) * ag->size);
    return h;
}

// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_model.c ===
/*
 * nc_model.c — Transformer neural network for NC code generation.
 *
 * A complete decoder-only transformer implemented from scratch in C.
 * Includes tensor operations, multi-head attention, feed-forward layers,
 * layer normalization, weight initialization, and autoregressive generation.
 *
 * Uses Apple Accelerate (BLAS/vDSP) on macOS for hardware-optimized
 * matrix multiply and vector ops — 50-100x faster than naive loops.
 *
 * This is NC's own AI brain — trained on NC code, generates NC code.
 */

#include "nc_model.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  SIMD / Hardware Acceleration
 *
 *  macOS:  Apple Accelerate (cblas_sgemm + vDSP)
 *  Linux:  OpenBLAS if available, else scalar fallback
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
#ifdef __APPLE__
  #include <Accelerate/Accelerate.h>
  #define NC_HAS_BLAS 1
#elif defined(__linux__)
  /* Try OpenBLAS — link with -lopenblas if available */
  #if __has_include(<cblas.h>)
    #include <cblas.h>
    #define NC_HAS_BLAS 1
  #endif
#endif

#ifndef NC_HAS_BLAS
  #define NC_HAS_BLAS 0
#endif

/* Metal GPU acceleration (macOS Apple Silicon) */
#include "nc_metal.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Random number utilities
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static int nc_rand_initialized = 0;

static void nc_rand_init(void) {
    if (!nc_rand_initialized) {
        srand((unsigned int)time(NULL));
        nc_rand_initialized = 1;
    }
}

/* Uniform random in [lo, hi) */
static float nc_rand_uniform(float lo, float hi) {
    float r = (float)rand() / ((float)RAND_MAX + 1.0f);
    return lo + r * (hi - lo);
}

/* Xavier/Glorot uniform: range = sqrt(6 / (fan_in + fan_out)) */
static float nc_xavier_range(int fan_in, int fan_out) {
    return sqrtf(6.0f / (float)(fan_in + fan_out));
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tensor — creation, free, copy
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

NCTensor ncm_tensor_create(int *shape, int ndim) {
    NCTensor t;
    t.ndim = ndim;
    t.shape = (int *)malloc(ndim * sizeof(int));
    t.size = 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < ndim; i++) {
        t.shape[i] = shape[i];
        t.size *= shape[i];
    }
    t.data = (float *)calloc(t.size, sizeof(float));
    return t;
}

void ncm_tensor_free(NCTensor *t) {
    if (t->data) { free(t->data); t->data = NULL; }
    if (t->shape) { free(t->shape); t->shape = NULL; }
    t->ndim = 0;
    t->size = 0;
}

void ncm_tensor_copy(const NCTensor *src, NCTensor *dst) {
    if (dst->data && dst->size != src->size) {
        free(dst->data);
        dst->data = (float *)malloc(src->size * sizeof(float));
    } else if (!dst->data) {
        dst->data = (float *)malloc(src->size * sizeof(float));
    }
    if (dst->shape) free(dst->shape);
    dst->shape = (int *)malloc(src->ndim * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(dst->shape, src->shape, src->ndim * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(dst->data, src->data, src->size * sizeof(float));
    dst->ndim = src->ndim;
    dst->size = src->size;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tensor — matrix multiply
 *
 *  a: [M, K]  b: [K, N]  out: [M, N]
 *  Also handles batched: a: [B, M, K]  b: [B, K, N]  out: [B, M, N]
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Hardware-accelerated sgemm: GPU (Metal) → CPU BLAS → tiled scalar */
static void ncm_sgemm(int M, int K, int N,
                       const float *A, const float *B, float *C) {
    /* Try Metal GPU first (big matrices only) */
    if (nc_metal_sgemm(M, K, N, A, B, C)) return;

#if NC_HAS_BLAS
    /* cblas_sgemm: C = 1.0 * A @ B + 0.0 * C
       Row-major: lda=K, ldb=N, ldc=N */
    cblas_sgemm(CblasRowMajor, CblasNoTrans, CblasNoTrans,
                M, N, K, 1.0f, A, K, B, N, 0.0f, C, N);
#else
    /* Scalar fallback with cache-friendly tiling */
    memset(C, 0, M * N * sizeof(float));
    /* Tile size for L1 cache (~32KB) */
    enum { TILE = 32 };
    for (int m0 = 0; m0 < M; m0 += TILE) {
        int m1 = m0 + TILE < M ? m0 + TILE : M;
        for (int k0 = 0; k0 < K; k0 += TILE) {
            int k1 = k0 + TILE < K ? k0 + TILE : K;
            for (int n0 = 0; n0 < N; n0 += TILE) {
                int n1 = n0 + TILE < N ? n0 + TILE : N;
                for (int m = m0; m < m1; m++) {
                    for (int k = k0; k < k1; k++) {
                        float a_mk = A[m * K + k];
                        for (int n = n0; n < n1; n++) {
                            C[m * N + n] += a_mk * B[k * N + n];
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
#endif
}

void ncm_tensor_matmul(const NCTensor *a, const NCTensor *b, NCTensor *out) {
    if (a->ndim == 2 && b->ndim == 2) {
        /* Standard 2D matmul: [M,K] x [K,N] -> [M,N] */
        int M = a->shape[0];
        int K = a->shape[1];
        int N = b->shape[1];
        ncm_sgemm(M, K, N, a->data, b->data, out->data);
    } else if (a->ndim == 3 && b->ndim == 3) {
        /* Batched matmul: [B,M,K] x [B,K,N] -> [B,M,N] */
        int B = a->shape[0];
        int M = a->shape[1];
        int K = a->shape[2];
        int N = b->shape[2];
        for (int bx = 0; bx < B; bx++) {
            ncm_sgemm(M, K, N,
                       a->data + bx * M * K,
                       b->data + bx * K * N,
                       out->data + bx * M * N);
        }
    } else if (a->ndim == 3 && b->ndim == 2) {
        /* [B,M,K] x [K,N] -> [B,M,N] — broadcast b across batch */
        int B = a->shape[0];
        int M = a->shape[1];
        int K = a->shape[2];
        int N = b->shape[1];
        for (int bx = 0; bx < B; bx++) {
            ncm_sgemm(M, K, N,
                       a->data + bx * M * K,
                       b->data,
                       out->data + bx * M * N);
        }
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tensor — element-wise add (with broadcasting)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_tensor_add(const NCTensor *a, const NCTensor *b, NCTensor *out) {
    if (a->size == b->size) {
#if NC_HAS_BLAS
        vDSP_vadd(a->data, 1, b->data, 1, out->data, 1, a->size);
#else
        for (int i = 0; i < a->size; i++)
            out->data[i] = a->data[i] + b->data[i];
#endif
    } else if (b->ndim == 1) {
        /* Broadcast 1D bias across higher dims: a=[..., D], b=[D] */
        int D = b->shape[0];
        int outer = a->size / D;
        for (int i = 0; i < outer; i++) {
#if NC_HAS_BLAS
            vDSP_vadd(a->data + i * D, 1, b->data, 1, out->data + i * D, 1, D);
#else
            for (int j = 0; j < D; j++)
                out->data[i * D + j] = a->data[i * D + j] + b->data[j];
#endif
        }
    } else {
        int n = a->size < b->size ? a->size : b->size;
#if NC_HAS_BLAS
        vDSP_vadd(a->data, 1, b->data, 1, out->data, 1, n);
#else
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            out->data[i] = a->data[i] + b->data[i];
#endif
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tensor — scalar multiplication
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_tensor_scale(const NCTensor *t, float scalar, NCTensor *out) {
#if NC_HAS_BLAS
    vDSP_vsmul(t->data, 1, &scalar, out->data, 1, t->size);
#else
    for (int i = 0; i < t->size; i++)
        out->data[i] = t->data[i] * scalar;
#endif
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tensor — softmax over last dimension
 *
 *  For a tensor of shape [..., N], applies softmax over
 *  each contiguous slice of length N.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_tensor_softmax(const NCTensor *t, NCTensor *out) {
    int last_dim = t->shape[t->ndim - 1];
    int outer = t->size / last_dim;

    for (int i = 0; i < outer; i++) {
        const float *src = t->data + i * last_dim;
        float *dst = out->data + i * last_dim;

        /* Find max for numerical stability */
        float max_val = src[0];
        for (int j = 1; j < last_dim; j++) {
            if (src[j] > max_val) max_val = src[j];
        }

        /* exp and sum */
        float sum = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < last_dim; j++) {
            dst[j] = expf(src[j] - max_val);
            sum += dst[j];
        }

        /* normalize */
        float inv_sum = 1.0f / (sum + 1e-9f);
        for (int j = 0; j < last_dim; j++) {
            dst[j] *= inv_sum;
        }
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tensor — GELU activation
 *
 *  GELU(x) = 0.5 * x * (1 + tanh(sqrt(2/pi) * (x + 0.044715 * x^3)))
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_tensor_gelu(const NCTensor *t, NCTensor *out) {
    const float SQRT_2_PI = 0.7978845608f; /* sqrt(2/pi) */
    for (int i = 0; i < t->size; i++) {
        float x = t->data[i];
        float inner = SQRT_2_PI * (x + 0.044715f * x * x * x);
        out->data[i] = 0.5f * x * (1.0f + tanhf(inner));
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Tensor — layer normalization
 *
 *  For each vector of length `dim` in the last dimension:
 *    out = gamma * (x - mean) / sqrt(var + eps) + beta
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_tensor_layer_norm(const NCTensor *t, const NCTensor *gamma,
                          const NCTensor *beta, float eps, NCTensor *out) {
    int dim = t->shape[t->ndim - 1];
    int outer = t->size / dim;

    for (int i = 0; i < outer; i++) {
        const float *src = t->data + i * dim;
        float *dst = out->data + i * dim;

        /* Compute mean */
        float mean = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            mean += src[j];
        }
        mean /= (float)dim;

        /* Compute variance */
        float var = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            float d = src[j] - mean;
            var += d * d;
        }
        var /= (float)dim;

        /* Normalize, scale, shift */
        float inv_std = 1.0f / sqrtf(var + eps);
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            float norm = (src[j] - mean) * inv_std;
            dst[j] = gamma->data[j] * norm + beta->data[j];
        }
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Linear layer forward: out = x @ W + bias
 *
 *  x: [seq_len, in_dim]  (or [batch, seq_len, in_dim])
 *  W: [in_dim, out_dim]
 *  bias: [out_dim]
 *  out: [seq_len, out_dim]
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_linear_forward(const NCLinear *layer, const NCTensor *x, NCTensor *out) {
    ncm_tensor_matmul(x, &layer->weights, out);
    ncm_tensor_add(out, &layer->bias, out);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Multi-head self-attention
 *
 *  x: [seq_len, dim]
 *  1. Project to Q, K, V  (each [seq_len, dim])
 *  2. Reshape to [n_heads, seq_len, head_dim]
 *  3. Scores = Q @ K^T / sqrt(head_dim)
 *  4. Apply causal mask (lower triangular)
 *  5. Weights = softmax(scores)
 *  6. Context = weights @ V
 *  7. Concat heads, project through W_o
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_attention_forward(const NCAttention *attn, const NCTensor *x,
                          int seq_len, NCTensor *out) {
    int dim = attn->dim;
    int n_heads = attn->n_heads;
    int head_dim = attn->head_dim;

    /* Allocate Q, K, V projections: [seq_len, dim] */
    int shape2d[2] = {seq_len, dim};
    NCTensor Q = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);
    NCTensor K = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);
    NCTensor V = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);

    /* Project: Q = x @ W_q + b_q, etc. */
    ncm_linear_forward(&attn->q_proj, x, &Q);
    ncm_linear_forward(&attn->k_proj, x, &K);
    ncm_linear_forward(&attn->v_proj, x, &V);

    /* Allocate output accumulator: [seq_len, dim] */
    int out_shape[2] = {seq_len, dim};
    NCTensor attn_out = ncm_tensor_create(out_shape, 2);

    /* Process each head independently */
    /* Q/K/V are [seq_len, dim] laid out as [seq_len, n_heads * head_dim] */
    /* For each head h, slice columns [h*head_dim .. (h+1)*head_dim] */

    /* Allocate per-head temporaries */
    int scores_shape[2] = {seq_len, seq_len};
    NCTensor scores = ncm_tensor_create(scores_shape, 2);
    NCTensor attn_weights = ncm_tensor_create(scores_shape, 2);

    int head_shape[2] = {seq_len, head_dim};
    NCTensor context = ncm_tensor_create(head_shape, 2);

    float scale = 1.0f / sqrtf((float)head_dim);

    for (int h = 0; h < n_heads; h++) {
        int offset = h * head_dim;

        /* Compute scores: Q_h @ K_h^T  (manual because we need column slicing) */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < seq_len; j++) {
                float sum = 0.0f;
                for (int k = 0; k < head_dim; k++) {
                    float q_val = Q.data[i * dim + offset + k];
                    float k_val = K.data[j * dim + offset + k];
                    sum += q_val * k_val;
                }
                scores.data[i * seq_len + j] = sum * scale;
            }
        }

        /* Apply causal mask: positions j > i get -inf */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
            for (int j = i + 1; j < seq_len; j++) {
                scores.data[i * seq_len + j] = -1e9f;
            }
        }

        /* Softmax over last dim (key dimension) */
        ncm_tensor_softmax(&scores, &attn_weights);

        /* Context = attn_weights @ V_h */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
            for (int k = 0; k < head_dim; k++) {
                float sum = 0.0f;
                for (int j = 0; j < seq_len; j++) {
                    sum += attn_weights.data[i * seq_len + j]
                         * V.data[j * dim + offset + k];
                }
                context.data[i * head_dim + k] = sum;
            }
        }

        /* Copy head output into concatenated result */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
            for (int k = 0; k < head_dim; k++) {
                attn_out.data[i * dim + offset + k] = context.data[i * head_dim + k];
            }
        }
    }

    /* Output projection: out = attn_out @ W_o + b_o */
    ncm_linear_forward(&attn->o_proj, &attn_out, out);

    /* Cleanup */
    ncm_tensor_free(&Q);
    ncm_tensor_free(&K);
    ncm_tensor_free(&V);
    ncm_tensor_free(&scores);
    ncm_tensor_free(&attn_weights);
    ncm_tensor_free(&context);
    ncm_tensor_free(&attn_out);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Feed-forward network: up_proj → GELU → down_proj
 *
 *  x: [seq_len, dim]
 *  hidden = GELU(x @ W_up + b_up)   -> [seq_len, hidden_dim]
 *  out = hidden @ W_down + b_down    -> [seq_len, dim]
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_ffn_forward(const NCFFN *ffn, const NCTensor *x, NCTensor *out) {
    int seq_len = x->shape[0];

    /* Up projection */
    int hidden_shape[2] = {seq_len, ffn->hidden_dim};
    NCTensor hidden = ncm_tensor_create(hidden_shape, 2);
    ncm_linear_forward(&ffn->up_proj, x, &hidden);

    /* GELU activation (in-place) */
    ncm_tensor_gelu(&hidden, &hidden);

    /* Down projection */
    ncm_linear_forward(&ffn->down_proj, &hidden, out);

    ncm_tensor_free(&hidden);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Transformer block
 *
 *  x -> LN1 -> Attention -> + residual
 *    -> LN2 -> FFN       -> + residual
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void ncm_block_forward(const NCTransformerBlock *block, const NCTensor *x,
                      int seq_len, NCTensor *out) {
    int dim = block->ln1.dim;

    int shape2d[2] = {seq_len, dim};
    NCTensor normed = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);
    NCTensor attn_out = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);
    NCTensor residual1 = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);
    NCTensor normed2 = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);
    NCTensor ffn_out = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);

    /* Pre-norm attention */
    ncm_tensor_layer_norm(x, &block->ln1.gamma, &block->ln1.beta,
                         block->ln1.eps, &normed);
    ncm_attention_forward(&block->attn, &normed, seq_len, &attn_out);

    /* Residual connection */
    ncm_tensor_add(x, &attn_out, &residual1);

    /* Pre-norm FFN */
    ncm_tensor_layer_norm(&residual1, &block->ln2.gamma, &block->ln2.beta,
                         block->ln2.eps, &normed2);
    ncm_ffn_forward(&block->ffn, &normed2, &ffn_out);

    /* Residual connection */
    ncm_tensor_add(&residual1, &ffn_out, out);

    ncm_tensor_free(&normed);
    ncm_tensor_free(&attn_out);
    ncm_tensor_free(&residual1);
    ncm_tensor_free(&normed2);
    ncm_tensor_free(&ffn_out);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Weight initialization
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void init_linear(NCLinear *layer, int in_dim, int out_dim) {
    nc_rand_init();

    layer->in_dim = in_dim;
    layer->out_dim = out_dim;

    int w_shape[2] = {in_dim, out_dim};
    layer->weights = ncm_tensor_create(w_shape, 2);

    int b_shape[1] = {out_dim};
    layer->bias = ncm_tensor_create(b_shape, 1);

    /* Xavier/Glorot uniform initialization */
    float range = nc_xavier_range(in_dim, out_dim);
    for (int i = 0; i < in_dim * out_dim; i++) {
        layer->weights.data[i] = nc_rand_uniform(-range, range);
    }

    /* Zero-initialize biases */
    memset(layer->bias.data, 0, out_dim * sizeof(float));
}

static void init_layer_norm(NCLayerNorm *ln, int dim) {
    ln->dim = dim;
    ln->eps = 1e-5f;

    int shape[1] = {dim};
    ln->gamma = ncm_tensor_create(shape, 1);
    ln->beta = ncm_tensor_create(shape, 1);

    /* gamma = 1, beta = 0 */
    for (int i = 0; i < dim; i++) {
        ln->gamma.data[i] = 1.0f;
        ln->beta.data[i] = 0.0f;
    }
}

static void init_attention(NCAttention *attn, int dim, int n_heads) {
    attn->dim = dim;
    attn->n_heads = n_heads;
    attn->head_dim = dim / n_heads;

    init_linear(&attn->q_proj, dim, dim);
    init_linear(&attn->k_proj, dim, dim);
    init_linear(&attn->v_proj, dim, dim);
    init_linear(&attn->o_proj, dim, dim);
}

static void init_ffn(NCFFN *ffn, int dim, int hidden_dim) {
    ffn->dim = dim;
    ffn->hidden_dim = hidden_dim;
    init_linear(&ffn->up_proj, dim, hidden_dim);
    init_linear(&ffn->down_proj, hidden_dim, dim);
}

static void init_block(NCTransformerBlock *block, int dim, int n_heads,
                       int hidden_dim) {
    init_attention(&block->attn, dim, n_heads);
    init_ffn(&block->ffn, dim, hidden_dim);
    init_layer_norm(&block->ln1, dim);
    init_layer_norm(&block->ln2, dim);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Model creation
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

NCModel *nc_model_create(NCModelConfig config) {
    nc_rand_init();

    NCModel *model = (NCModel *)calloc(1, sizeof(NCModel));
    if (!model) return NULL;

    model->n_layers   = config.n_layers;
    model->dim        = config.dim;
    model->vocab_size = config.vocab_size;
    model->max_seq    = config.max_seq;

    /* Token embeddings: [vocab_size, dim] */
    int emb_shape[2] = {config.vocab_size, config.dim};
    model->token_emb = ncm_tensor_create(emb_shape, 2);

    /* Small random initialization for embeddings */
    float emb_scale = 0.02f;
    for (int i = 0; i < config.vocab_size * config.dim; i++) {
        model->token_emb.data[i] = nc_rand_uniform(-emb_scale, emb_scale);
    }

    /* Positional embeddings: [max_seq, dim] */
    int pos_shape[2] = {config.max_seq, config.dim};
    model->pos_emb = ncm_tensor_create(pos_shape, 2);

    for (int i = 0; i < config.max_seq * config.dim; i++) {
        model->pos_emb.data[i] = nc_rand_uniform(-emb_scale, emb_scale);
    }

    /* Transformer layers */
    model->layers = (NCTransformerBlock *)calloc(config.n_layers,
                                                  sizeof(NCTransformerBlock));
    for (int i = 0; i < config.n_layers; i++) {
        init_block(&model->layers[i], config.dim, config.n_heads,
                   config.hidden_dim);
    }

    /* Final layer norm */
    init_layer_norm(&model->final_ln, config.dim);

    /* LM head: [dim, vocab_size] */
    init_linear(&model->lm_head, config.dim, config.vocab_size);

    return model;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Forward pass
 *
 *  tokens: [seq_len] integer token IDs
 *  logits: [seq_len * vocab_size] output logits
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void nc_model_forward(const NCModel *model, const int *tokens,
                      int seq_len, float *logits) {
    int dim = model->dim;

    /* Clamp seq_len to max */
    if (seq_len > model->max_seq) seq_len = model->max_seq;

    /* Embed tokens: look up token_emb + pos_emb */
    int shape2d[2] = {seq_len, dim};
    NCTensor x = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);

    for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
        int tok = tokens[i];
        if (tok < 0) tok = 0;
        if (tok >= model->vocab_size) tok = model->vocab_size - 1;

        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            x.data[i * dim + j] = model->token_emb.data[tok * dim + j]
                                + model->pos_emb.data[i * dim + j];
        }
    }

    /* Pass through transformer blocks */
    NCTensor block_out = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);

    for (int layer = 0; layer < model->n_layers; layer++) {
        ncm_block_forward(&model->layers[layer], &x, seq_len, &block_out);

        /* Swap x and block_out for next layer */
        float *tmp_data = x.data;
        x.data = block_out.data;
        block_out.data = tmp_data;
    }

    /* Final layer norm */
    NCTensor normed = ncm_tensor_create(shape2d, 2);
    ncm_tensor_layer_norm(&x, &model->final_ln.gamma, &model->final_ln.beta,
                         model->final_ln.eps, &normed);

    /* LM head: project to vocab logits [seq_len, vocab_size] */
    int logits_shape[2] = {seq_len, model->vocab_size};
    NCTensor logits_tensor = ncm_tensor_create(logits_shape, 2);

    ncm_linear_forward(&model->lm_head, &normed, &logits_tensor);

    /* Copy to output */
    memcpy(logits, logits_tensor.data, seq_len * model->vocab_size * sizeof(float));

    ncm_tensor_free(&x);
    ncm_tensor_free(&block_out);
    ncm_tensor_free(&normed);
    ncm_tensor_free(&logits_tensor);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Free linear layer
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void free_linear(NCLinear *layer) {
    ncm_tensor_free(&layer->weights);
    ncm_tensor_free(&layer->bias);
}

static void free_layer_norm(NCLayerNorm *ln) {
    ncm_tensor_free(&ln->gamma);
    ncm_tensor_free(&ln->beta);
}

static void free_attention(NCAttention *attn) {
    free_linear(&attn->q_proj);
    free_linear(&attn->k_proj);
    free_linear(&attn->v_proj);
    free_linear(&attn->o_proj);
}

static void free_ffn(NCFFN *ffn) {
    free_linear(&ffn->up_proj);
    free_linear(&ffn->down_proj);
}

static void free_block(NCTransformerBlock *block) {
    free_attention(&block->attn);
    free_ffn(&block->ffn);
    free_layer_norm(&block->ln1);
    free_layer_norm(&block->ln2);
}

void nc_model_free(NCModel *model) {
    if (!model) return;

    ncm_tensor_free(&model->token_emb);
    ncm_tensor_free(&model->pos_emb);

    for (int i = 0; i < model->n_layers; i++) {
        free_block(&model->layers[i]);
    }
    free(model->layers);

    free_layer_norm(&model->final_ln);
    free_linear(&model->lm_head);

    free(model);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Save / Load — binary format
 *
 *  Format:
 *    [4 bytes] magic: "NCM1"
 *    [4 ints]  n_layers, dim, vocab_size, max_seq
 *    [floats]  token_emb data
 *    [floats]  pos_emb data
 *    For each layer:
 *      [floats] q_proj weights, bias
 *      [floats] k_proj weights, bias
 *      [floats] v_proj weights, bias
 *      [floats] o_proj weights, bias
 *      [floats] up_proj weights, bias
 *      [floats] down_proj weights, bias
 *      [floats] ln1 gamma, beta
 *      [floats] ln2 gamma, beta
 *    [floats] final_ln gamma, beta
 *    [floats] lm_head weights, bias
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static int write_tensor(FILE *f, const NCTensor *t) {
    size_t written = fwrite(t->data, sizeof(float), t->size, f);
    return (int)written == t->size ? 0 : -1;
}

static int read_tensor(FILE *f, NCTensor *t) {
    size_t rd = fread(t->data, sizeof(float), t->size, f);
    return (int)rd == t->size ? 0 : -1;
}

static int write_linear(FILE *f, const NCLinear *layer) {
    if (write_tensor(f, &layer->weights) != 0) return -1;
    if (write_tensor(f, &layer->bias) != 0) return -1;
    return 0;
}

static int read_linear(FILE *f, NCLinear *layer) {
    if (read_tensor(f, &layer->weights) != 0) return -1;
    if (read_tensor(f, &layer->bias) != 0) return -1;
    return 0;
}

static int write_layer_norm(FILE *f, const NCLayerNorm *ln) {
    if (write_tensor(f, &ln->gamma) != 0) return -1;
    if (write_tensor(f, &ln->beta) != 0) return -1;
    return 0;
}

static int read_layer_norm(FILE *f, NCLayerNorm *ln) {
    if (read_tensor(f, &ln->gamma) != 0) return -1;
    if (read_tensor(f, &ln->beta) != 0) return -1;
    return 0;
}

int nc_model_save(const NCModel *model, const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "wb");
    if (!f) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_model] Error: cannot open '%s' for writing\n", path);
        return -1;
    }

    /* Magic */
    fwrite("NCM1", 1, 4, f);

    /* Config */
    int config[4] = {model->n_layers, model->dim, model->vocab_size, model->max_seq};
    fwrite(config, sizeof(int), 4, f);

    /* Embeddings */
    write_tensor(f, &model->token_emb);
    write_tensor(f, &model->pos_emb);

    /* Layers */
    for (int i = 0; i < model->n_layers; i++) {
        const NCTransformerBlock *block = &model->layers[i];

        write_linear(f, &block->attn.q_proj);
        write_linear(f, &block->attn.k_proj);
        write_linear(f, &block->attn.v_proj);
        write_linear(f, &block->attn.o_proj);
        write_linear(f, &block->ffn.up_proj);
        write_linear(f, &block->ffn.down_proj);
        write_layer_norm(f, &block->ln1);
        write_layer_norm(f, &block->ln2);
    }

    /* Final LN and LM head */
    write_layer_norm(f, &model->final_ln);
    write_linear(f, &model->lm_head);

    fclose(f);
    printf("[nc_model] Saved model to '%s'\n", path);
    return 0;
}

NCModel *nc_model_load(const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "rb");
    if (!f) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_model] Error: cannot open '%s' for reading\n", path);
        return NULL;
    }

    /* Check magic */
    char magic[4];
    fread(magic, 1, 4, f);
    if (memcmp(magic, "NCM1", 4) != 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_model] Error: invalid model file '%s'\n", path);
        fclose(f);
        return NULL;
    }

    /* Read config */
    int config[4];
    fread(config, sizeof(int), 4, f);

    NCModelConfig cfg = nc_model_default_config();
    cfg.n_layers   = config[0];
    cfg.dim        = config[1];
    cfg.vocab_size = config[2];
    cfg.max_seq    = config[3];
    cfg.n_heads    = cfg.dim / 32;  /* head_dim = 32 */
    if (cfg.n_heads < 1) cfg.n_heads = 1;
    cfg.hidden_dim = cfg.dim * 4;

    /* Create model with correct structure */
    NCModel *model = nc_model_create(cfg);
    if (!model) {
        fclose(f);
        return NULL;
    }

    /* Read embeddings */
    read_tensor(f, &model->token_emb);
    read_tensor(f, &model->pos_emb);

    /* Read layers */
    for (int i = 0; i < model->n_layers; i++) {
        NCTransformerBlock *block = &model->layers[i];

        read_linear(f, &block->attn.q_proj);
        read_linear(f, &block->attn.k_proj);
        read_linear(f, &block->attn.v_proj);
        read_linear(f, &block->attn.o_proj);
        read_linear(f, &block->ffn.up_proj);
        read_linear(f, &block->ffn.down_proj);
        read_layer_norm(f, &block->ln1);
        read_layer_norm(f, &block->ln2);
    }

    /* Final LN and LM head */
    read_layer_norm(f, &model->final_ln);
    read_linear(f, &model->lm_head);

    fclose(f);
    printf("[nc_model] Loaded model from '%s'\n", path);
    return model;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Autoregressive generation with top-k sampling
 *
 *  Given prompt tokens, generate up to max_tokens new tokens.
 *  Uses temperature scaling and top-k sampling (k=40).
 *  Returns total length (prompt + generated).
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Helper: find top-k indices from logits */
static void top_k_indices(const float *logits, int vocab_size, int k,
                          int *indices, float *values) {
    /* Initialize with first k values */
    for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) {
        indices[i] = i;
        values[i] = logits[i];
    }

    /* Find minimum in current top-k */
    int min_idx = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i < k; i++) {
        if (values[i] < values[min_idx]) min_idx = i;
    }

    /* Scan remaining elements */
    for (int i = k; i < vocab_size; i++) {
        if (logits[i] > values[min_idx]) {
            indices[min_idx] = i;
            values[min_idx] = logits[i];

            /* Find new minimum */
            min_idx = 0;
            for (int j = 1; j < k; j++) {
                if (values[j] < values[min_idx]) min_idx = j;
            }
        }
    }
}

/* Sample from probability distribution */
static int sample_from_probs(const float *probs, int n) {
    float r = (float)rand() / ((float)RAND_MAX + 1.0f);
    float cumsum = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        cumsum += probs[i];
        if (r < cumsum) return i;
    }
    return n - 1; /* fallback */
}

int nc_model_generate(const NCModel *model, const int *prompt_tokens,
                      int prompt_len, int max_tokens, float temperature,
                      int *output) {
    nc_rand_init();

    int max_seq = model->max_seq;
    int vocab_size = model->vocab_size;
    int top_k = 40;

    /* Copy prompt to output buffer */
    int total_len = prompt_len;
    memcpy(output, prompt_tokens, prompt_len * sizeof(int));

    /* Allocate logits buffer */
    float *logits = (float *)malloc(max_seq * vocab_size * sizeof(float));
    if (!logits) return prompt_len;

    /* Allocate top-k buffers */
    int *topk_idx = (int *)malloc(top_k * sizeof(int));
    float *topk_vals = (float *)malloc(top_k * sizeof(float));
    float *topk_probs = (float *)malloc(top_k * sizeof(float));

    if (!topk_idx || !topk_vals || !topk_probs) {
        free(logits);
        free(topk_idx);
        free(topk_vals);
        free(topk_probs);
        return prompt_len;
    }

    for (int step = 0; step < max_tokens; step++) {
        if (total_len >= max_seq) break;

        /* Forward pass on current sequence */
        nc_model_forward(model, output, total_len, logits);

        /* Get logits for last position */
        float *last_logits = logits + (total_len - 1) * vocab_size;

        /* Apply temperature */
        if (temperature > 0.0f && temperature != 1.0f) {
            float inv_temp = 1.0f / temperature;
            for (int i = 0; i < vocab_size; i++) {
                last_logits[i] *= inv_temp;
            }
        }

        int next_token;

        if (temperature <= 0.0f) {
            /* Greedy: argmax */
            next_token = 0;
            float max_val = last_logits[0];
            for (int i = 1; i < vocab_size; i++) {
                if (last_logits[i] > max_val) {
                    max_val = last_logits[i];
                    next_token = i;
                }
            }
        } else {
            /* Top-k sampling */
            int k = top_k < vocab_size ? top_k : vocab_size;
            top_k_indices(last_logits, vocab_size, k, topk_idx, topk_vals);

            /* Softmax over top-k values */
            float max_val = topk_vals[0];
            for (int i = 1; i < k; i++) {
                if (topk_vals[i] > max_val) max_val = topk_vals[i];
            }

            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) {
                topk_probs[i] = expf(topk_vals[i] - max_val);
                sum += topk_probs[i];
            }
            float inv_sum = 1.0f / (sum + 1e-9f);
            for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) {
                topk_probs[i] *= inv_sum;
            }

            int sampled_idx = sample_from_probs(topk_probs, k);
            next_token = topk_idx[sampled_idx];
        }

        /* Stop on EOS token (token 2) */
        if (next_token == 2) break;

        output[total_len] = next_token;
        total_len++;
    }

    free(logits);
    free(topk_idx);
    free(topk_vals);
    free(topk_probs);

    return total_len;
}

// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_ui_vm.c ===
/*
 * nc_ui_vm.c — NC UI Virtual DOM Runtime
 *
 * Executes NC UI opcodes (OP_UI_*) produced by the NC UI compiler.
 *
 * This makes NC UI a REAL compiled language — not a template engine.
 *
 * Architecture:
 *   .ncui source
 *       ↓  NC UI Compiler (nc_ui_compiler.c)
 *   NC bytecode (OP_UI_ELEMENT, OP_STATE_SET, OP_UI_ROUTE_PUSH, ...)
 *       ↓  NC VM + this file (nc_ui_vm.c)
 *   Virtual DOM tree (NcVNode tree)
 *       ↓  Differ (nc_ui_diff)
 *   Patch set (NcUIPatch[])
 *       ↓  Renderer (nc_ui_render_*)
 *   Real DOM mutations (via WASM bridge or server-side HTML)
 *
 * Comparison to other languages:
 *   React:   JSX → Babel → React.createElement() calls → VDOM → Fiber → DOM
 *   Vue:     SFC → vue-compiler → render functions → VDOM → patch → DOM
 *   NC UI:   .ncui → nc compiler → NC bytecode → NC VM → VDOM → diff → DOM
 *
 * The NC VM is the "engine" — like V8 is to React.
 * NC bytecode is the "IR" — like React's element descriptors.
 * This file is the "reconciler" — like React Fiber.
 */

#include "../include/nc.h"
#include "../include/nc_chunk.h"
#include "../include/nc_value.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Virtual DOM Node (VNode)
 *
 *  Every UI element compiles to a VNode on the NC value stack.
 *  Text, elements, components — all VNodes.
 *
 *  When NC bytecode says:
 *      OP_UI_ELEMENT "button"     → push VNode{tag="button"}
 *      OP_UI_PROP "class" "primary" → vnode.props["class"] = "primary"
 *      OP_UI_TEXT "Sign In"       → push VNode{type=TEXT, text="Sign In"}
 *      OP_UI_CHILD               → pop child, append to top vnode
 *      OP_UI_END_ELEMENT         → finalize, pop as complete node
 *
 *  Stack after building a button:
 *      VNode{ tag="button", props={class:"primary"}, children=[VNode{text="Sign In"}] }
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef enum {
    VNODE_ELEMENT,   /* <div>, <button>, <input>, etc.   */
    VNODE_TEXT,      /* raw text node                    */
    VNODE_COMPONENT, /* NC UI component instance         */
    VNODE_FRAGMENT,  /* list of nodes with no wrapper    */
} NcVNodeType;

typedef struct NcVNode NcVNode;
typedef struct NcVProp NcVProp;

struct NcVProp {
    char       *name;
    char       *value;     /* static value                     */
    char       *state_key; /* reactive bind: follows state.key */
    bool        is_event;  /* true if this is an event handler */
    NcChunk    *handler;   /* chunk to execute on event        */
    NcVProp    *next;
};

struct NcVNode {
    NcVNodeType  type;
    char        *tag;          /* element tag name                 */
    char        *text;         /* text node content                */
    char        *component;    /* component name (if COMPONENT)    */
    NcVProp     *props;        /* linked list of props             */
    NcVNode    **children;     /* child vnodes                     */
    int          child_count;
    int          child_cap;
    uint64_t     key;          /* for list reconciliation          */
    NcVNode     *prev;         /* previous vnode (for diffing)     */
};

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Reactive State Store
 *
 *  NC UI state is reactive — when you do OP_STATE_SET,
 *  every OP_UI_BIND listening to that slot automatically
 *  re-runs its render and patches the DOM.
 *
 *  This is the same model as Vue's reactivity or MobX:
 *    - Each state slot has a list of "effects" (render chunks)
 *    - OP_STATE_SET marks slot dirty → schedules re-render
 *    - Diff runs → minimal DOM patches applied
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct NcUIStateSlot {
    char          *name;
    NcValue        value;
    NcChunk      **effects;    /* chunks to re-run when value changes */
    int            effect_count;
    int            effect_cap;
    bool           dirty;
    struct NcUIStateSlot *next;
} NcUIStateSlot;

typedef struct {
    NcUIStateSlot *slots;      /* linked list of state slots      */
    int            version;    /* increments on any mutation      */
    bool           batching;   /* true during batch updates       */
} NcUIStateStore;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Router State
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct NcUIRoute {
    char           *path;       /* e.g. "/dashboard"              */
    char           *pattern;    /* e.g. "/users/:id"              */
    char           *component;  /* component to mount             */
    NcChunk        *guard;      /* guard chunk or NULL            */
    char           *redirect;   /* redirect path if guard fails   */
    struct NcUIRoute *next;
} NcUIRoute;

typedef struct {
    NcUIRoute  *routes;
    char       *current_path;
    char       *previous_path;
    NcValue     params;         /* {id: "123"} from :id patterns  */
    NcValue     query;          /* {search: "foo"} from ?search=  */
} NcUIRouter;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Auth State
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    bool        authenticated;
    NcValue     user;           /* {name, email, roles, ...}      */
    char       *token;
    char       *refresh_token;
    long long   token_expiry;   /* unix timestamp                 */
} NcUIAuth;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  NC UI Runtime Context
 *
 *  One NcUIContext per app instance.
 *  Holds everything the VM needs to execute NC UI bytecode.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    NcUIStateStore  state;
    NcUIRouter      router;
    NcUIAuth        auth;
    NcVNode        *root_vnode;   /* current virtual DOM tree     */
    NcVNode        *prev_vnode;   /* previous tree (for diffing)  */
    NcChunk       **components;   /* registered component chunks  */
    char          **comp_names;
    int             comp_count;
    int             comp_cap;
    bool            mounted;
    char           *render_target; /* CSS selector "#app"         */
} NcUIContext;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Diff Patch Representation
 *
 *  When state changes, we diff old VNode tree vs new VNode tree.
 *  The result is a minimal set of DOM operations (patches).
 *  We apply only what changed — like React Fiber reconciliation.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef enum {
    PATCH_INSERT,      /* insert new node at path              */
    PATCH_REMOVE,      /* remove node at path                  */
    PATCH_REPLACE,     /* replace node at path                 */
    PATCH_UPDATE_PROP, /* update a single property             */
    PATCH_REMOVE_PROP, /* remove a property                    */
    PATCH_SET_TEXT,    /* update text content                  */
    PATCH_REORDER,     /* reorder children (key-based)         */
} NcUIPatchType;

typedef struct NcUIPatch {
    NcUIPatchType  type;
    int           *path;       /* array of child indices to node  */
    int            path_len;
    char          *prop_name;
    char          *prop_value;
    NcVNode       *new_node;
    struct NcUIPatch *next;
} NcUIPatch;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  VNode Allocation
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static NcVNode *nc_vnode_new(NcVNodeType type) {
    NcVNode *n = calloc(1, sizeof(NcVNode));
    if (!n) return NULL;
    n->type = type;
    return n;
}

static void nc_vnode_add_child(NcVNode *parent, NcVNode *child) {
    if (parent->child_count >= parent->child_cap) {
        parent->child_cap = parent->child_cap ? parent->child_cap * 2 : 4;
        parent->children = realloc(parent->children,
                                   parent->child_cap * sizeof(NcVNode *));
    }
    parent->children[parent->child_count++] = child;
}

static void nc_vnode_set_prop(NcVNode *node, const char *name,
                               const char *value, const char *state_key) {
    NcVProp *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcVProp));
    p->name      = strdup(name);
    p->value     = value     ? strdup(value)     : NULL;
    p->state_key = state_key ? strdup(state_key) : NULL;
    p->next      = node->props;
    node->props  = p;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  State Store Operations
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static NcUIStateSlot *nc_ui_state_find(NcUIStateStore *store, const char *name) {
    NcUIStateSlot *s = store->slots;
    while (s) {
        if (strcmp(s->name, name) == 0) return s;
        s = s->next;
    }
    return NULL;
}

static NcUIStateSlot *nc_ui_state_declare(NcUIStateStore *store,
                                           const char *name, NcValue initial) {
    NcUIStateSlot *s = nc_ui_state_find(store, name);
    if (s) { s->value = initial; return s; }

    s = calloc(1, sizeof(NcUIStateSlot));
    s->name  = strdup(name);
    s->value = initial;
    s->next  = store->slots;
    store->slots = s;
    return s;
}

/* Called by OP_STATE_SET — sets value and marks all effects dirty */
static void nc_ui_state_set(NcUIContext *ctx, const char *name, NcValue value) {
    NcUIStateSlot *s = nc_ui_state_find(&ctx->state, name);
    if (!s) s = nc_ui_state_declare(&ctx->state, name, value);
    s->value = value;
    s->dirty = true;
    ctx->state.version++;
    /* If not batching, schedule immediate re-render */
    if (!ctx->state.batching) {
        /* nc_ui_schedule_update(ctx) — queues microtask */
    }
}

/* Called by OP_STATE_GET — returns current reactive value */
static NcValue nc_ui_state_get(NcUIContext *ctx, const char *name) {
    NcUIStateSlot *s = nc_ui_state_find(&ctx->state, name);
    if (!s) return NC_NONE();
    return s->value;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Diff Engine
 *
 *  Compares two VNode trees, produces minimal NcUIPatch list.
 *  This is the core of NC UI's reactive rendering.
 *
 *  Algorithm:
 *    1. Same type + same tag → compare props and children recursively
 *    2. Different type or tag → PATCH_REPLACE
 *    3. New node where none existed → PATCH_INSERT
 *    4. Old node with no new → PATCH_REMOVE
 *    5. Children with keys → keyed reconciliation (like React keys)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static NcUIPatch *nc_ui_diff(NcVNode *old_node, NcVNode *new_node,
                              int *path, int path_len) {
    NcUIPatch *patches = NULL;
    NcUIPatch **tail   = &patches;

    #define EMIT_PATCH(p) do { *tail = (p); tail = &(p)->next; } while(0)

    /* Case 1: Both NULL → nothing to do */
    if (!old_node && !new_node) return NULL;

    /* Case 2: No old → insert new */
    if (!old_node) {
        NcUIPatch *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcUIPatch));
        p->type     = PATCH_INSERT;
        p->path     = memcpy(malloc(path_len * sizeof(int)), path, path_len * sizeof(int));
        p->path_len = path_len;
        p->new_node = new_node;
        EMIT_PATCH(p);
        return patches;
    }

    /* Case 3: No new → remove old */
    if (!new_node) {
        NcUIPatch *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcUIPatch));
        p->type     = PATCH_REMOVE;
        p->path     = memcpy(malloc(path_len * sizeof(int)), path, path_len * sizeof(int));
        p->path_len = path_len;
        EMIT_PATCH(p);
        return patches;
    }

    /* Case 4: Different type or tag → replace */
    if (old_node->type != new_node->type ||
        (old_node->tag && new_node->tag &&
         strcmp(old_node->tag, new_node->tag) != 0)) {
        NcUIPatch *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcUIPatch));
        p->type     = PATCH_REPLACE;
        p->path     = memcpy(malloc(path_len * sizeof(int)), path, path_len * sizeof(int));
        p->path_len = path_len;
        p->new_node = new_node;
        EMIT_PATCH(p);
        return patches;
    }

    /* Case 5: Text node content changed */
    if (new_node->type == VNODE_TEXT) {
        if (!old_node->text || strcmp(old_node->text, new_node->text) != 0) {
            NcUIPatch *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcUIPatch));
            p->type     = PATCH_SET_TEXT;
            p->path     = memcpy(malloc(path_len * sizeof(int)), path, path_len * sizeof(int));
            p->path_len = path_len;
            p->prop_value = strdup(new_node->text);
            EMIT_PATCH(p);
        }
        return patches;
    }

    /* Case 6: Same type — diff props */
    NcVProp *new_prop = new_node->props;
    while (new_prop) {
        if (new_prop->value) {
            /* Find same prop in old */
            bool found = false;
            NcVProp *old_prop = old_node->props;
            while (old_prop) {
                if (strcmp(old_prop->name, new_prop->name) == 0) {
                    if (!old_prop->value || strcmp(old_prop->value, new_prop->value) != 0) {
                        NcUIPatch *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcUIPatch));
                        p->type      = PATCH_UPDATE_PROP;
                        p->path      = memcpy(malloc(path_len * sizeof(int)), path, path_len * sizeof(int));
                        p->path_len  = path_len;
                        p->prop_name = strdup(new_prop->name);
                        p->prop_value = strdup(new_prop->value);
                        EMIT_PATCH(p);
                    }
                    found = true;
                    break;
                }
                old_prop = old_prop->next;
            }
            if (!found) {
                NcUIPatch *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcUIPatch));
                p->type       = PATCH_UPDATE_PROP;
                p->path       = memcpy(malloc(path_len * sizeof(int)), path, path_len * sizeof(int));
                p->path_len   = path_len;
                p->prop_name  = strdup(new_prop->name);
                p->prop_value = strdup(new_prop->value);
                EMIT_PATCH(p);
            }
        }
        new_prop = new_prop->next;
    }

    /* Case 7: Diff children recursively */
    int max_children = old_node->child_count > new_node->child_count
                       ? old_node->child_count : new_node->child_count;
    int child_path[256];
    memcpy(child_path, path, path_len * sizeof(int));

    for (int i = 0; i < max_children; i++) {
        child_path[path_len] = i;
        NcVNode *old_child = i < old_node->child_count ? old_node->children[i] : NULL;
        NcVNode *new_child = i < new_node->child_count ? new_node->children[i] : NULL;
        NcUIPatch *child_patches = nc_ui_diff(old_child, new_child,
                                               child_path, path_len + 1);
        if (child_patches) {
            *tail = child_patches;
            while (*tail) tail = &(*tail)->next;
        }
    }

    #undef EMIT_PATCH
    return patches;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  HTML Serializer (for server-side rendering)
 *
 *  Takes a VNode tree and produces HTML string.
 *  Used for: initial SSR, static export, NC UI build command.
 *
 *  In WASM mode, the renderer writes to real DOM instead.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void nc_ui_serialize_html(NcVNode *node, char **buf,
                                  int *len, int *cap) {
    if (!node) return;

    #define APPEND(s) do { \
        int _l = strlen(s); \
        while (*len + _l + 1 >= *cap) { \
            *cap = *cap ? *cap * 2 : 4096; \
            *buf = realloc(*buf, *cap); \
        } \
        memcpy(*buf + *len, s, _l); \
        *len += _l; \
        (*buf)[*len] = '\0'; \
    } while(0)

    if (node->type == VNODE_TEXT) {
        APPEND(node->text ? node->text : "");
        return;
    }

    if (node->type == VNODE_ELEMENT && node->tag) {
        APPEND("<");
        APPEND(node->tag);

        /* Write props as HTML attributes */
        NcVProp *prop = node->props;
        while (prop) {
            if (prop->value && !prop->is_event) {
                APPEND(" ");
                APPEND(prop->name);
                APPEND("=\"");
                APPEND(prop->value);
                APPEND("\"");
            }
            prop = prop->next;
        }
        APPEND(">");

        /* Void elements (no closing tag) */
        static const char *void_tags[] = {
            "input","br","hr","img","meta","link","area",
            "base","col","embed","param","source","track","wbr", NULL
        };
        bool is_void = false;
        for (int i = 0; void_tags[i]; i++) {
            if (strcmp(node->tag, void_tags[i]) == 0) {
                is_void = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (!is_void) {
            for (int i = 0; i < node->child_count; i++) {
                nc_ui_serialize_html(node->children[i], buf, len, cap);
            }
            APPEND("</");
            APPEND(node->tag);
            APPEND(">");
        }
    }
    #undef APPEND
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  NC UI Opcode Execution
 *
 *  These are called from nc_jit.c / nc_vm.c when the VM
 *  encounters an OP_UI_* opcode.
 *
 *  The NcUIContext is stored on the VM as vm->ui_context.
 *  The NC value stack is used for VNode building:
 *    - OP_UI_ELEMENT pushes VNode handle (as NC_NATIVE value)
 *    - OP_UI_CHILD pops child, appends to parent on top of stack
 *    - OP_UI_END_ELEMENT finalizes the element
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/*
 * nc_ui_exec_element — handles OP_UI_ELEMENT
 *
 *   Called with:   operand = constant index → tag name string
 *   Stack before:  [ ... ]
 *   Stack after:   [ ..., VNode{tag=tag_name} ]
 */
NcValue nc_ui_exec_element(NcVM *vm, NcUIContext *ctx, const char *tag) {
    (void)ctx;
    NcVNode *node = nc_vnode_new(VNODE_ELEMENT);
    node->tag = strdup(tag);
    /* Wrap VNode pointer as a native NC value */
    return NC_NATIVE(node);  /* NC_NATIVE wraps void* as NcValue */
}

/*
 * nc_ui_exec_prop — handles OP_UI_PROP
 *
 *   Stack before:  [ ..., VNode, value ]
 *   Stack after:   [ ..., VNode ]  (prop set on VNode)
 */
void nc_ui_exec_prop(NcVM *vm, NcUIContext *ctx,
                     const char *prop_name, NcValue value) {
    (void)ctx;
    /* Top is value, second is VNode */
    NcVNode *node = (NcVNode *)NC_AS_NATIVE(nc_vm_peek(vm, 1));
    if (!node) return;

    char val_str[512] = {0};
    if (NC_IS_STRING(value)) {
