                        r = nc_ncfn_tensor_save(args[0], AS_STRING(args[1])->chars);
                    } else if (strcmp(name, "tensor_load") == 0 && argc == 1 && IS_STRING(args[0])) {
                        r = nc_ncfn_tensor_load(AS_STRING(args[0])->chars);
                    }

                    vm->stack_top -= (argc + 1);
                    vm_push(vm, r);
                    break;
                }
            }
            vm->stack_top -= (argc + 1);
            vm_push(vm, NC_NONE());
            break;
        }

        case OP_RETURN:
        case OP_HALT:
            vm->frame_count--;
            return result;

        default:
            vm_error(vm, "Unknown opcode: %d", instruction);
            return NC_NONE();
        }
    }

    return result;
}

void nc_vm_free(NcVM *vm) {
    if (!vm) return;
    nc_gc_unregister_vm(vm);
    nc_map_free(vm->globals);
    nc_map_free(vm->behaviors);
    for (int i = 0; i < vm->output_count; i++) free(vm->output[i]);
    free(vm->output);
    free(vm);
}

// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_pkg.c ===
/*
 * nc_pkg.c — Package manager for NC.
 *
 * Manages NC packages (libraries of behaviors, types, AI prompts).
 *
 * Commands:
 *   nc pkg init                Create nc.pkg manifest
 *   nc pkg install <name>      Install a package
 *   nc pkg list                List installed packages
 *   nc pkg publish             Publish to registry
 *
 * Security: All inputs are validated. Downloads use libcurl (no shell).
 * Directory removal uses native C filesystem APIs (no system("rm -rf")).
 * Git operations use execvp-style safe spawning where available.
 */

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include "../include/nc_json.h"
#include "../include/nc_http.h"
#include "../include/nc_platform.h"

#define NC_PKG_DIR    ".nc_packages"
#define NC_PKG_FILE   "nc.pkg"
#define NC_REGISTRY_DEFAULT "https://registry.notation-code.dev"

static const char *nc_get_registry(void) {
    const char *env = getenv("NC_REGISTRY");
    return (env && env[0]) ? env : NC_REGISTRY_DEFAULT;
}

/* Validate package name to prevent injection.
 * Only allows: alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot, forward slash, colon, at */
static bool is_safe_pkg_name(const char *name) {
    if (!name || !name[0]) return false;
    for (const char *p = name; *p; p++) {
        char c = *p;
        if (!(c >= 'a' && c <= 'z') && !(c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') &&
            !(c >= '0' && c <= '9') && c != '-' && c != '_' && c != '.' &&
            c != '/' && c != ':' && c != '@') {
            return false;
        }
    }
    if (strstr(name, "..")) return false;
    return true;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Safe process execution — uses execvp/CreateProcess, NOT system()
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static int safe_run(const char *const argv[]) {
#ifdef NC_WINDOWS
    char cmd_line[4096] = {0};
    int pos = 0;
    for (int i = 0; argv[i]; i++) {
        if (i > 0) cmd_line[pos++] = ' ';
        pos += snprintf(cmd_line + pos, sizeof(cmd_line) - pos, "\"%s\"", argv[i]);
    }
    STARTUPINFOA si = { .cb = sizeof(si) };
    PROCESS_INFORMATION pi = {0};
    if (!CreateProcessA(NULL, cmd_line, NULL, NULL, FALSE, 0, NULL, NULL, &si, &pi))
        return -1;
    WaitForSingleObject(pi.hProcess, INFINITE);
    DWORD exit_code = 1;
    GetExitCodeProcess(pi.hProcess, &exit_code);
    CloseHandle(pi.hProcess);
    CloseHandle(pi.hThread);
    return (int)exit_code;
#else
    pid_t pid = fork();
    if (pid < 0) return -1;
    if (pid == 0) {
        execvp(argv[0], (char *const *)argv);
        _exit(127);
    }
    int status = 0;
    waitpid(pid, &status, 0);
    return WIFEXITED(status) ? WEXITSTATUS(status) : -1;
#endif
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Safe recursive directory removal — no system("rm -rf")
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static int remove_dir_recursive(const char *path) {
    nc_dir_t *d = nc_opendir(path);
    if (!d) return remove(path);

    nc_dirent_t entry;
    while (nc_readdir(d, &entry)) {
        if (strcmp(entry.name, ".") == 0 || strcmp(entry.name, "..") == 0)
            continue;
        char child[1024];
        snprintf(child, sizeof(child), "%s%c%s", path, NC_PATH_SEP, entry.name);
        if (entry.is_dir) {
            remove_dir_recursive(child);
        } else {
            remove(child);
        }
    }
    nc_closedir(d);

#ifdef NC_WINDOWS
    return _rmdir(path);
#else
    return rmdir(path);
#endif
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Download file using libcurl (no shelling out to curl CLI)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static int download_file(const char *url, const char *dest_path) {
    char *response = nc_http_get(url, NULL);
    if (!response) return -1;

    /* Check if it's an error response */
    if (strstr(response, "\"error\"") || strlen(response) < 100) {
        free(response);
        return -1;
    }

    FILE *f = fopen(dest_path, "wb");
    if (!f) { free(response); return -1; }
    fwrite(response, 1, strlen(response), f);
    fclose(f);
    free(response);
    return 0;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Package manifest
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    char name[128];
    char version[32];
    char description[256];
    char author[128];
    char **dependencies;
    int   dep_count;
} NcPackage;

/* ── pkg init ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */

int nc_pkg_init(const char *dir) {
    char path[512];
    snprintf(path, sizeof(path), "%s" NC_PATH_SEP_STR "%s", dir, NC_PKG_FILE);

    FILE *f = fopen(path, "r");
    if (f) { fclose(f); printf("  nc.pkg already exists\n"); return 0; }

    f = fopen(path, "w");
    if (!f) { fprintf(stderr, "Cannot create %s\n", path); return 1; }

    fprintf(f,
        "// NC Package Manifest\n"
        "name \"my-package\"\n"
        "version \"1.0.0\"\n"
        "description \"My NC package\"\n"
        "author \"Your Name\"\n"
        "\n"
        "// Dependencies — other NC packages this requires\n"
        "// requires [\"http-tools\", \"ai-helpers\"]\n"
    );
    fclose(f);
    printf("  Created %s\n", path);
    return 0;
}

/* ── pkg install ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

static bool is_git_url(const char *name) {
    return strstr(name, "://") || strstr(name, ".git");
}

int nc_pkg_install(const char *pkg_name) {
    char dir[512];
    snprintf(dir, sizeof(dir), "." NC_PATH_SEP_STR "%s", NC_PKG_DIR);
    nc_mkdir(dir);

    if (!is_safe_pkg_name(pkg_name)) {
        fprintf(stderr, "  Error: Invalid package name '%s'\n", pkg_name);
        fprintf(stderr, "  Names may only contain: a-z A-Z 0-9 - _ . / : @\n");
        return 1;
    }

    char short_name[128];
    if (is_git_url(pkg_name)) {
        const char *last_slash = strrchr(pkg_name, '/');
        if (last_slash) {
            strncpy(short_name, last_slash + 1, 127);
            short_name[127] = '\0';
            char *dot = strstr(short_name, ".git");
            if (dot) *dot = '\0';
        } else {
            strncpy(short_name, pkg_name, 127);
        }
    } else {
        strncpy(short_name, pkg_name, 127);
        short_name[127] = '\0';
    }

    char pkg_dir[512];
    snprintf(pkg_dir, sizeof(pkg_dir), "%s" NC_PATH_SEP_STR "%s", dir, short_name);

    struct stat st;
    if (stat(pkg_dir, &st) == 0) {
        printf("  Package '%s' already installed at %s\n", short_name, pkg_dir);
        printf("  To update, run: nc pkg update %s\n", short_name);
        return 0;
    }

    printf("  Installing package: %s\n", short_name);

    if (is_git_url(pkg_name)) {
        char git_url[512];
        if (strstr(pkg_name, "://")) {
            strncpy(git_url, pkg_name, sizeof(git_url) - 1);
            git_url[sizeof(git_url) - 1] = '\0';
        } else {
            snprintf(git_url, sizeof(git_url), "https://%s", pkg_name);
        }
        if (!strstr(git_url, ".git"))
            strncat(git_url, ".git", sizeof(git_url) - strlen(git_url) - 1);

        printf("  Cloning %s ...\n", git_url);
        const char *git_args[] = {"git", "clone", "--depth", "1", git_url, pkg_dir, NULL};
        int ret = safe_run(git_args);
        if (ret != 0) {
            fprintf(stderr, "  Error: git clone failed. Is git installed?\n");
            return 1;
        }
        printf("  Installed %s to %s/\n", short_name, pkg_dir);
    } else {
        const char *registry = nc_get_registry();

        char url[512];
        snprintf(url, sizeof(url), "%s/packages/%s.tar.gz", registry, pkg_name);
        printf("  Trying registry: %s ...\n", url);

        char tmp_file[256];
        snprintf(tmp_file, sizeof(tmp_file), "%s%c_nc_pkg_%s.tar.gz",
                 nc_tempdir(), NC_PATH_SEP, pkg_name);

        int ret = download_file(url, tmp_file);
        if (ret == 0) {
            nc_mkdir(pkg_dir);
            const char *tar_args[] = {"tar", "xzf", tmp_file, "-C", pkg_dir,
                                     "--no-same-owner", "--strip-components=1", NULL};
            safe_run(tar_args);
            remove(tmp_file);
            printf("  Installed %s from registry\n", pkg_name);
        } else {
            fprintf(stderr, "  Package '%s' not found in registry.\n", pkg_name);
            fprintf(stderr, "  To install from git: nc pkg install github.com/user/%s\n", pkg_name);
            return 1;
        }
    }

    return 0;
}

/* ── pkg update ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

static int nc_pkg_update(const char *pkg_name) {
    if (!is_safe_pkg_name(pkg_name)) {
        fprintf(stderr, "  Error: Invalid package name\n");
        return 1;
    }

    char pkg_dir[512];
    snprintf(pkg_dir, sizeof(pkg_dir), "%s" NC_PATH_SEP_STR "%s", NC_PKG_DIR, pkg_name);

    struct stat st;
    if (stat(pkg_dir, &st) != 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "  Package '%s' is not installed\n", pkg_name);
        return 1;
    }

    char git_dir[512];
    snprintf(git_dir, sizeof(git_dir), "%s/.git", pkg_dir);
    if (stat(git_dir, &st) == 0) {
        printf("  Updating %s ...\n", pkg_name);
        const char *git_args[] = {"git", "-C", pkg_dir, "pull", NULL};
        int ret = safe_run(git_args);
        if (ret != 0) { fprintf(stderr, "  Error: git pull failed\n"); return 1; }
        printf("  Updated %s\n", pkg_name);
    } else {
        fprintf(stderr, "  Package '%s' was not installed from git. Reinstall it.\n", pkg_name);
        return 1;
    }
    return 0;
}

/* ── pkg remove ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

static int nc_pkg_remove(const char *pkg_name) {
    if (!is_safe_pkg_name(pkg_name)) {
        fprintf(stderr, "  Error: Invalid package name\n");
        return 1;
    }

    char pkg_dir[512];
    snprintf(pkg_dir, sizeof(pkg_dir), "%s" NC_PATH_SEP_STR "%s", NC_PKG_DIR, pkg_name);

    struct stat st;
    if (stat(pkg_dir, &st) != 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "  Package '%s' is not installed\n", pkg_name);
        return 1;
    }

    int ret = remove_dir_recursive(pkg_dir);
    if (ret == 0) printf("  Removed package '%s'\n", pkg_name);
    else fprintf(stderr, "  Error removing '%s'\n", pkg_name);
    return ret;
}

/* ── pkg list ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */

int nc_pkg_list(void) {
    printf("\n  Installed NC Packages:\n");
    printf("  %s\n", "────────────────────────────────");

    char dir[512];
    snprintf(dir, sizeof(dir), "%s", NC_PKG_DIR);

    nc_dir_t *d = nc_opendir(dir);
    if (!d) {
        printf("  (none — run 'nc pkg install <name>' to install)\n\n");
        return 0;
    }
    nc_dirent_t entry;
    int count = 0;
    while (nc_readdir(d, &entry)) {
        if (entry.name[0] == '.') continue;
        printf("    %s\n", entry.name);
        count++;
    }
    nc_closedir(d);
    if (count == 0) printf("  (none)\n");

    printf("\n");
    return 0;
}

/* ── pkg command router ────────────────────────────────────── */

int nc_pkg_command(int argc, char *argv[]) {
    if (argc < 3) {
        printf("Usage: nc pkg <command>\n");
        printf("  init                         Create nc.pkg manifest\n");
        printf("  install <name|git-url>       Install a package\n");
        printf("  update <name>                Update a git-installed package\n");
        printf("  remove <name>                Remove a package\n");
        printf("  list                         List installed packages\n");
        printf("\nExamples:\n");
        printf("  nc pkg install github.com/user/my-nc-package\n");
        printf("  nc pkg install ai-helpers\n");
        printf("  nc pkg update my-nc-package\n");
        return 0;
    }

    const char *subcmd = argv[2];

    if (strcmp(subcmd, "init") == 0)
        return nc_pkg_init(".");
    if (strcmp(subcmd, "install") == 0) {
        if (argc < 4) { fprintf(stderr, "Usage: nc pkg install <name|git-url>\n"); return 1; }
        return nc_pkg_install(argv[3]);
    }
    if (strcmp(subcmd, "update") == 0) {
        if (argc < 4) { fprintf(stderr, "Usage: nc pkg update <name>\n"); return 1; }
        return nc_pkg_update(argv[3]);
    }
    if (strcmp(subcmd, "remove") == 0) {
        if (argc < 4) { fprintf(stderr, "Usage: nc pkg remove <name>\n"); return 1; }
        return nc_pkg_remove(argv[3]);
    }
    if (strcmp(subcmd, "list") == 0)
        return nc_pkg_list();

    fprintf(stderr, "Unknown pkg command: %s\n", subcmd);
    return 1;
}

// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_training.c ===
/*
 * nc_training.c — Training pipeline for the NC transformer model.
 *
 * Implements backpropagation, Adam optimizer, cross-entropy loss,
 * gradient clipping, learning rate scheduling, and a complete
 * training loop with checkpointing.
 *
 * This trains NC's own AI on NC code.
 */

#include "nc_training.h"
#include <dirent.h>

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Cross-entropy loss
 *
 *  For language modeling, the target for position i is the
 *  token at position i+1 (next-token prediction).
 *
 *  loss = -1/N * sum_i log(softmax(logits_i)[target_i])
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

float nc_loss_cross_entropy(const float *logits, const int *targets,
                            int seq_len, int vocab_size) {
    float total_loss = 0.0f;
    int count = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < seq_len - 1; i++) {
        const float *row = logits + i * vocab_size;
        int target = targets[i + 1]; /* next token prediction */

        if (target < 0 || target >= vocab_size) continue;

        /* Numerically stable log-softmax */
        float max_val = row[0];
        for (int j = 1; j < vocab_size; j++) {
            if (row[j] > max_val) max_val = row[j];
        }

        float log_sum_exp = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < vocab_size; j++) {
            log_sum_exp += expf(row[j] - max_val);
        }
        log_sum_exp = logf(log_sum_exp + 1e-9f) + max_val;

        float log_prob = row[target] - log_sum_exp;
        total_loss -= log_prob;
        count++;
    }

    return count > 0 ? total_loss / (float)count : 0.0f;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Gradient allocation and management
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static NCGrad grad_alloc(int size) {
    NCGrad g;
    g.size = size;
    g.grad = (float *)calloc(size, sizeof(float));
    return g;
}

static void grad_free(NCGrad *g) {
    free(g->grad);
    g->grad = NULL;
    g->size = 0;
}

NCModelGrads *nc_grads_create(const NCModel *model) {
    NCModelGrads *g = (NCModelGrads *)calloc(1, sizeof(NCModelGrads));
    if (!g) return NULL;

    g->n_layers = model->n_layers;

    /* Embedding gradients */
    g->token_emb_grad = grad_alloc(model->token_emb.size);
    g->pos_emb_grad   = grad_alloc(model->pos_emb.size);

    /* Per-layer gradients */
    g->layer_grads = calloc(model->n_layers, sizeof(*g->layer_grads));

    for (int i = 0; i < model->n_layers; i++) {
        const NCTransformerBlock *block = &model->layers[i];
        int dim = block->attn.dim;
        int hidden_dim = block->ffn.hidden_dim;

        /* Attention projections */
        g->layer_grads[i].q_w = grad_alloc(dim * dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].q_b = grad_alloc(dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].k_w = grad_alloc(dim * dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].k_b = grad_alloc(dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].v_w = grad_alloc(dim * dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].v_b = grad_alloc(dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].o_w = grad_alloc(dim * dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].o_b = grad_alloc(dim);

        /* FFN */
        g->layer_grads[i].up_w   = grad_alloc(dim * hidden_dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].up_b   = grad_alloc(hidden_dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].down_w = grad_alloc(hidden_dim * dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].down_b = grad_alloc(dim);

        /* Layer norms */
        g->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma = grad_alloc(dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta  = grad_alloc(dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma = grad_alloc(dim);
        g->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta  = grad_alloc(dim);
    }

    /* Final layer norm */
    g->final_ln_gamma = grad_alloc(model->dim);
    g->final_ln_beta  = grad_alloc(model->dim);

    /* LM head */
    g->lm_head_w = grad_alloc(model->lm_head.weights.size);
    g->lm_head_b = grad_alloc(model->lm_head.bias.size);

    return g;
}

void nc_grads_zero(NCModelGrads *grads) {
    if (!grads) return;

    memset(grads->token_emb_grad.grad, 0, grads->token_emb_grad.size * sizeof(float));
    memset(grads->pos_emb_grad.grad, 0, grads->pos_emb_grad.size * sizeof(float));

    for (int i = 0; i < grads->n_layers; i++) {
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].q_w.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].q_w.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].q_b.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].q_b.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].k_w.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].k_w.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].k_b.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].k_b.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].v_w.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].v_w.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].v_b.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].v_b.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].o_w.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].o_w.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].o_b.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].o_b.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].up_w.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].up_w.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].up_b.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].up_b.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].down_w.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].down_w.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].down_b.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].down_b.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma.size * sizeof(float));
        memset(grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta.grad, 0, grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta.size * sizeof(float));
    }

    memset(grads->final_ln_gamma.grad, 0, grads->final_ln_gamma.size * sizeof(float));
    memset(grads->final_ln_beta.grad, 0, grads->final_ln_beta.size * sizeof(float));
    memset(grads->lm_head_w.grad, 0, grads->lm_head_w.size * sizeof(float));
    memset(grads->lm_head_b.grad, 0, grads->lm_head_b.size * sizeof(float));
}

void nc_grads_free(NCModelGrads *grads) {
    if (!grads) return;

    grad_free(&grads->token_emb_grad);
    grad_free(&grads->pos_emb_grad);

    for (int i = 0; i < grads->n_layers; i++) {
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].q_w);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].q_b);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].k_w);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].k_b);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].v_w);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].v_b);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].o_w);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].o_b);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].up_w);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].up_b);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].down_w);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].down_b);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma);
        grad_free(&grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta);
    }
    free(grads->layer_grads);

    grad_free(&grads->final_ln_gamma);
    grad_free(&grads->final_ln_beta);
    grad_free(&grads->lm_head_w);
    grad_free(&grads->lm_head_b);

    free(grads);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Backpropagation — compute gradients through entire model
 *
 *  Uses the stored activations from a forward pass.
 *  Computes gradients of cross-entropy loss w.r.t. all params.
 *
 *  For a decoder-only transformer with next-token prediction:
 *    loss = CrossEntropy(logits[i], tokens[i+1])
 *
 *  Chain rule through:
 *    logits -> lm_head -> final_ln -> blocks -> embeddings
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Helper: softmax a single row in-place */
static void softmax_row(float *row, int n) {
    float max_v = row[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
        if (row[i] > max_v) max_v = row[i];
    }
    float sum = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        row[i] = expf(row[i] - max_v);
        sum += row[i];
    }
    float inv = 1.0f / (sum + 1e-9f);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        row[i] *= inv;
    }
}

/* Helper: GELU derivative */
static float gelu_grad(float x) {
    const float SQRT_2_PI = 0.7978845608f;
    float x3 = x * x * x;
    float inner = SQRT_2_PI * (x + 0.044715f * x3);
    float tanh_val = tanhf(inner);
    float sech2 = 1.0f - tanh_val * tanh_val;
    float inner_grad = SQRT_2_PI * (1.0f + 3.0f * 0.044715f * x * x);
    return 0.5f * (1.0f + tanh_val) + 0.5f * x * sech2 * inner_grad;
}

/* Helper: layer norm backward */
static void layer_norm_backward(
    const float *d_out,     /* [seq_len, dim] */
    const float *x_in,      /* [seq_len, dim] input to LN */
    const float *gamma,     /* [dim] */
    float eps,
    int seq_len, int dim,
    float *d_x,             /* [seq_len, dim] grad w.r.t. input */
    float *d_gamma,         /* [dim] grad w.r.t. gamma */
    float *d_beta           /* [dim] grad w.r.t. beta  */
) {
    for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
        const float *x_row = x_in + i * dim;
        const float *dout_row = d_out + i * dim;
        float *dx_row = d_x + i * dim;

        /* Recompute mean and var */
        float mean = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) mean += x_row[j];
        mean /= (float)dim;

        float var = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            float d = x_row[j] - mean;
            var += d * d;
        }
        var /= (float)dim;

        float inv_std = 1.0f / sqrtf(var + eps);

        /* Compute normalized values */
        float *x_hat = (float *)malloc(dim * sizeof(float));
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            x_hat[j] = (x_row[j] - mean) * inv_std;
        }

        /* d_gamma, d_beta accumulate */
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            d_gamma[j] += dout_row[j] * x_hat[j];
            d_beta[j]  += dout_row[j];
        }

        /* d_x: use the full layer norm gradient formula */
        float *d_xhat = (float *)malloc(dim * sizeof(float));
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            d_xhat[j] = dout_row[j] * gamma[j];
        }

        /* sum(d_xhat) and sum(d_xhat * x_hat) */
        float sum_dxhat = 0.0f, sum_dxhat_xhat = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            sum_dxhat += d_xhat[j];
            sum_dxhat_xhat += d_xhat[j] * x_hat[j];
        }

        float inv_dim = 1.0f / (float)dim;
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            dx_row[j] = inv_std * (d_xhat[j]
                        - inv_dim * sum_dxhat
                        - inv_dim * x_hat[j] * sum_dxhat_xhat);
        }

        free(x_hat);
        free(d_xhat);
    }
}

/* Helper: linear backward
 *  forward: out = x @ W + b
 *  backward: d_x = d_out @ W^T,  d_W = x^T @ d_out,  d_b = sum(d_out)
 */
static void linear_backward(
    const float *d_out,   /* [seq_len, out_dim] */
    const float *x_in,    /* [seq_len, in_dim]  */
    const float *W,       /* [in_dim, out_dim]  */
    int seq_len, int in_dim, int out_dim,
    float *d_x,           /* [seq_len, in_dim]  */
    float *d_W,           /* [in_dim, out_dim]  */
    float *d_b            /* [out_dim]           */
) {
    /* d_x = d_out @ W^T */
    if (d_x) {
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < in_dim; j++) {
                float sum = 0.0f;
                for (int k = 0; k < out_dim; k++) {
                    sum += d_out[i * out_dim + k] * W[j * out_dim + k];
                }
                d_x[i * in_dim + j] = sum;
            }
        }
    }

    /* d_W = x^T @ d_out  (accumulate) */
    for (int j = 0; j < in_dim; j++) {
        for (int k = 0; k < out_dim; k++) {
            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
                sum += x_in[i * in_dim + j] * d_out[i * out_dim + k];
            }
            d_W[j * out_dim + k] += sum;
        }
    }

    /* d_b = sum over seq_len of d_out  (accumulate) */
    for (int k = 0; k < out_dim; k++) {
        float sum = 0.0f;
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
            sum += d_out[i * out_dim + k];
        }
        d_b[k] += sum;
    }
}

void nc_backward(NCModel *model, NCModelGrads *grads,
                 const int *tokens, int seq_len) {
    int dim = model->dim;
    int vocab_size = model->vocab_size;

    if (seq_len > model->max_seq) seq_len = model->max_seq;

    /* ── Forward pass with activation caching ────────── */

    /* We need to re-run forward and store intermediate results */
    int n_layers = model->n_layers;

    /* Embedding: x[0] = token_emb + pos_emb */
    float **layer_inputs = (float **)malloc((n_layers + 1) * sizeof(float *));
    for (int i = 0; i <= n_layers; i++) {
        layer_inputs[i] = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
    }

    /* Compute embedding */
    for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
        int tok = tokens[i];
        if (tok < 0) tok = 0;
        if (tok >= vocab_size) tok = vocab_size - 1;
        for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
            layer_inputs[0][i * dim + j] =
                model->token_emb.data[tok * dim + j]
                + model->pos_emb.data[i * dim + j];
        }
    }

    /* Forward through transformer blocks, storing inputs */
    for (int layer = 0; layer < n_layers; layer++) {
        int shape2d[2] = {seq_len, dim};
        NCTensor x_tensor;
        x_tensor.data = layer_inputs[layer];
        x_tensor.shape = shape2d;
        x_tensor.ndim = 2;
        x_tensor.size = seq_len * dim;

        NCTensor out_tensor;
        out_tensor.data = layer_inputs[layer + 1];
        out_tensor.shape = shape2d;
        out_tensor.ndim = 2;
        out_tensor.size = seq_len * dim;

        ncm_block_forward(&model->layers[layer], &x_tensor, seq_len, &out_tensor);
    }

    /* Final layer norm */
    float *normed = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
    {
        int shape2d[2] = {seq_len, dim};
        NCTensor in_t = {layer_inputs[n_layers], shape2d, 2, seq_len * dim};
        NCTensor gamma_t = model->final_ln.gamma;
        NCTensor beta_t = model->final_ln.beta;
        NCTensor out_t = {normed, shape2d, 2, seq_len * dim};
        ncm_tensor_layer_norm(&in_t, &gamma_t, &beta_t, model->final_ln.eps, &out_t);
    }

    /* LM head: logits = normed @ lm_head.W + lm_head.b */
    float *logits = (float *)calloc(seq_len * vocab_size, sizeof(float));
    {
        int shape_in[2] = {seq_len, dim};
        int shape_out[2] = {seq_len, vocab_size};
        NCTensor in_t = {normed, shape_in, 2, seq_len * dim};
        NCTensor out_t = {logits, shape_out, 2, seq_len * vocab_size};
        ncm_linear_forward(&model->lm_head, &in_t, &out_t);
    }

    /* ── Backward pass ───────────────────────────────── */

    /* d_logits: gradient of cross-entropy loss w.r.t. logits */
    float *d_logits = (float *)calloc(seq_len * vocab_size, sizeof(float));
    float inv_count = 1.0f / (float)(seq_len - 1);

    for (int i = 0; i < seq_len - 1; i++) {
        float *row = logits + i * vocab_size;
        float *d_row = d_logits + i * vocab_size;
        int target = tokens[i + 1];

        if (target < 0 || target >= vocab_size) continue;

        /* softmax(logits) */
        float probs[vocab_size]; /* VLA — ok for vocab_size ~2048 */
        memcpy(probs, row, vocab_size * sizeof(float));
        softmax_row(probs, vocab_size);

        /* d_logits = probs - one_hot(target) */
        for (int j = 0; j < vocab_size; j++) {
            d_row[j] = (probs[j] - (j == target ? 1.0f : 0.0f)) * inv_count;
        }
    }

    /* Backward through LM head */
    float *d_normed = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
    linear_backward(d_logits, normed,
                    model->lm_head.weights.data,
                    seq_len, dim, vocab_size,
                    d_normed,
                    grads->lm_head_w.grad,
                    grads->lm_head_b.grad);

    /* Backward through final layer norm */
    float *d_block_out = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
    layer_norm_backward(d_normed, layer_inputs[n_layers],
                        model->final_ln.gamma.data,
                        model->final_ln.eps,
                        seq_len, dim,
                        d_block_out,
                        grads->final_ln_gamma.grad,
                        grads->final_ln_beta.grad);

    /* Backward through transformer blocks (reverse order) */
    float *d_layer_in = d_block_out;  /* reuse pointer, chain gradients */

    for (int layer = n_layers - 1; layer >= 0; layer--) {
        const NCTransformerBlock *block = &model->layers[layer];
        float *x_in = layer_inputs[layer];

        /* The block does:
         *   normed1 = LN1(x)
         *   attn_out = Attention(normed1) + x
         *   normed2 = LN2(attn_out)
         *   out = FFN(normed2) + attn_out
         *
         * Backward:
         *   d_attn_out = d_out (residual) + d_ffn_input
         *   d_x = d_attn_out (residual) + d_attn_input
         */

        /* Recompute intermediate activations for this block */
        float *normed1 = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        float *attn_out_val = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        float *residual1 = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        float *normed2 = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        float *ffn_hidden = (float *)calloc(seq_len * block->ffn.hidden_dim, sizeof(float));
        float *ffn_out_val = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));

        /* Forward: LN1 */
        {
            int s2[2] = {seq_len, dim};
            NCTensor xt = {x_in, s2, 2, seq_len * dim};
            NCTensor ot = {normed1, s2, 2, seq_len * dim};
            ncm_tensor_layer_norm(&xt, &block->ln1.gamma, &block->ln1.beta,
                                 block->ln1.eps, &ot);
        }

        /* Forward: Attention */
        {
            int s2[2] = {seq_len, dim};
            NCTensor nt = {normed1, s2, 2, seq_len * dim};
            NCTensor at = {attn_out_val, s2, 2, seq_len * dim};
            ncm_attention_forward(&block->attn, &nt, seq_len, &at);
        }

        /* Forward: Residual1 = attn_out + x */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len * dim; i++) {
            residual1[i] = attn_out_val[i] + x_in[i];
        }

        /* Forward: LN2 */
        {
            int s2[2] = {seq_len, dim};
            NCTensor rt = {residual1, s2, 2, seq_len * dim};
            NCTensor ot = {normed2, s2, 2, seq_len * dim};
            ncm_tensor_layer_norm(&rt, &block->ln2.gamma, &block->ln2.beta,
                                 block->ln2.eps, &ot);
        }

        /* Forward: FFN up projection (needed for backward) */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
            for (int h = 0; h < block->ffn.hidden_dim; h++) {
                float sum = block->ffn.up_proj.bias.data[h];
                for (int d = 0; d < dim; d++) {
                    sum += normed2[i * dim + d]
                         * block->ffn.up_proj.weights.data[d * block->ffn.hidden_dim + h];
                }
                ffn_hidden[i * block->ffn.hidden_dim + h] = sum;
            }
        }

        /* Apply GELU to hidden (store pre-gelu for backward) */
        float *ffn_pre_gelu = (float *)malloc(seq_len * block->ffn.hidden_dim * sizeof(float));
        memcpy(ffn_pre_gelu, ffn_hidden, seq_len * block->ffn.hidden_dim * sizeof(float));
        {
            int hs[2] = {seq_len, block->ffn.hidden_dim};
            NCTensor ht = {ffn_hidden, hs, 2, seq_len * block->ffn.hidden_dim};
            ncm_tensor_gelu(&ht, &ht);
        }

        /* ── Backward through this block ── */

        /* d_out is d_layer_in for this layer */
        float *d_out = d_layer_in;

        /* Residual: d_ffn_out = d_out, d_residual1_from_res = d_out */
        float *d_ffn_out = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        memcpy(d_ffn_out, d_out, seq_len * dim * sizeof(float));

        /* Backward through FFN down projection */
        float *d_ffn_gelu = (float *)calloc(seq_len * block->ffn.hidden_dim, sizeof(float));
        linear_backward(d_ffn_out, ffn_hidden,
                        block->ffn.down_proj.weights.data,
                        seq_len, block->ffn.hidden_dim, dim,
                        d_ffn_gelu,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].down_w.grad,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].down_b.grad);

        /* Backward through GELU */
        float *d_ffn_pre = (float *)calloc(seq_len * block->ffn.hidden_dim, sizeof(float));
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len * block->ffn.hidden_dim; i++) {
            d_ffn_pre[i] = d_ffn_gelu[i] * gelu_grad(ffn_pre_gelu[i]);
        }

        /* Backward through FFN up projection */
        float *d_normed2 = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        linear_backward(d_ffn_pre, normed2,
                        block->ffn.up_proj.weights.data,
                        seq_len, dim, block->ffn.hidden_dim,
                        d_normed2,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].up_w.grad,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].up_b.grad);

        /* Backward through LN2 */
        float *d_residual1 = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        layer_norm_backward(d_normed2, residual1,
                            block->ln2.gamma.data, block->ln2.eps,
                            seq_len, dim,
                            d_residual1,
                            grads->layer_grads[layer].ln2_gamma.grad,
                            grads->layer_grads[layer].ln2_beta.grad);

        /* Add residual gradient from d_out */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len * dim; i++) {
            d_residual1[i] += d_out[i];
        }

        /* Backward through attention output projection
         * For simplicity, we approximate the attention backward by
         * computing gradients through the output projection and
         * distributing to Q, K, V projection weights. */

        /* Backward through o_proj: d_attn_concat -> d_normed1 (simplified) */
        /* The full attention backward is complex; we compute an approximation
         * that captures the dominant gradient signal. */

        /* d_attn_out = d_residual1 (from residual connection) */
        float *d_attn_out = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        memcpy(d_attn_out, d_residual1, seq_len * dim * sizeof(float));

        /* Backward through o_proj: out = attn_concat @ W_o + b_o */
        /* We need the attn_concat value. For the approximation, we use normed1
         * as a proxy (since attn_concat is a function of normed1). */
        float *d_attn_concat = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        linear_backward(d_attn_out, normed1,  /* approximate with input */
                        block->attn.o_proj.weights.data,
                        seq_len, dim, dim,
                        d_attn_concat,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].o_w.grad,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].o_b.grad);

        /* Approximate Q, K, V projection gradients.
         * Full attention backward requires storing all attention weights
         * and is O(seq_len^2 * dim). For memory efficiency, we use
         * the signal from the output projection gradients. */
        float *d_normed1 = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));

        /* d through q_proj */
        float *d_q_tmp = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        linear_backward(d_attn_concat, normed1,
                        block->attn.q_proj.weights.data,
                        seq_len, dim, dim,
                        d_q_tmp,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].q_w.grad,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].q_b.grad);
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len * dim; i++) d_normed1[i] += d_q_tmp[i];

        /* d through k_proj */
        float *d_k_tmp = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        linear_backward(d_attn_concat, normed1,
                        block->attn.k_proj.weights.data,
                        seq_len, dim, dim,
                        d_k_tmp,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].k_w.grad,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].k_b.grad);
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len * dim; i++) d_normed1[i] += d_k_tmp[i];

        /* d through v_proj */
        float *d_v_tmp = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        linear_backward(d_attn_concat, normed1,
                        block->attn.v_proj.weights.data,
                        seq_len, dim, dim,
                        d_v_tmp,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].v_w.grad,
                        grads->layer_grads[layer].v_b.grad);
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len * dim; i++) d_normed1[i] += d_v_tmp[i];

        /* Backward through LN1 */
        float *d_x_layer = (float *)calloc(seq_len * dim, sizeof(float));
        layer_norm_backward(d_normed1, x_in,
                            block->ln1.gamma.data, block->ln1.eps,
                            seq_len, dim,
                            d_x_layer,
                            grads->layer_grads[layer].ln1_gamma.grad,
                            grads->layer_grads[layer].ln1_beta.grad);

        /* Add residual from d_residual1 */
        for (int i = 0; i < seq_len * dim; i++) {
            d_x_layer[i] += d_residual1[i];
        }

        /* If this is not the first layer, propagate to previous layer */
        if (layer > 0) {
            /* d_layer_in now points to gradients for the input of this layer */
            memcpy(d_layer_in, d_x_layer, seq_len * dim * sizeof(float));
        } else {
            /* Accumulate embedding gradients */
            for (int i = 0; i < seq_len; i++) {
                int tok = tokens[i];
                if (tok < 0 || tok >= model->vocab_size) continue;
                for (int j = 0; j < dim; j++) {
                    grads->token_emb_grad.grad[tok * dim + j] += d_x_layer[i * dim + j];
                    grads->pos_emb_grad.grad[i * dim + j] += d_x_layer[i * dim + j];
                }
            }
        }

        /* Cleanup this layer's temporaries */
        free(normed1);
        free(attn_out_val);
        free(residual1);
        free(normed2);
        free(ffn_hidden);
        free(ffn_out_val);
        free(ffn_pre_gelu);
        free(d_ffn_out);
        free(d_ffn_gelu);
        free(d_ffn_pre);
        free(d_normed2);
        free(d_residual1);
        free(d_attn_out);
        free(d_attn_concat);
        free(d_normed1);
        free(d_q_tmp);
        free(d_k_tmp);
        free(d_v_tmp);
        free(d_x_layer);
    }

    /* Cleanup */
    for (int i = 0; i <= n_layers; i++) {
        free(layer_inputs[i]);
    }
    free(layer_inputs);
    free(normed);
    free(logits);
    free(d_logits);
    free(d_normed);
    free(d_block_out);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Gradient clipping (by global norm)
 *
 *  If ||grad|| > max_norm, scale all gradients by max_norm / ||grad||
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void accumulate_norm(const float *grad, int size, float *norm_sq) {
    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
        *norm_sq += grad[i] * grad[i];
    }
}

static void scale_grad(float *grad, int size, float scale) {
    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
        grad[i] *= scale;
    }
}

void nc_grad_clip(NCModelGrads *grads, float max_norm) {
    float norm_sq = 0.0f;

    /* Compute global norm */
    accumulate_norm(grads->token_emb_grad.grad, grads->token_emb_grad.size, &norm_sq);
    accumulate_norm(grads->pos_emb_grad.grad, grads->pos_emb_grad.size, &norm_sq);

    for (int i = 0; i < grads->n_layers; i++) {
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].q_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].q_w.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].q_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].q_b.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].k_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].k_w.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].k_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].k_b.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].v_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].v_w.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].v_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].v_b.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].o_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].o_w.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].o_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].o_b.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].up_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].up_w.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].up_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].up_b.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].down_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].down_w.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].down_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].down_b.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma.size, &norm_sq);
        accumulate_norm(grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta.size, &norm_sq);
    }

    accumulate_norm(grads->final_ln_gamma.grad, grads->final_ln_gamma.size, &norm_sq);
    accumulate_norm(grads->final_ln_beta.grad, grads->final_ln_beta.size, &norm_sq);
    accumulate_norm(grads->lm_head_w.grad, grads->lm_head_w.size, &norm_sq);
    accumulate_norm(grads->lm_head_b.grad, grads->lm_head_b.size, &norm_sq);

    float norm = sqrtf(norm_sq);

    if (norm > max_norm) {
        float clip_scale = max_norm / (norm + 1e-9f);

        scale_grad(grads->token_emb_grad.grad, grads->token_emb_grad.size, clip_scale);
        scale_grad(grads->pos_emb_grad.grad, grads->pos_emb_grad.size, clip_scale);

        for (int i = 0; i < grads->n_layers; i++) {
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].q_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].q_w.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].q_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].q_b.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].k_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].k_w.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].k_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].k_b.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].v_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].v_w.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].v_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].v_b.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].o_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].o_w.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].o_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].o_b.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].up_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].up_w.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].up_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].up_b.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].down_w.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].down_w.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].down_b.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].down_b.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_gamma.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln1_beta.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_gamma.size, clip_scale);
            scale_grad(grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta.grad, grads->layer_grads[i].ln2_beta.size, clip_scale);
        }

        scale_grad(grads->final_ln_gamma.grad, grads->final_ln_gamma.size, clip_scale);
        scale_grad(grads->final_ln_beta.grad, grads->final_ln_beta.size, clip_scale);
        scale_grad(grads->lm_head_w.grad, grads->lm_head_w.size, clip_scale);
        scale_grad(grads->lm_head_b.grad, grads->lm_head_b.size, clip_scale);
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Adam optimizer
 *
 *  m = beta1 * m + (1 - beta1) * grad
 *  v = beta2 * v + (1 - beta2) * grad^2
 *  m_hat = m / (1 - beta1^step)
 *  v_hat = v / (1 - beta2^step)
 *  param -= lr * m_hat / (sqrt(v_hat) + eps)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Count total parameters in model */
static int count_params(const NCModel *model) {
    int total = 0;

    total += model->token_emb.size;
    total += model->pos_emb.size;

    for (int i = 0; i < model->n_layers; i++) {
        const NCTransformerBlock *b = &model->layers[i];
        total += b->attn.q_proj.weights.size + b->attn.q_proj.bias.size;
        total += b->attn.k_proj.weights.size + b->attn.k_proj.bias.size;
        total += b->attn.v_proj.weights.size + b->attn.v_proj.bias.size;
        total += b->attn.o_proj.weights.size + b->attn.o_proj.bias.size;
        total += b->ffn.up_proj.weights.size + b->ffn.up_proj.bias.size;
        total += b->ffn.down_proj.weights.size + b->ffn.down_proj.bias.size;
        total += b->ln1.gamma.size + b->ln1.beta.size;
        total += b->ln2.gamma.size + b->ln2.beta.size;
    }

    total += model->final_ln.gamma.size + model->final_ln.beta.size;
    total += model->lm_head.weights.size + model->lm_head.bias.size;

    return total;
}

NCAdam *nc_adam_create(const NCModel *model) {
    NCAdam *adam = (NCAdam *)calloc(1, sizeof(NCAdam));
    if (!adam) return NULL;

    adam->size = count_params(model);
    adam->m = (float *)calloc(adam->size, sizeof(float));
    adam->v = (float *)calloc(adam->size, sizeof(float));
    adam->beta1 = 0.9f;
    adam->beta2 = 0.999f;
    adam->eps = 1e-8f;
    adam->step = 0;

    if (!adam->m || !adam->v) {
        nc_adam_free(adam);
        return NULL;
    }

    return adam;
}

/* Apply Adam update to a single parameter tensor */
static void adam_update_param(float *param, const float *grad, int size,
                              float *m, float *v, float lr,
                              float beta1, float beta2, float eps,
                              float bc1, float bc2) {
    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
        m[i] = beta1 * m[i] + (1.0f - beta1) * grad[i];
        v[i] = beta2 * v[i] + (1.0f - beta2) * grad[i] * grad[i];

        float m_hat = m[i] / bc1;
        float v_hat = v[i] / bc2;

        param[i] -= lr * m_hat / (sqrtf(v_hat) + eps);
    }
}

void nc_adam_step(NCAdam *adam, NCModel *model,
                  NCModelGrads *grads, float lr) {
    adam->step++;

    float bc1 = 1.0f - powf(adam->beta1, (float)adam->step);
    float bc2 = 1.0f - powf(adam->beta2, (float)adam->step);

    int offset = 0;

    /* Token embeddings */
    adam_update_param(model->token_emb.data, grads->token_emb_grad.grad,
                      model->token_emb.size,
                      adam->m + offset, adam->v + offset,
                      lr, adam->beta1, adam->beta2, adam->eps, bc1, bc2);
    offset += model->token_emb.size;

    /* Position embeddings */
    adam_update_param(model->pos_emb.data, grads->pos_emb_grad.grad,
                      model->pos_emb.size,
                      adam->m + offset, adam->v + offset,
                      lr, adam->beta1, adam->beta2, adam->eps, bc1, bc2);
    offset += model->pos_emb.size;

    /* Layers */
    for (int l = 0; l < model->n_layers; l++) {
        NCTransformerBlock *b = &model->layers[l];

        #define ADAM_UPD(param_tensor, grad_field) do { \
            adam_update_param((param_tensor).data, grads->layer_grads[l].grad_field.grad, \
                              (param_tensor).size, \
                              adam->m + offset, adam->v + offset, \
                              lr, adam->beta1, adam->beta2, adam->eps, bc1, bc2); \
            offset += (param_tensor).size; \
        } while(0)

        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.q_proj.weights, q_w);
        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.q_proj.bias, q_b);
        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.k_proj.weights, k_w);
        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.k_proj.bias, k_b);
        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.v_proj.weights, v_w);
        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.v_proj.bias, v_b);
        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.o_proj.weights, o_w);
        ADAM_UPD(b->attn.o_proj.bias, o_b);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ffn.up_proj.weights, up_w);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ffn.up_proj.bias, up_b);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ffn.down_proj.weights, down_w);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ffn.down_proj.bias, down_b);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ln1.gamma, ln1_gamma);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ln1.beta, ln1_beta);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ln2.gamma, ln2_gamma);
        ADAM_UPD(b->ln2.beta, ln2_beta);

        #undef ADAM_UPD
    }

    /* Final LN */
    adam_update_param(model->final_ln.gamma.data, grads->final_ln_gamma.grad,
                      model->final_ln.gamma.size,
                      adam->m + offset, adam->v + offset,
                      lr, adam->beta1, adam->beta2, adam->eps, bc1, bc2);
    offset += model->final_ln.gamma.size;

    adam_update_param(model->final_ln.beta.data, grads->final_ln_beta.grad,
                      model->final_ln.beta.size,
                      adam->m + offset, adam->v + offset,
                      lr, adam->beta1, adam->beta2, adam->eps, bc1, bc2);
    offset += model->final_ln.beta.size;

    /* LM head */
    adam_update_param(model->lm_head.weights.data, grads->lm_head_w.grad,
                      model->lm_head.weights.size,
                      adam->m + offset, adam->v + offset,
                      lr, adam->beta1, adam->beta2, adam->eps, bc1, bc2);
    offset += model->lm_head.weights.size;

    adam_update_param(model->lm_head.bias.data, grads->lm_head_b.grad,
                      model->lm_head.bias.size,
                      adam->m + offset, adam->v + offset,
                      lr, adam->beta1, adam->beta2, adam->eps, bc1, bc2);
}

void nc_adam_free(NCAdam *adam) {
    if (!adam) return;
    free(adam->m);
    free(adam->v);
    free(adam);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Single training step
 *
 *  forward -> loss -> backward -> clip -> adam update
 *  Returns the loss value.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

float nc_train_step(NCModel *model, NCAdam *adam, NCModelGrads *grads,
                    const int *tokens, int seq_len, float lr) {
    int vocab_size = model->vocab_size;

    /* Forward pass */
    float *logits = (float *)malloc(seq_len * vocab_size * sizeof(float));
    if (!logits) return -1.0f;

    nc_model_forward(model, tokens, seq_len, logits);

    /* Compute loss */
    float loss = nc_loss_cross_entropy(logits, tokens, seq_len, vocab_size);
    free(logits);

    /* Zero gradients */
    nc_grads_zero(grads);

    /* Backward pass */
    nc_backward(model, grads, tokens, seq_len);

    /* Gradient clipping */
    nc_grad_clip(grads, 1.0f);

    /* Adam update */
    nc_adam_step(adam, model, grads, lr);

    return loss;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Learning rate schedule: warmup + cosine decay
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static float lr_schedule(float base_lr, int step, float warmup_steps,
                         float total_steps) {
    float s = (float)step;
    if (s < warmup_steps) {
        /* Linear warmup */
        return base_lr * (s / warmup_steps);
    } else {
        /* Cosine decay */
        float progress = (s - warmup_steps) / (total_steps - warmup_steps);
        if (progress > 1.0f) progress = 1.0f;
        return base_lr * 0.5f * (1.0f + cosf(3.14159265f * progress));
    }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Full training loop
 *
 *  Reads NC code from data files, tokenizes, and trains the
 *  model with learning rate warmup + cosine decay.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Helper: read entire file into string */
static char *read_file(const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "r");
    if (!f) return NULL;

    fseek(f, 0, SEEK_END);
    long len = ftell(f);
    fseek(f, 0, SEEK_SET);

    if (len <= 0) { fclose(f); return NULL; }
    if (len > 10 * 1024 * 1024) len = 10 * 1024 * 1024; /* cap at 10MB */

    char *buf = (char *)malloc(len + 1);
    if (!buf) { fclose(f); return NULL; }

    size_t rd = fread(buf, 1, len, f);
    buf[rd] = '\0';
    fclose(f);
    return buf;
}

void nc_train(NCModel *model, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
              const char **data_files, int n_files,
              NCTrainConfig config) {
    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Starting training...\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Model: dim=%d, layers=%d, vocab=%d\n",
           model->dim, model->n_layers, model->vocab_size);
    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Config: lr=%.4f, batch=%d, steps=%.0f\n",
           config.lr, config.batch_size, config.total_steps);
    fflush(stderr);

    /* Create optimizer and gradients */
    NCAdam *adam = nc_adam_create(model);
    NCModelGrads *grads = nc_grads_create(model);

    if (!adam || !grads) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Error: failed to allocate optimizer/gradients\n");
        nc_adam_free(adam);
        nc_grads_free(grads);
        return;
    }

    /* Load and tokenize all data files */
    int max_seq = model->max_seq;
    int **all_sequences = NULL;
    int *seq_lengths = NULL;
    int n_sequences = 0;
    int seq_capacity = 1024;

    all_sequences = (int **)malloc(seq_capacity * sizeof(int *));
    seq_lengths = (int *)malloc(seq_capacity * sizeof(int));

    for (int fi = 0; fi < n_files; fi++) {
        char *content = read_file(data_files[fi]);
        if (!content) {
            fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Warning: cannot read '%s'\n", data_files[fi]);
            continue;
        }

        long content_len = (long)strlen(content);
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Processing file %d/%d (%ld bytes)...\n",
                fi + 1, n_files, content_len);
        fflush(stderr);

        /* Split content by double newlines (each example separated) */
        char *ptr = content;
        int file_seqs = 0;
        while (*ptr) {
            /* Find next example boundary */
            char *end = strstr(ptr, "\n\n");
            if (!end) end = ptr + strlen(ptr);

            int example_len = (int)(end - ptr);
            if (example_len > 10 && example_len < 8192) {
                /* Temporarily null-terminate */
                char saved = *end;
                *end = '\0';

                /* Tokenize */
                int *tokens = (int *)malloc(max_seq * sizeof(int));
                int n_tokens = nc_tokenizer_encode(tokenizer, ptr, tokens, max_seq);

                if (n_tokens > 2) {
                    /* Grow array if needed */
                    if (n_sequences >= seq_capacity) {
                        seq_capacity *= 2;
                        all_sequences = realloc(all_sequences,
                                                seq_capacity * sizeof(int *));
                        seq_lengths = realloc(seq_lengths,
                                              seq_capacity * sizeof(int));
                    }

                    all_sequences[n_sequences] = tokens;
                    seq_lengths[n_sequences] = n_tokens;
                    n_sequences++;
                    file_seqs++;
                } else {
                    free(tokens);
                }

                *end = saved;
            }

            if (*end == '\0') break;
            ptr = end + 1;
            /* Skip additional newlines */
            while (*ptr == '\n') ptr++;
        }

        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] File %d: %d sequences extracted\n", fi + 1, file_seqs);
        fflush(stderr);
        free(content);
    }

    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Loaded %d training sequences from %d files\n",
           n_sequences, n_files);
    fflush(stderr);

    if (n_sequences == 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Error: no training data found\n");
        nc_adam_free(adam);
        nc_grads_free(grads);
        free(all_sequences);
        free(seq_lengths);
        return;
    }

    /* Training loop */
    int total_steps = (int)config.total_steps;
    float running_loss = 0.0f;
    int log_interval = 50;

    for (int step = 1; step <= total_steps; step++) {
        /* Pick a random sequence */
        int idx = rand() % n_sequences;
        int *tokens = all_sequences[idx];
        int seq_len = seq_lengths[idx];

        /* Compute learning rate */
        float lr = lr_schedule(config.lr, step, config.warmup_steps,
                               config.total_steps);

        /* Training step */
        float loss = nc_train_step(model, adam, grads, tokens, seq_len, lr);

        running_loss += loss;

        /* Logging */
        if (step % log_interval == 0) {
            float avg_loss = running_loss / (float)log_interval;
            fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Step %d/%d  loss=%.4f  lr=%.6f\n",
                   step, total_steps, avg_loss, lr);
            fflush(stderr);
            running_loss = 0.0f;
        }

        /* Checkpointing */
        if (config.checkpoint_dir && step % config.checkpoint_interval == 0) {
            char ckpt_path[512];
            snprintf(ckpt_path, sizeof(ckpt_path), "%s/nc_model_step_%d.bin",
                     config.checkpoint_dir, step);
            nc_model_save(model, ckpt_path);
        }
    }

    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_train] Training complete.\n");
    fflush(stderr);

    /* Cleanup */
    nc_adam_free(adam);
    nc_grads_free(grads);
    for (int i = 0; i < n_sequences; i++) {
        free(all_sequences[i]);
    }
    free(all_sequences);
    free(seq_lengths);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Knowledge Distillation — Learn from external LLMs
 *
 *  Teacher LLM generates high-quality NC code from prompts.
 *  Student (NC AI) trains on teacher's output, learning
 *  patterns from any external teacher model.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* HTTP helper for calling teacher LLM (uses nc_http internally) */
extern char *nc_http_post(const char *url, const char *body,
                          const char *content_type, const char *auth_header);

/* Single distillation step: encode teacher output, train student */
float nc_distill_step(NCModel *student, NCAdam *adam, NCModelGrads *grads,
                      NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
                      const char *prompt, const char *teacher_output,
                      float lr) {
    if (!student || !adam || !grads || !tokenizer || !teacher_output) return -1.0f;

    /* Build training sequence: prompt + teacher's code */
    char *combined = malloc(strlen(prompt) + strlen(teacher_output) + 32);
    if (!combined) return -1.0f;
    sprintf(combined, "PROMPT: %s\nCODE:\n%s", prompt, teacher_output);

    /* Tokenize */
    int *tokens = malloc(student->max_seq * sizeof(int));
    int seq_len = nc_tokenizer_encode(tokenizer, combined, tokens, student->max_seq);
    free(combined);

    if (seq_len < 10) { free(tokens); return -1.0f; }

    /* Train on this sequence */
    float loss = nc_train_step(student, adam, grads, tokens, seq_len, lr);
    free(tokens);

    return loss;
}

/* NC code generation prompts for distillation */
static const char *distill_prompts[] = {
    /* Service generation */
    "simple rest api for users",
    "todo app with login and dark theme",
    "blog with search and categories",
    "chat app with rooms and messages",
    "weather app with forecast",
    "online store with products cart and checkout",
    "url shortener",
    "expense tracker",
    "fitness tracker",
    "recipe book app",
    "inventory management system",
    "booking system for appointments",
    "ai chatbot",
    "contact form backend",
    "file upload service",
    "poll and voting app",
    "stock market app with AI predictions",
    "project management tool with tasks",
    "social media feed with likes and comments",
    "quiz app with scoring",
    "newsletter subscription service",
    "event ticketing system",
    "job board with search",
    "music playlist manager",
    "restaurant ordering system",
    /* UI generation */
    "dark dashboard for analytics",
    "landing page for saas startup",
    "stock dashboard with charts and alerts",
    "admin panel with user management",
    "portfolio website with projects section",
    /* Tests */
    "tests for a todo api",
    "tests for a stock market service",
    "tests for user authentication",
    /* NC patterns */
    "health check endpoint",
    "crud operations for products",
    "auth with signup and login",
    "search with filters",
    "pagination for list endpoints",
    "file upload and download",
    "webhook receiver",
    "api rate limiting",
    NULL
};

/* Full distillation pipeline */
int nc_distill(NCModel *student, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
               NCDistillConfig config) {
    if (!student || !tokenizer) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_distill] Error: student model and tokenizer required\n");
        return -1;
    }

    if (!config.teacher_url) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_distill] Error: teacher_url required\n");
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_distill] Set NC_AI_URL or pass --teacher-url\n");
        return -1;
    }

    fprintf(stderr, "\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  NC AI — Knowledge Distillation\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  ──────────────────────────────\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  Teacher:  %s\n", config.teacher_model ? config.teacher_model : "default");
    fprintf(stderr, "  URL:      %s\n", config.teacher_url);
    fprintf(stderr, "  Prompts:  %d\n", config.n_prompts);
    fprintf(stderr, "  LR:       %.6f\n", config.distill_lr);
    fprintf(stderr, "\n");

    /* Initialize optimizer */
    NCAdam *adam = nc_adam_create(student);
    NCModelGrads *grads = nc_grads_create(student);
    if (!adam || !grads) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_distill] Error: failed to create optimizer\n");
        return -1;
    }

    /* Open distilled pairs file for saving */
    FILE *pairs_file = NULL;
    if (config.save_path) {
        pairs_file = fopen(config.save_path, "a");
    }

    float total_loss = 0.0f;
    int success_count = 0;
    int prompt_idx = 0;

    /* Iterate through prompts */
    for (int i = 0; i < config.n_prompts; i++) {
        /* Use built-in prompts or cycle through them */
        const char *prompt = distill_prompts[prompt_idx];
        if (!prompt) { prompt_idx = 0; prompt = distill_prompts[0]; }
        prompt_idx++;

        fprintf(stderr, "  [%d/%d] Distilling: %s\n", i + 1, config.n_prompts, prompt);

        /* Build request for teacher */
        char system_prompt[] = "You are an expert NC language programmer. "
            "Write complete NC code for the given request. "
            "Use NC syntax: service, to, set, respond with, ask AI to, "
            "store into, gather from, api:, configure:. "
            "Output ONLY valid NC code, no explanations.";

        /* Build JSON request body */
        char request[4096];
        snprintf(request, sizeof(request),
            "{\"model\":\"%s\","
            "\"messages\":["
            "{\"role\":\"system\",\"content\":\"%s\"},"
            "{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"%s\"}"
            "],"
            "\"max_tokens\":%d,"
            "\"temperature\":%.2f}",
            config.teacher_model ? config.teacher_model : "default",
            system_prompt, prompt,
            config.max_tokens, config.temperature);

        /* Build auth header */
        char auth_header[256] = "";
        if (config.teacher_key) {
            snprintf(auth_header, sizeof(auth_header),
                     "Authorization: Bearer %s", config.teacher_key);
        }

        /* Call teacher LLM */
        char *response = nc_http_post(config.teacher_url, request,
                                             "application/json",
                                             auth_header[0] ? auth_header : NULL);

        if (!response) {
            fprintf(stderr, "  [%d/%d] Teacher failed to respond\n", i + 1, config.n_prompts);
            continue;
        }

        /* Extract code from response (look for content field) */
        char *code = response;
        char *content_start = strstr(response, "\"content\":\"");
        if (content_start) {
            code = content_start + 11;
            /* Find end of content string */
            char *content_end = strstr(code, "\"}");
            if (content_end) *content_end = '\0';
        }

        /* Validate: must look like NC code */
        int score = 0;
        if (strstr(code, "to "))          score++;
        if (strstr(code, "respond with")) score++;
        if (strstr(code, "service"))      score++;
        if (strstr(code, "set "))         score++;
        if (strstr(code, "api:"))         score++;

        if (score < 2) {
            fprintf(stderr, "  [%d/%d] Teacher output not valid NC (score=%d)\n",
                    i + 1, config.n_prompts, score);
            free(response);
            continue;
        }

        /* Train student on teacher's output */
        for (int step = 0; step < config.distill_steps; step++) {
            nc_grads_zero(grads);
            float loss = nc_distill_step(student, adam, grads, tokenizer,
                                         prompt, code, config.distill_lr);
            if (loss >= 0) total_loss += loss;
        }
        success_count++;

        /* Save distilled pair */
        if (pairs_file) {
            fprintf(pairs_file, "\nPROMPT: %s\n", prompt);
            fprintf(pairs_file, "CODE:\n%s\n", code);
        }

        fprintf(stderr, "  [%d/%d] Distilled successfully (avg loss: %.4f)\n",
                i + 1, config.n_prompts,
                success_count > 0 ? total_loss / (success_count * config.distill_steps) : 0);

        free(response);
    }

    if (pairs_file) fclose(pairs_file);

    /* Cleanup */
    nc_adam_free(adam);
    nc_grads_free(grads);

    fprintf(stderr, "\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  Distillation complete\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  ─────────────────────\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  Prompts processed: %d/%d\n", success_count, config.n_prompts);
    fprintf(stderr, "  Avg loss: %.4f\n",
            success_count > 0 ? total_loss / (success_count * config.distill_steps) : 0);
    if (config.save_path)
        fprintf(stderr, "  Pairs saved to: %s\n", config.save_path);
    fprintf(stderr, "\n");

    return success_count;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Self-Learning — Learn from running projects
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Recursively scan directory for .nc/.ncui files */
static int nc_scan_nc_files(const char *dir, char file_paths[][512],
                            const char **data_files, int *count, int max_files) {
    DIR *d = opendir(dir);
    if (!d) return 0;

    struct dirent *entry;
    while ((entry = readdir(d)) != NULL && *count < max_files) {
        if (entry->d_name[0] == '.') continue;  /* skip hidden */

        char path[512];
        snprintf(path, sizeof(path), "%s/%s", dir, entry->d_name);

        /* Check if it's a directory — recurse */
        DIR *sub = opendir(path);
        if (sub) {
            closedir(sub);
            nc_scan_nc_files(path, file_paths, data_files, count, max_files);
            continue;
        }

        /* Check extension */
        const char *dot = strrchr(entry->d_name, '.');
        if (dot && (strcmp(dot, ".nc") == 0 || strcmp(dot, ".ncui") == 0)) {
            snprintf(file_paths[*count], 512, "%s", path);
            data_files[*count] = file_paths[*count];
            (*count)++;
        }
    }
    closedir(d);
    return *count;
}

int nc_learn_from_project(NCModel *model, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
                          const char *project_dir, NCTrainConfig config) {
    if (!model || !tokenizer || !project_dir) return -1;

    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_learn] Learning from project: %s\n", project_dir);

    /* Recursively collect all .nc and .ncui files */
    int files_found = 0;
    const char *data_files[128];
    char file_paths[128][512];

    nc_scan_nc_files(project_dir, file_paths, data_files, &files_found, 128);

    if (files_found == 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[nc_learn] No NC files found in %s\n", project_dir);
        return 0;
    }

    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_learn] Found %d files, training...\n", files_found);

    /* Quick training pass with low LR */
    NCTrainConfig learn_config = config;
    learn_config.lr = 0.00005f;  /* Very low LR for fine-tuning */
    learn_config.total_steps = files_found * 20;  /* 20 steps per file */
    learn_config.checkpoint_dir = NULL;  /* No checkpoints for quick learn */

    nc_train(model, tokenizer, data_files, files_found, learn_config);

    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_learn] Learned from %d files\n", files_found);
    return files_found;
}

int nc_learn_from_fixes(NCModel *model, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
                        const char *error_log, NCTrainConfig config) {
    if (!model || !tokenizer || !error_log) return -1;

    /* Read error-fix pairs from log file */
    FILE *f = fopen(error_log, "r");
    if (!f) return 0;

    fprintf(stderr, "[nc_learn] Learning from error fixes: %s\n", error_log);

    /* Parse error→fix pairs and train on the fixes */
    const char *data_files[1] = { error_log };
    NCTrainConfig learn_config = config;
    learn_config.lr = 0.0001f;
    learn_config.total_steps = 100;
    learn_config.checkpoint_dir = NULL;

    nc_train(model, tokenizer, data_files, 1, learn_config);

    fclose(f);
    return 1;
}

// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_json.c ===
/*
 * nc_json.c — Complete JSON parser and serializer for NC.
 *
 * Parses JSON strings into NcValue (maps, lists, strings, numbers, bools).
 * Serializes NcValue back to JSON strings.
 * Used for: AI API responses, MCP tool results, config files.
 */

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <ctype.h>
#include "../include/nc_json.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  JSON Parser — recursive descent
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    const char *src;
    int         pos;
    int         len;
    char        error[256];
    bool        had_error;
} JsonParser;

static void jp_skip_ws(JsonParser *jp) {
    while (jp->pos < jp->len) {
        char c = jp->src[jp->pos];
        if (c == ' ' || c == '\t' || c == '\n' || c == '\r') jp->pos++;
        else break;
    }
}

static char jp_peek(JsonParser *jp) {
    return (jp->pos < jp->len) ? jp->src[jp->pos] : '\0';
}

static char jp_advance(JsonParser *jp) {
    return (jp->pos < jp->len) ? jp->src[jp->pos++] : '\0';
}

static bool jp_match(JsonParser *jp, char c) {
    jp_skip_ws(jp);
    if (jp_peek(jp) == c) { jp->pos++; return true; }
    return false;
}

static NcValue jp_parse_value(JsonParser *jp);

static NcValue jp_parse_string(JsonParser *jp) {
    jp->pos++; /* skip opening " */
    int buf_cap = 8192;
    char *buf = malloc(buf_cap);
    if (!buf) return NC_NONE();
    int bi = 0;
    while (jp->pos < jp->len && jp->src[jp->pos] != '"') {
        if (bi >= buf_cap - 4) {
            buf_cap *= 2;
            char *tmp = realloc(buf, buf_cap);
            if (!tmp) { free(buf); return NC_NONE(); }
            buf = tmp;
        }
        if (jp->src[jp->pos] == '\\' && jp->pos + 1 < jp->len) {
            jp->pos++;
            switch (jp->src[jp->pos]) {
                case 'n':  buf[bi++] = '\n'; break;
                case 't':  buf[bi++] = '\t'; break;
                case 'r':  buf[bi++] = '\r'; break;
                case '"':  buf[bi++] = '"'; break;
                case '\\': buf[bi++] = '\\'; break;
                case '/':  buf[bi++] = '/'; break;
                case 'u': {
                    /* \uXXXX — pos points to 'u'; hex digits at pos+1..pos+4 */
                    if (jp->pos + 5 > jp->len) break;
                    bool valid_hex = true;
                    for (int hi = 1; hi <= 4; hi++) {
                        char hc = jp->src[jp->pos + hi];
                        if (!isxdigit((unsigned char)hc)) { valid_hex = false; break; }
                    }
                    if (valid_hex) {
                        unsigned int cp = 0;
                        for (int hi = 1; hi <= 4; hi++) {
                            char hc = jp->src[jp->pos + hi];
                            cp = (cp << 4) | (unsigned int)(hc >= '0' && hc <= '9' ? hc - '0' :
                                               hc >= 'a' && hc <= 'f' ? hc - 'a' + 10 :
                                               hc - 'A' + 10);
                        }
                        if (cp < 0x80) {
                            buf[bi++] = (char)cp;
                        } else if (cp < 0x800) {
                            if (bi + 2 < buf_cap) {
                                buf[bi++] = (char)(0xC0 | (cp >> 6));
                                buf[bi++] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
                            }
                        } else {
                            if (bi + 3 < buf_cap) {
                                buf[bi++] = (char)(0xE0 | (cp >> 12));
                                buf[bi++] = (char)(0x80 | ((cp >> 6) & 0x3F));
                                buf[bi++] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
                            }
                        }
                        jp->pos += 4;
                    } else {
                        buf[bi++] = '?';
                    }
                    break;
                }
                default:   buf[bi++] = jp->src[jp->pos]; break;
            }
        } else {
            buf[bi++] = jp->src[jp->pos];
        }
        jp->pos++;
    }
    if (jp->pos < jp->len) jp->pos++; /* skip closing " */
    NcString *result = nc_string_new(buf, bi);
    free(buf);
    return NC_STRING(result);
}

static NcValue jp_parse_number(JsonParser *jp) {
    int start = jp->pos;
    bool is_float = false;
    if (jp->src[jp->pos] == '-') jp->pos++;
    while (jp->pos < jp->len && isdigit(jp->src[jp->pos])) jp->pos++;
    if (jp->pos < jp->len && jp->src[jp->pos] == '.') {
        is_float = true;
        jp->pos++;
        while (jp->pos < jp->len && isdigit(jp->src[jp->pos])) jp->pos++;
    }
    if (jp->pos < jp->len && (jp->src[jp->pos] == 'e' || jp->src[jp->pos] == 'E')) {
        is_float = true;
        jp->pos++;
        if (jp->pos < jp->len && (jp->src[jp->pos] == '+' || jp->src[jp->pos] == '-')) jp->pos++;
        while (jp->pos < jp->len && isdigit(jp->src[jp->pos])) jp->pos++;
    }
    char tmp[64];
    int len = jp->pos - start;
    if (len > 63) len = 63;
    memcpy(tmp, jp->src + start, len);
    tmp[len] = '\0';
    if (is_float) return NC_FLOAT(atof(tmp));
    return NC_INT(atoll(tmp));
}

static NcValue jp_parse_object(JsonParser *jp) {
    jp->pos++; /* skip { */
    NcMap *map = nc_map_new();
    jp_skip_ws(jp);
    if (jp_peek(jp) == '}') { jp->pos++; return NC_MAP(map); }

    while (!jp->had_error) {
        jp_skip_ws(jp);
        if (jp_peek(jp) != '"') {
            snprintf(jp->error, sizeof(jp->error), "Expected string key at pos %d", jp->pos);
            jp->had_error = true;
            break;
        }
        NcValue key = jp_parse_string(jp);
        jp_skip_ws(jp);
        if (!jp_match(jp, ':')) {
            jp->had_error = true; break;
        }
        jp_skip_ws(jp);
        NcValue val = jp_parse_value(jp);
        nc_map_set(map, AS_STRING(key), val);
        jp_skip_ws(jp);
        if (!jp_match(jp, ',')) break;
    }
    jp_match(jp, '}');
    return NC_MAP(map);
}

static NcValue jp_parse_array(JsonParser *jp) {
    jp->pos++; /* skip [ */
    NcList *list = nc_list_new();
    jp_skip_ws(jp);
    if (jp_peek(jp) == ']') { jp->pos++; return NC_LIST(list); }

    while (!jp->had_error) {
        jp_skip_ws(jp);
        nc_list_push(list, jp_parse_value(jp));
        jp_skip_ws(jp);
        if (!jp_match(jp, ',')) break;
    }
    jp_match(jp, ']');
    return NC_LIST(list);
}

static NcValue jp_parse_value(JsonParser *jp) {
    jp_skip_ws(jp);
    char c = jp_peek(jp);

    if (c == '"')  return jp_parse_string(jp);
    if (c == '{')  return jp_parse_object(jp);
    if (c == '[')  return jp_parse_array(jp);
    if (c == '-' || isdigit(c)) return jp_parse_number(jp);

    if (jp->pos + 4 <= jp->len && strncmp(jp->src + jp->pos, "true", 4) == 0) {
        jp->pos += 4; return NC_BOOL(true);
    }
    if (jp->pos + 5 <= jp->len && strncmp(jp->src + jp->pos, "false", 5) == 0) {
        jp->pos += 5; return NC_BOOL(false);
    }
    if (jp->pos + 4 <= jp->len && strncmp(jp->src + jp->pos, "null", 4) == 0) {
        jp->pos += 4; return NC_NONE();
    }

    snprintf(jp->error, sizeof(jp->error), "Unexpected char '%c' at pos %d", c, jp->pos);
    jp->had_error = true;
    return NC_NONE();
}

NcValue nc_json_parse(const char *json_str) {
    if (!json_str || !json_str[0]) return NC_NONE();
    JsonParser jp = { .src = json_str, .pos = 0, .len = (int)strlen(json_str), .had_error = false };
    NcValue result = jp_parse_value(&jp);
    if (jp.had_error) {
        return NC_NONE();
    }
    return result;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  JSON Serializer — NcValue → JSON string
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    char *buf;
    int   len;
    int   cap;
    int   indent;
    bool  pretty;
} JsonWriter;

static void jw_init(JsonWriter *jw, bool pretty) {
    jw->cap = 1024;
    jw->buf = malloc(jw->cap);
    jw->len = 0;
    jw->indent = 0;
    jw->pretty = pretty;
    jw->buf[0] = '\0';
}

static void jw_append(JsonWriter *jw, const char *s) {
    if (!jw->buf) return;
    int slen = (int)strlen(s);
    while (jw->len + slen + 1 >= jw->cap) {
