    switch (t->type) {
        case TOK_GATHER:    return parse_gather(p);
        case TOK_ASK:       return parse_ask_ai(p);
        case TOK_IF:        return parse_if(p);
        case TOK_WHILE:     return parse_while(p);
        case TOK_REPEAT:    return parse_repeat(p);
        case TOK_MATCH:     return parse_match(p);
        case TOK_SET:       return parse_set(p);
        case TOK_RESPOND:   return parse_respond(p);
        case TOK_RUN:       return parse_run(p);
        case TOK_LOG:       return parse_log(p);
        case TOK_SHOW:      return parse_show(p);
        case TOK_NOTIFY: case TOK_SEND: return parse_notify(p);
        case TOK_WAIT:      return parse_wait(p);
        case TOK_STORE:     return parse_store(p);
        case TOK_EMIT:      return parse_emit(p);
        case TOK_APPLY:     return parse_apply(p);
        case TOK_CHECK:     return parse_check(p);
        case TOK_TRY:       return parse_try(p);
        case TOK_ASSERT:    return parse_assert(p);
        case TOK_TEST:      return parse_test_block(p);
        case TOK_AWAIT:     return parse_await(p);
        case TOK_YIELD:     return parse_yield(p);
        case TOK_STOP:      advance(p); return nc_ast_new(NODE_STOP, t->line);
        case TOK_SKIP:      advance(p); return nc_ast_new(NODE_SKIP, t->line);
        default: {
            /* ── Natural English aliases ──────────────────── */
            
            /* "add VALUE to VARIABLE" → set var to var + value */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 3 && memcmp(t->start, "add", 3) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                expect(p, TOK_TO, "to");
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "variable name");
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SET, start->line);
                node->as.set_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                node->as.set_stmt.field = NULL;
                NcASTNode *math = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, start->line);
                math->as.math.left = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                math->as.math.left->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                math->as.math.right = val;
                math->as.math.op = '+';
                node->as.set_stmt.value = math;
                return node;
            }
            
            /* "increase VARIABLE by VALUE" → set var to var + value */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 8 && memcmp(t->start, "increase", 8) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "variable name");
                /* accept "by" as identifier */
                if (check(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER)) advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SET, start->line);
                node->as.set_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                node->as.set_stmt.field = NULL;
                NcASTNode *math = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, start->line);
                math->as.math.left = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                math->as.math.left->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                math->as.math.right = val;
                math->as.math.op = '+';
                node->as.set_stmt.value = math;
                return node;
            }
            
            /* "decrease VARIABLE by VALUE" → set var to var - value */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 8 && memcmp(t->start, "decrease", 8) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "variable name");
                if (check(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER)) advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SET, start->line);
                node->as.set_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                node->as.set_stmt.field = NULL;
                NcASTNode *math = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, start->line);
                math->as.math.left = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                math->as.math.left->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                math->as.math.right = val;
                math->as.math.op = '-';
                node->as.set_stmt.value = math;
                return node;
            }
            
            /* "remove VALUE from LIST" → call node: remove(list, value) */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 6 && memcmp(t->start, "remove", 6) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                expect(p, TOK_FROM, "from");
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "list name");
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_EXPR_STMT, start->line);
                NcASTNode *call = nc_ast_new(NODE_CALL, start->line);
                call->as.call.name = nc_string_from_cstr("remove");
                call->as.call.args = calloc(2, sizeof(NcASTNode *));
                NcASTNode *list_ref = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                list_ref->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                call->as.call.args[0] = list_ref;
                call->as.call.args[1] = val;
                call->as.call.arg_count = 2;
                node->as.single_expr.value = call;
                return node;
            }

            /* "push VALUE to LIST" → append (synonym from JS/Ruby) */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 4 && memcmp(t->start, "push", 4) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                expect(p, TOK_TO, "to");
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "list name");
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_APPEND, start->line);
                node->as.append_stmt.value = val;
                node->as.append_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                return node;
            }

            /* "insert VALUE into LIST" → append (synonym) */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 6 && memcmp(t->start, "insert", 6) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                if (match(p, TOK_INTO) || match(p, TOK_TO)) { /* accept "into" or "to" */ }
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "list name");
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_APPEND, start->line);
                node->as.append_stmt.value = val;
                node->as.append_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                return node;
            }

            /* "delete VALUE from LIST" → remove (synonym) */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 6 && memcmp(t->start, "delete", 6) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                expect(p, TOK_FROM, "from");
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "list name");
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_EXPR_STMT, start->line);
                NcASTNode *call = nc_ast_new(NODE_CALL, start->line);
                call->as.call.name = nc_string_from_cstr("remove");
                call->as.call.args = calloc(2, sizeof(NcASTNode *));
                NcASTNode *list_ref = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                list_ref->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                call->as.call.args[0] = list_ref;
                call->as.call.args[1] = val;
                call->as.call.arg_count = 2;
                node->as.single_expr.value = call;
                return node;
            }

            /* "subtract VALUE from VARIABLE" → set var to var - value */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 8 && memcmp(t->start, "subtract", 8) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                expect(p, TOK_FROM, "from");
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "variable name");
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SET, start->line);
                node->as.set_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                node->as.set_stmt.field = NULL;
                NcASTNode *math = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, start->line);
                math->as.math.left = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                math->as.math.left->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                math->as.math.right = val;
                math->as.math.op = '-';
                node->as.set_stmt.value = math;
                return node;
            }

            /* "multiply VARIABLE by VALUE" → set var to var * value */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 8 && memcmp(t->start, "multiply", 8) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "variable name");
                if (check(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER)) advance(p); /* skip "by" */
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SET, start->line);
                node->as.set_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                node->as.set_stmt.field = NULL;
                NcASTNode *math = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, start->line);
                math->as.math.left = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                math->as.math.left->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                math->as.math.right = val;
                math->as.math.op = '*';
                node->as.set_stmt.value = math;
                return node;
            }

            /* "divide VARIABLE by VALUE" → set var to var / value */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 6 && memcmp(t->start, "divide", 6) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "variable name");
                if (check(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER)) advance(p); /* skip "by" */
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SET, start->line);
                node->as.set_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                node->as.set_stmt.field = NULL;
                NcASTNode *math = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, start->line);
                math->as.math.left = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, start->line);
                math->as.math.left->as.ident.name = tok_string(target);
                math->as.math.right = val;
                math->as.math.op = '/';
                node->as.set_stmt.value = math;
                return node;
            }

            /* "append VALUE to LIST" */
            if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER && t->length == 6 && memcmp(t->start, "append", 6) == 0) {
                NcToken *start = advance(p);
                NcASTNode *val = parse_expression(p);
                expect(p, TOK_TO, "to");
                NcToken *target = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "list name");
                NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_APPEND, start->line);
                node->as.append_stmt.value = val;
                node->as.append_stmt.target = tok_string(target);
                return node;
            }
            
            NcASTNode *expr = parse_expression(p);
            NcASTNode *stmt = nc_ast_new(NODE_EXPR_STMT, t->line);
            stmt->as.single_expr.value = expr;
            return stmt;
        }
    }
}

/* ── Expressions (precedence climbing) ─────────────────────── */

static NcASTNode *parse_primary(NcParser *p) {
    NcToken *t = cur(p);

    if (t->type == TOK_INTEGER) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_INT_LIT, t->line);
        n->as.int_lit.value = t->literal.int_val;
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_FLOAT_LIT) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_FLOAT_LIT, t->line);
        n->as.float_lit.value = t->literal.float_val;
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_STRING) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_STRING_LIT, t->line);
        n->as.string_lit.value = tok_string(t);
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_TRUE || t->type == TOK_FALSE) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_BOOL_LIT, t->line);
        n->as.bool_lit.value = (t->type == TOK_TRUE);
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_NONE_LIT) {
        advance(p);
        return nc_ast_new(NODE_NONE_LIT, t->line);
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_TEMPLATE) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_TEMPLATE, t->line);
        n->as.template_lit.expr = tok_string(t);
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_IDENTIFIER || t->type == TOK_EVENT) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, t->line);
        n->as.ident.name = tok_string(t);
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_LBRACKET) {
        advance(p);
        skip_newlines(p);
        while (check(p, TOK_INDENT)) { advance(p); skip_newlines(p); }
        int cap = 8, count = 0;
        NcASTNode **elems = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);
        while (!check(p, TOK_RBRACKET) && !at_end(p) && !p->had_error) {
            if (check(p, TOK_NEWLINE)) { advance(p); continue; }
            if (check(p, TOK_INDENT)) { advance(p); continue; }
            if (check(p, TOK_DEDENT)) { advance(p); continue; }
            if (check(p, TOK_COMMA)) { advance(p); continue; }
            if (count >= cap) { cap *= 2; NcASTNode **tmp = realloc(elems, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap); if (!tmp) { p->had_error = true; break; } elems = tmp; }
            elems[count++] = parse_expression(p);
            match(p, TOK_COMMA);
            skip_newlines(p);
            while (check(p, TOK_INDENT) || check(p, TOK_DEDENT)) { advance(p); skip_newlines(p); }
        }
        expect(p, TOK_RBRACKET, "]");
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_LIST_LIT, t->line);
        n->as.list_lit.elements = elems;
        n->as.list_lit.count = count;
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_LBRACE) {
        advance(p);
        skip_newlines(p);
        while (check(p, TOK_INDENT)) { advance(p); skip_newlines(p); }
        int cap = 8, count = 0;
        NcString **keys = malloc(sizeof(NcString *) * cap);
        NcASTNode **vals = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);
        while (!check(p, TOK_RBRACE) && !at_end(p) && !p->had_error) {
            if (check(p, TOK_NEWLINE)) { advance(p); continue; }
            if (check(p, TOK_INDENT)) { advance(p); continue; }
            if (check(p, TOK_DEDENT)) { advance(p); continue; }
            if (check(p, TOK_COMMA)) { advance(p); continue; }
            NcToken *key_tok = cur(p);
            NcString *key = tok_string(key_tok);
            advance(p);
            expect(p, TOK_COLON, ":");
            NcASTNode *val_expr = parse_expression(p);
            if (!val_expr) { nc_string_free(key); break; }
            if (count >= cap) {
                cap *= 2;
                NcString **ktmp = realloc(keys, sizeof(NcString *) * cap);
                NcASTNode **vtmp = realloc(vals, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);
                if (!ktmp || !vtmp) { if (ktmp) keys = ktmp; if (vtmp) vals = vtmp; p->had_error = true; nc_string_free(key); break; }
                keys = ktmp; vals = vtmp;
            }
            keys[count] = key;
            vals[count] = val_expr;
            count++;
            match(p, TOK_COMMA);
            skip_newlines(p);
            while (check(p, TOK_INDENT) || check(p, TOK_DEDENT)) { advance(p); skip_newlines(p); }
        }
        expect(p, TOK_RBRACE, "}");
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_MAP_LIT, t->line);
        n->as.map_lit.keys = keys;
        n->as.map_lit.values = vals;
        n->as.map_lit.count = count;
        return n;
    }
    if (t->type == TOK_LPAREN) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *expr = parse_expression(p);
        expect(p, TOK_RPAREN, ")");
        return expr;
    }

    /* Fallback: treat keyword as identifier */
    advance(p);
    NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_IDENT, t->line);
    n->as.ident.name = tok_string(t);
    return n;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_postfix(NcParser *p) {
    NcASTNode *expr = parse_primary(p);
    while (true) {
        if (check(p, TOK_DOT)) {
            advance(p);
            NcToken *member = advance(p);
            NcASTNode *dot = nc_ast_new(NODE_DOT, member->line);
            dot->as.dot.object = expr;
            dot->as.dot.member = tok_string(member);
            expr = dot;
        } else if (check(p, TOK_LBRACKET)) {
            advance(p);

            /* Check for slice: x[start:end], x[:end], x[start:], x[:] */
            if (check(p, TOK_COLON)) {
                /* x[:end] or x[:] */
                advance(p);
                NcASTNode *end_expr = NULL;
                if (!check(p, TOK_RBRACKET))
                    end_expr = parse_expression(p);
                expect(p, TOK_RBRACKET, "]");
                NcASTNode *slice_node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SLICE, expr->line);
                slice_node->as.slice.object = expr;
                slice_node->as.slice.start = NULL;
                slice_node->as.slice.end = end_expr;
                expr = slice_node;
            } else {
                NcASTNode *idx = parse_expression(p);
                if (check(p, TOK_COLON)) {
                    /* x[start:end] or x[start:] */
                    advance(p);
                    NcASTNode *end_expr = NULL;
                    if (!check(p, TOK_RBRACKET))
                        end_expr = parse_expression(p);
                    expect(p, TOK_RBRACKET, "]");
                    NcASTNode *slice_node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SLICE, expr->line);
                    slice_node->as.slice.object = expr;
                    slice_node->as.slice.start = idx;
                    slice_node->as.slice.end = end_expr;
                    expr = slice_node;
                } else {
                    /* Normal index: x[idx] */
                    expect(p, TOK_RBRACKET, "]");
                    NcASTNode *index_node = nc_ast_new(NODE_INDEX, expr->line);
                    index_node->as.math.left = expr;
                    index_node->as.math.right = idx;
                    expr = index_node;
                }
            }
        } else if (check(p, TOK_LPAREN)) {
            advance(p);
            int cap = 4, count = 0;
            NcASTNode **args = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);
            while (!check(p, TOK_RPAREN) && !at_end(p)) {
                if (count >= cap) { cap *= 2; args = realloc(args, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap); }
                args[count++] = parse_expression(p);
                match(p, TOK_COMMA);
            }
            expect(p, TOK_RPAREN, ")");
            NcString *name = NULL;
            if (expr->type == NODE_IDENT) name = nc_string_ref(expr->as.ident.name);
            else name = nc_string_from_cstr("anonymous");
            NcASTNode *call = nc_ast_new(NODE_CALL, expr->line);
            call->as.call.name = name;
            call->as.call.args = args;
            call->as.call.arg_count = count;
            expr = call;
        } else break;
    }
    return expr;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_unary(NcParser *p) {
    if (match(p, TOK_NOT)) {
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_NOT, cur(p)->line);
        n->as.logic.left = parse_unary(p);
        return n;
    }
    if (check(p, TOK_MINUS)) {
        advance(p);
        NcASTNode *operand = parse_unary(p);
        NcASTNode *zero = nc_ast_new(NODE_INT_LIT, operand->line);
        zero->as.int_lit.value = 0;
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, operand->line);
        n->as.math.left = zero;
        n->as.math.right = operand;
        n->as.math.op = '-';
        return n;
    }
    return parse_postfix(p);
}

static NcASTNode *parse_multiplication(NcParser *p) {
    NcASTNode *left = parse_unary(p);
    while (check(p, TOK_STAR) || check(p, TOK_SLASH) || check(p, TOK_PERCENT)) {
        NcToken *op_tok = advance(p);
        char op = op_tok->type == TOK_STAR ? '*' : op_tok->type == TOK_PERCENT ? '%' : '/';
        NcASTNode *right = parse_unary(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, left->line);
        n->as.math.left = left; n->as.math.right = right; n->as.math.op = op;
        left = n;
    }
    return left;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_addition(NcParser *p) {
    NcASTNode *left = parse_multiplication(p);
    while (check(p, TOK_PLUS) || check(p, TOK_MINUS)) {
        char op = (advance(p)->type == TOK_PLUS) ? '+' : '-';
        NcASTNode *right = parse_multiplication(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_MATH, left->line);
        n->as.math.left = left; n->as.math.right = right; n->as.math.op = op;
        left = n;
    }
    return left;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_comparison(NcParser *p) {
    NcASTNode *left = parse_addition(p);

    if (match(p, TOK_IS)) {
        bool negated = match(p, TOK_NOT);
        const char *op = "equal";
        /* "is empty" → len(x) == 0 */
        if (check(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER) && cur(p)->length == 5 && memcmp(cur(p)->start, "empty", 5) == 0) {
            advance(p);
            NcASTNode *len_call = nc_ast_new(NODE_CALL, left->line);
            len_call->as.call.name = nc_string_from_cstr("len");
            len_call->as.call.args = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *));
            len_call->as.call.args[0] = left;
            len_call->as.call.arg_count = 1;
            NcASTNode *zero = nc_ast_new(NODE_INT_LIT, left->line);
            zero->as.int_lit.value = 0;
            NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_COMPARISON, left->line);
            n->as.comparison.left = len_call;
            n->as.comparison.right = zero;
            n->as.comparison.op = nc_string_from_cstr(negated ? "not_equal" : "equal");
            return n;
        }
        
        /* "is positive" → x > 0 */
        if (!negated && check(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER) && cur(p)->length == 8 && memcmp(cur(p)->start, "positive", 8) == 0) {
            advance(p);
            NcASTNode *zero = nc_ast_new(NODE_INT_LIT, left->line);
            zero->as.int_lit.value = 0;
            NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_COMPARISON, left->line);
            n->as.comparison.left = left;
            n->as.comparison.right = zero;
            n->as.comparison.op = nc_string_from_cstr("above");
            return n;
        }
        
        /* "is negative" → x < 0 */
        if (!negated && check(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER) && cur(p)->length == 8 && memcmp(cur(p)->start, "negative", 8) == 0) {
            advance(p);
            NcASTNode *zero = nc_ast_new(NODE_INT_LIT, left->line);
            zero->as.int_lit.value = 0;
            NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_COMPARISON, left->line);
            n->as.comparison.left = left;
            n->as.comparison.right = zero;
            n->as.comparison.op = nc_string_from_cstr("below");
            return n;
        }
        if (match(p, TOK_IN)) {
            op = negated ? "not_in" : "in";
        } else if (match(p, TOK_ABOVE) || match(p, TOK_GREATER)) { match(p, TOK_THAN); op = negated ? "below" : "above"; }
        else if (match(p, TOK_BELOW) || match(p, TOK_LESS)) { match(p, TOK_THAN); op = negated ? "above" : "below"; }
        else if (match(p, TOK_EQUAL)) { match(p, TOK_TO); op = negated ? "not_equal" : "equal"; }
        else if (match(p, TOK_AT)) {
            if (match(p, TOK_LEAST)) op = negated ? "below" : "at_least";
            else if (match(p, TOK_MOST)) op = negated ? "above" : "at_most";
        } else {
            op = negated ? "not_equal" : "equal";
        }
        NcASTNode *right = parse_addition(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_COMPARISON, left->line);
        n->as.comparison.left = left;
        n->as.comparison.right = right;
        n->as.comparison.op = nc_string_from_cstr(op);
        return n;
    }
    return left;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_and(NcParser *p) {
    NcASTNode *left = parse_comparison(p);
    while (match(p, TOK_AND)) {
        NcASTNode *right = parse_comparison(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_LOGIC, left->line);
        n->as.logic.left = left; n->as.logic.right = right;
        n->as.logic.op = nc_string_from_cstr("and");
        left = n;
    }
    return left;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_or(NcParser *p) {
    NcASTNode *left = parse_and(p);
    while (match(p, TOK_OR)) {
        NcASTNode *right = parse_and(p);
        NcASTNode *n = nc_ast_new(NODE_LOGIC, left->line);
        n->as.logic.left = left; n->as.logic.right = right;
        n->as.logic.op = nc_string_from_cstr("or");
        left = n;
    }
    return left;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_expression(NcParser *p) {
    if (++p->depth > 200) {
        if (!p->had_error) {
            snprintf(p->error_msg, sizeof(p->error_msg),
                "Line %d: Expression nesting too deep (max 200 levels).", cur(p)->line);
            p->had_error = true;
        }
        p->depth--;
        return nc_ast_new(NODE_NONE_LIT, cur(p)->line);
    }
    NcASTNode *result = parse_or(p);
    p->depth--;
    return result;
}

/* ── API block ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */

static void parse_api(NcParser *p, NcASTNode *program) {
    advance(p); /* api */
    match(p, TOK_COLON);
    skip_newlines(p);

    int cap = 16, count = program->as.program.route_count;
    if (!program->as.program.routes)
        program->as.program.routes = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);

    if (match(p, TOK_INDENT)) {
        skip_newlines(p);
        while (!check(p, TOK_DEDENT) && !at_end(p) && !p->had_error) {
            if (check(p, TOK_NEWLINE)) { advance(p); continue; }
            NcToken *method_tok = cur(p);
            const char *method = "GET";
            switch (method_tok->type) {
                case TOK_HTTP_GET: method = "GET"; break;
                case TOK_HTTP_POST: method = "POST"; break;
                case TOK_HTTP_PUT: method = "PUT"; break;
                case TOK_HTTP_DELETE: method = "DELETE"; break;
                case TOK_HTTP_PATCH: method = "PATCH"; break;
                default:
                    NC_WARN("Line %d: '%.*s' is not a valid HTTP method "
                            "(expected GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, or PATCH); defaulting to GET",
                            method_tok->line, method_tok->length, method_tok->start);
                    break;
            }
            advance(p);

            /* Read path */
            char path[1024] = {0};
            while (!check(p, TOK_RUNS) && !check(p, TOK_DOES) &&
                   !check(p, TOK_NEWLINE) && !at_end(p)) {
                NcToken *pt = advance(p);
                size_t rem = sizeof(path) - strlen(path) - 1;
                if (rem > 0) {
                    size_t copy = rem < (size_t)pt->length ? rem : (size_t)pt->length;
                    strncat(path, pt->start, copy);
                }
            }
            match(p, TOK_RUNS); match(p, TOK_DOES);
            NcToken *handler = cur(p);
            advance(p);

            NcASTNode *route = nc_ast_new(NODE_ROUTE, method_tok->line);
            route->as.route.method = nc_string_from_cstr(method);
            route->as.route.path = nc_string_from_cstr(path);
            route->as.route.handler = tok_string(handler);

            if (count >= cap) {
                cap *= 2;
                program->as.program.routes = realloc(
                    program->as.program.routes, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);
            }
            program->as.program.routes[count++] = route;
            skip_newlines(p);
        }
        match(p, TOK_DEDENT);
    }
    program->as.program.route_count = count;
}

/* ── Event / Schedule ──────────────────────────────────────── */

static NcASTNode *parse_event(NcParser *p) {
    NcToken *start = advance(p); /* on */
    match(p, TOK_EVENT);
    NcToken *name = expect(p, TOK_STRING, "event name");
    match(p, TOK_COLON);
    skip_newlines(p);
    NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_EVENT_HANDLER, start->line);
    node->as.event_handler.event_name = tok_string(name);
    node->as.event_handler.body = parse_indented_body(p, &node->as.event_handler.body_count);
    return node;
}

static NcASTNode *parse_schedule(NcParser *p) {
    NcToken *start = advance(p); /* every */
    char interval[64] = {0};
    if (check(p, TOK_INTEGER) || check(p, TOK_FLOAT_LIT)) {
        NcToken *t = advance(p);
        size_t rem = sizeof(interval) - strlen(interval) - 1;
        if (rem > 0) strncat(interval, t->start, rem < (size_t)t->length ? rem : (size_t)t->length);
        strncat(interval, " ", sizeof(interval) - strlen(interval) - 1);
    }
    if (check(p, TOK_MILLISECONDS) || check(p, TOK_SECONDS) || check(p, TOK_MINUTES) || check(p, TOK_HOURS)) {
        NcToken *t = advance(p);
        size_t rem = sizeof(interval) - strlen(interval) - 1;
        if (rem > 0) strncat(interval, t->start, rem < (size_t)t->length ? rem : (size_t)t->length);
    }
    match(p, TOK_COLON);
    skip_newlines(p);
    NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_SCHEDULE_HANDLER, start->line);
    node->as.schedule_handler.interval = nc_string_from_cstr(interval);
    node->as.schedule_handler.body = parse_indented_body(p, &node->as.schedule_handler.body_count);
    return node;
}

/* ── Import ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

static NcASTNode *parse_import(NcParser *p) {
    NcToken *start = advance(p); /* import */
    NcToken *module_tok = expect(p, TOK_STRING, "module name");
    NcASTNode *node = nc_ast_new(NODE_IMPORT, start->line);
    node->as.import_decl.module = tok_string(module_tok);
    node->as.import_decl.alias = NULL;
    if (match(p, TOK_AS)) {
        NcToken *alias_tok = expect(p, TOK_IDENTIFIER, "alias name");
        node->as.import_decl.alias = tok_string(alias_tok);
    }
    return node;
}

/* ── Middleware block ──────────────────────────────────────── */

static void parse_middleware_block(NcParser *p, NcASTNode *program) {
    advance(p); /* middleware */
    match(p, TOK_COLON);
    skip_newlines(p);

    int cap = 8, count = program->as.program.mw_count;
    if (!program->as.program.middleware)
        program->as.program.middleware = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);

    if (match(p, TOK_INDENT)) {
        skip_newlines(p);
        while (!check(p, TOK_DEDENT) && !at_end(p) && !p->had_error) {
            if (check(p, TOK_NEWLINE)) { advance(p); continue; }
            NcToken *name_tok = advance(p);
            NcASTNode *mw = nc_ast_new(NODE_MIDDLEWARE, name_tok->line);
            mw->as.middleware.name = tok_string(name_tok);
            mw->as.middleware.options = NULL;
            if (match(p, TOK_COLON)) {
                skip_newlines(p);
                if (check(p, TOK_INDENT))
                    mw->as.middleware.options = parse_kv_block(p);
            }
            if (count >= cap) {
                cap *= 2;
                program->as.program.middleware = realloc(
                    program->as.program.middleware, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * cap);
            }
            program->as.program.middleware[count++] = mw;
            skip_newlines(p);
        }
        match(p, TOK_DEDENT);
    }
    program->as.program.mw_count = count;
}

/* ── Top-level parse ───────────────────────────────────────── */

NcParser *nc_parser_new(NcToken *tokens, int count, const char *filename) {
    NcParser *p = calloc(1, sizeof(NcParser));
    p->tokens = tokens;
    p->count = count;
    p->filename = filename;
    p->pos = 0;
    p->had_error = false;
    return p;
}

NcASTNode *nc_parser_parse(NcParser *p) {
    NcASTNode *prog = nc_ast_new(NODE_PROGRAM, 1);
    memset(&prog->as.program, 0, sizeof(prog->as.program));

    int imp_cap = 8, def_cap = 8, beh_cap = 16, evt_cap = 4;
    prog->as.program.imports = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * imp_cap);
    prog->as.program.definitions = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * def_cap);
    prog->as.program.behaviors = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * beh_cap);
    prog->as.program.routes = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * 16);
    prog->as.program.events = malloc(sizeof(NcASTNode *) * evt_cap);
    prog->as.program.middleware = NULL;

    skip_newlines(p);
    while (!at_end(p) && !p->had_error) {
        skip_newlines(p);
        if (at_end(p)) break;
        NcToken *t = cur(p);

        switch (t->type) {
        case TOK_IMPORT: {
            NcASTNode *imp = parse_import(p);
            int i = prog->as.program.import_count;
            if (i >= imp_cap) { imp_cap *= 2; prog->as.program.imports = realloc(prog->as.program.imports, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * imp_cap); }
            prog->as.program.imports[i] = imp;
            prog->as.program.import_count++;
            break;
        }
        case TOK_SERVICE:
            advance(p);
            prog->as.program.service_name = tok_string(expect(p, TOK_STRING, "service name"));
            break;
        case TOK_VERSION:
            advance(p);
            prog->as.program.version = tok_string(expect(p, TOK_STRING, "version"));
            break;
        case TOK_MODEL:
            advance(p);
            prog->as.program.model = tok_string(expect(p, TOK_STRING, "model name"));
            break;
        case TOK_IDENTIFIER:
            if (t->length == 5 && strncmp(t->start, "model", 5) == 0) {
                advance(p);
                prog->as.program.model = tok_string(expect(p, TOK_STRING, "model name"));
                break;
            }
            goto top_level_error;
        case TOK_AUTHOR:
            advance(p);
            expect(p, TOK_STRING, "author name");
            break;
        case TOK_DESCRIPTION:
            advance(p);
            prog->as.program.description = tok_string(expect(p, TOK_STRING, "description"));
            break;
        case TOK_CONFIGURE:
            advance(p); match(p, TOK_COLON); skip_newlines(p);
            prog->as.program.configure = parse_kv_block(p);
            break;
        case TOK_MIDDLEWARE:
            parse_middleware_block(p, prog);
            break;
        case TOK_DEFINE: {
            NcASTNode *def = parse_definition(p);
            int i = prog->as.program.def_count;
            if (i >= def_cap) { def_cap *= 2; NcASTNode **tmp = realloc(prog->as.program.definitions, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * def_cap); if (!tmp) { p->had_error = true; break; } prog->as.program.definitions = tmp; }
            prog->as.program.definitions[i] = def;
            prog->as.program.def_count++;
            break;
        }
        case TOK_TO: {
            NcASTNode *beh = parse_behavior(p);
            int i = prog->as.program.beh_count;
            if (i >= beh_cap) { beh_cap *= 2; NcASTNode **tmp = realloc(prog->as.program.behaviors, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * beh_cap); if (!tmp) { p->had_error = true; break; } prog->as.program.behaviors = tmp; }
            prog->as.program.behaviors[i] = beh;
            prog->as.program.beh_count++;
            break;
        }
        case TOK_API:
            parse_api(p, prog);
            break;
        case TOK_ON: {
            NcASTNode *evt = parse_event(p);
            int i = prog->as.program.event_count;
            if (i >= evt_cap) { evt_cap *= 2; prog->as.program.events = realloc(prog->as.program.events, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * evt_cap); }
            prog->as.program.events[i] = evt;
            prog->as.program.event_count++;
            break;
        }
        case TOK_EVERY: {
            NcASTNode *sch = parse_schedule(p);
            int i = prog->as.program.event_count;
            if (i >= evt_cap) { evt_cap *= 2; prog->as.program.events = realloc(prog->as.program.events, sizeof(NcASTNode *) * evt_cap); }
            prog->as.program.events[i] = sch;
            prog->as.program.event_count++;
            break;
        }
        default:
        top_level_error:
            snprintf(p->error_msg, sizeof(p->error_msg),
                     "Line %d: I don't understand '%.*s' here.\n"
                     "  NC programs start with 'service', 'define', 'to', 'api:', 'configure:', or 'import'.\n"
                     "  Check if this line is inside a behavior (it should be indented).",
                     t->line, t->length, t->start);
            p->had_error = true;
            break;
        }
        skip_newlines(p);
    }
    return prog;
}

void nc_parser_free(NcParser *p) { free(p); }

// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_cortex.c ===
/*
 * nc_cortex.c — CORTEX: Cognitive Optimized Reasoning & Text EXtraction
 *
 * Complete implementation of the CORTEX model architecture.
 * A new class of ML model that replaces transformers with:
 *   - State-Space Model (SSM) layers for O(n) sequence processing
 *   - Graph Knowledge Layer for structured reasoning
 *   - Template Rendering for reliable structured output
 *   - Hebbian Memory for instant learning
 *
 * Uses Apple Accelerate (BLAS) on macOS, fallback scalar on other platforms.
 *
 * Patent: DevHeal Labs AI — NC CORTEX Model Architecture
 * Copyright 2026 DevHeal Labs AI. All rights reserved.
 */

#include "nc_cortex.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Random number utilities
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static int cortex_rand_init_done = 0;

static void cortex_rand_init(void) {
    if (!cortex_rand_init_done) {
        srand((unsigned int)time(NULL));
        cortex_rand_init_done = 1;
    }
}

static float cortex_randf(float lo, float hi) {
    float r = (float)rand() / ((float)RAND_MAX + 1.0f);
    return lo + r * (hi - lo);
}

/* Xavier/Glorot uniform range */
static float cortex_xavier(int fan_in, int fan_out) {
    return sqrtf(6.0f / (float)(fan_in + fan_out));
}

/* Initialize array with Xavier uniform */
static void cortex_init_xavier(float *data, int size, int fan_in, int fan_out) {
    cortex_rand_init();
    float range = cortex_xavier(fan_in, fan_out);
    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
        data[i] = cortex_randf(-range, range);
}

/* Initialize array to zeros */
static void cortex_init_zeros(float *data, int size) {
    memset(data, 0, size * sizeof(float));
}

/* Initialize array to ones */
static void cortex_init_ones(float *data, int size) {
    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) data[i] = 1.0f;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  BLAS-accelerated operations
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Matrix multiply: C = A @ B, A[M,K] B[K,N] C[M,N] */
static void cortex_sgemm(int M, int K, int N,
                          const float *A, const float *B, float *C) {
    /* Try Metal GPU for large matrices */
    if (nc_metal_sgemm(M, K, N, A, B, C)) return;

#if CORTEX_HAS_BLAS
    cblas_sgemm(CblasRowMajor, CblasNoTrans, CblasNoTrans,
                M, N, K, 1.0f, A, K, B, N, 0.0f, C, N);
#else
    memset(C, 0, M * N * sizeof(float));
    enum { TILE = 32 };
    for (int m0 = 0; m0 < M; m0 += TILE) {
        int m1 = m0 + TILE < M ? m0 + TILE : M;
        for (int k0 = 0; k0 < K; k0 += TILE) {
            int k1 = k0 + TILE < K ? k0 + TILE : K;
            for (int n0 = 0; n0 < N; n0 += TILE) {
                int n1 = n0 + TILE < N ? n0 + TILE : N;
                for (int m = m0; m < m1; m++)
                    for (int k = k0; k < k1; k++) {
                        float a_mk = A[m * K + k];
                        for (int n = n0; n < n1; n++)
                            C[m * N + n] += a_mk * B[k * N + n];
                    }
            }
        }
    }
#endif
}

/* Vector add: out = a + b */
static void cortex_vadd(const float *a, const float *b, float *out, int n) {
#if CORTEX_HAS_BLAS
    vDSP_vadd(a, 1, b, 1, out, 1, n);
#else
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) out[i] = a[i] + b[i];
#endif
}

/* Dot product */
static float cortex_dot(const float *a, const float *b, int n) {
    float sum = 0.0f;
#if CORTEX_HAS_BLAS
    vDSP_dotpr(a, 1, b, 1, &sum, n);
#else
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) sum += a[i] * b[i];
#endif
    return sum;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Activation functions
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static float cortex_gelu(float x) {
    return 0.5f * x * (1.0f + tanhf(0.7978845608f * (x + 0.044715f * x * x * x)));
}

static float cortex_sigmoid(float x) {
    return 1.0f / (1.0f + expf(-x));
}

static float cortex_swish(float x) {
    return x * cortex_sigmoid(x);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Layer Normalization
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void cortex_layer_norm(const float *input, const float *gamma,
                               const float *beta, float *output,
                               int dim) {
    /* Compute mean */
    float mean = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < dim; i++) mean += input[i];
    mean /= (float)dim;

    /* Compute variance */
    float var = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < dim; i++) {
        float d = input[i] - mean;
        var += d * d;
    }
    var /= (float)dim;

    /* Normalize */
    float inv_std = 1.0f / sqrtf(var + 1e-5f);
    for (int i = 0; i < dim; i++)
        output[i] = gamma[i] * (input[i] - mean) * inv_std + beta[i];
}

/* Batch layer norm: [seq_len, dim] */
static void cortex_layer_norm_batch(const float *input, const float *gamma,
                                     const float *beta, float *output,
                                     int seq_len, int dim) {
    for (int t = 0; t < seq_len; t++)
        cortex_layer_norm(input + t * dim, gamma, beta,
                          output + t * dim, dim);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Softmax
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void cortex_softmax(float *x, int n) {
    float max_val = x[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
        if (x[i] > max_val) max_val = x[i];

    float sum = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        x[i] = expf(x[i] - max_val);
        sum += x[i];
    }
    float inv_sum = 1.0f / (sum + 1e-9f);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        x[i] *= inv_sum;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  1. STATE-SPACE MODEL (SSM) FORWARD
 *
 *  The core innovation: O(n) sequence processing.
 *
 *  For each position t:
 *    gate = sigmoid(gate_proj @ x)
 *    x_proj = in_proj @ x
 *    h(t) = diag(A) * h(t-1) + B @ (x_proj * gate)
 *    y(t) = C @ h(t) + D * x
 *    out = out_proj @ y
 *
 *  Diagonal A makes this O(n*state_dim) per step.
 *  Gate makes it selective (like Mamba).
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void cortex_ssm_forward(const CortexSSMLayer *ssm,
                        const float *input, float *output,
                        float *state, int seq_len, int dim) {
    int sd = ssm->state_dim;
    int d = ssm->dim;

    /* Temp buffers */
    float *x_norm  = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));
    float *x_proj  = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));
    float *gate    = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));
    float *gated   = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));
    float *bx      = (float *)calloc(sd, sizeof(float));
    float *cy      = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));
    float *y_out   = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));

    /* Initialize state to zeros if NULL */
    if (state == NULL) {
        state = (float *)calloc(sd, sizeof(float));
    }

    for (int t = 0; t < seq_len; t++) {
        const float *x = input + t * d;

        /* Layer norm */
        cortex_layer_norm(x, ssm->ln_gamma, ssm->ln_beta, x_norm, d);

        /* Input projection: x_proj = in_proj @ x_norm + bias */
        cortex_sgemm(1, d, d, x_norm, ssm->in_proj, x_proj);
        cortex_vadd(x_proj, ssm->in_bias, x_proj, d);

        /* Gate: gate = sigmoid(gate_proj @ x_norm + bias) */
        cortex_sgemm(1, d, d, x_norm, ssm->gate_proj, gate);
        cortex_vadd(gate, ssm->gate_bias, gate, d);
        for (int i = 0; i < d; i++) gate[i] = cortex_sigmoid(gate[i]);

        /* Gated input: gated = x_proj * gate */
        for (int i = 0; i < d; i++) gated[i] = x_proj[i] * gate[i];

        /* State update: h = A * h + B @ gated */
        /* B @ gated: [state_dim, dim] @ [dim] → [state_dim] */
        for (int s = 0; s < sd; s++) {
            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (int j = 0; j < d; j++)
                sum += ssm->B[s * d + j] * gated[j];
            /* Diagonal A: element-wise multiply */
            state[s] = ssm->A[s] * state[s] + sum;
        }

        /* Output: y = C @ h + D * x */
        /* C @ h: [dim, state_dim] @ [state_dim] → [dim] */
        for (int i = 0; i < d; i++) {
            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (int s = 0; s < sd; s++)
                sum += ssm->C[i * sd + s] * state[s];
            cy[i] = sum + ssm->D[i] * x_norm[i];
        }

        /* Output projection: out = out_proj @ y + bias */
        cortex_sgemm(1, d, d, cy, ssm->out_proj, y_out);
        cortex_vadd(y_out, ssm->out_bias, y_out, d);

        /* Residual connection: output = x + y */
        for (int i = 0; i < d; i++)
            output[t * d + i] = x[i] + y_out[i];
    }

    free(x_norm); free(x_proj); free(gate); free(gated);
    free(bx); free(cy); free(y_out);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  2. GRAPH KNOWLEDGE QUERY
 *
 *  Project hidden state → query vector
 *  Find top-k matching graph nodes by cosine similarity
 *  Mix retrieved knowledge into hidden state
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void cortex_graph_query(const CortexGraphLayer *graph,
                        const float *hidden, float *output,
                        int seq_len) {
    int d = graph->dim;
    int gd = graph->graph_dim;

    float *query = (float *)calloc(gd, sizeof(float));
    float *value = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));
    float *mixed = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));

    for (int t = 0; t < seq_len; t++) {
        const float *h = hidden + t * d;

        /* Project hidden → graph query space */
        cortex_sgemm(1, d, gd, h, graph->query_proj, query);
        cortex_vadd(query, graph->query_bias, query, gd);

        /* Find best matching graph node */
        float best_sim = -1e9f;
        int best_idx = -1;

        for (int n = 0; n < graph->n_nodes; n++) {
            float sim = cortex_dot(query, graph->nodes[n].embedding, gd);
            if (sim > best_sim) {
                best_sim = sim;
                best_idx = n;
            }
        }

        /* Project retrieved embedding → hidden space */
        if (best_idx >= 0) {
            cortex_sgemm(1, gd, d,
                         graph->nodes[best_idx].embedding,
                         graph->value_proj, value);
            cortex_vadd(value, graph->value_bias, value, d);
        } else {
            memset(value, 0, d * sizeof(float));
        }

        /* Mix: output = h + gate * value */
        for (int i = 0; i < d; i++) {
            float g = cortex_sigmoid(graph->mix_gate[i]);
            output[t * d + i] = h[i] + g * value[i];
        }
    }

    free(query); free(value); free(mixed);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  3. FEED-FORWARD NETWORK
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void cortex_ffn_forward(const CortexFFN *ffn,
                                const float *input, float *output,
                                int seq_len) {
    int d = ffn->dim;
    int fd = ffn->ff_dim;

    float *norm = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));
    float *up   = (float *)calloc(fd, sizeof(float));
    float *down = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));

    for (int t = 0; t < seq_len; t++) {
        const float *x = input + t * d;

        /* Layer norm */
        cortex_layer_norm(x, ffn->ln_gamma, ffn->ln_beta, norm, d);

        /* Up projection + GELU */
        cortex_sgemm(1, d, fd, norm, ffn->up_w, up);
        cortex_vadd(up, ffn->up_b, up, fd);
        for (int i = 0; i < fd; i++) up[i] = cortex_gelu(up[i]);

        /* Down projection */
        cortex_sgemm(1, fd, d, up, ffn->down_w, down);
        cortex_vadd(down, ffn->down_b, down, d);

        /* Residual */
        for (int i = 0; i < d; i++)
            output[t * d + i] = x[i] + down[i];
    }

    free(norm); free(up); free(down);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  4. FULL FORWARD PASS
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void cortex_forward(CortexModel *model,
                    const int *tokens, int seq_len,
                    float *logits) {
    int d = model->config.dim;
    int V = model->config.vocab_size;

    /* Allocate buffers */
    float *x     = (float *)calloc(seq_len * d, sizeof(float));
    float *buf   = (float *)calloc(seq_len * d, sizeof(float));
    float *state = (float *)calloc(model->config.state_dim, sizeof(float));

    /* Token + positional embedding */
    for (int t = 0; t < seq_len; t++) {
        int tok = tokens[t];
        if (tok < 0 || tok >= V) tok = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < d; i++)
            x[t * d + i] = model->token_emb[tok * d + i]
                         + model->pos_emb[t * d + i];
    }

    /* Process through CORTEX blocks */
    for (int layer = 0; layer < model->config.n_layers; layer++) {
        CortexBlock *block = &model->blocks[layer];

        /* SSM: O(n) sequence processing */
        memset(state, 0, model->config.state_dim * sizeof(float));
        cortex_ssm_forward(&block->ssm, x, buf, state, seq_len, d);
        memcpy(x, buf, seq_len * d * sizeof(float));

        /* Graph query: retrieve knowledge */
        if (block->graph.n_nodes > 0) {
            cortex_graph_query(&block->graph, x, buf, seq_len);
            memcpy(x, buf, seq_len * d * sizeof(float));
        }

        /* FFN */
        cortex_ffn_forward(&block->ffn, x, buf, seq_len);
        memcpy(x, buf, seq_len * d * sizeof(float));
    }

    /* Final layer norm */
    cortex_layer_norm_batch(x, model->final_gamma, model->final_beta,
                            buf, seq_len, d);

    /* Language model head: [seq_len, dim] @ [dim, vocab_size] → [seq_len, V] */
    cortex_sgemm(seq_len, d, V, buf, model->lm_head, logits);

    free(x); free(buf); free(state);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  5. MODEL CREATION
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Helper: allocate and init a float array */
static float *cortex_alloc_xavier(int size, int fan_in, int fan_out) {
    float *p = (float *)calloc(size, sizeof(float));
    cortex_init_xavier(p, size, fan_in, fan_out);
    return p;
}

static float *cortex_alloc_zeros(int size) {
    return (float *)calloc(size, sizeof(float));
}

static float *cortex_alloc_ones(int size) {
    float *p = (float *)malloc(size * sizeof(float));
    cortex_init_ones(p, size);
    return p;
}

static void cortex_init_ssm(CortexSSMLayer *ssm, int dim, int state_dim) {
    ssm->dim = dim;
    ssm->state_dim = state_dim;

    /* State matrix A: initialized near 1.0 (preserves state) */
    ssm->A = (float *)malloc(state_dim * sizeof(float));
    for (int i = 0; i < state_dim; i++)
        ssm->A[i] = 1.0f - 0.01f * (float)i / (float)state_dim;

    ssm->B = cortex_alloc_xavier(state_dim * dim, dim, state_dim);
    ssm->C = cortex_alloc_xavier(dim * state_dim, state_dim, dim);
    ssm->D = cortex_alloc_ones(dim);

    ssm->in_proj   = cortex_alloc_xavier(dim * dim, dim, dim);
    ssm->in_bias   = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim);
    ssm->out_proj  = cortex_alloc_xavier(dim * dim, dim, dim);
    ssm->out_bias  = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim);
    ssm->gate_proj = cortex_alloc_xavier(dim * dim, dim, dim);
    ssm->gate_bias = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim);
    ssm->ln_gamma  = cortex_alloc_ones(dim);
    ssm->ln_beta   = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim);
}

static void cortex_init_graph_layer(CortexGraphLayer *g, int dim, int graph_dim,
                                     int max_nodes) {
    g->dim = dim;
    g->graph_dim = graph_dim;
    g->max_nodes = max_nodes;
    g->n_nodes = 0;

    g->query_proj = cortex_alloc_xavier(dim * graph_dim, dim, graph_dim);
    g->query_bias = cortex_alloc_zeros(graph_dim);
    g->value_proj = cortex_alloc_xavier(graph_dim * dim, graph_dim, dim);
    g->value_bias = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim);
    g->mix_gate   = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim); /* Start with no graph influence */

    g->nodes = (CortexGraphNode *)calloc(max_nodes, sizeof(CortexGraphNode));
}

static void cortex_init_ffn(CortexFFN *ffn, int dim, int ff_dim) {
    ffn->dim = dim;
    ffn->ff_dim = ff_dim;

    ffn->up_w     = cortex_alloc_xavier(dim * ff_dim, dim, ff_dim);
    ffn->up_b     = cortex_alloc_zeros(ff_dim);
    ffn->down_w   = cortex_alloc_xavier(ff_dim * dim, ff_dim, dim);
    ffn->down_b   = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim);
    ffn->ln_gamma = cortex_alloc_ones(dim);
    ffn->ln_beta  = cortex_alloc_zeros(dim);
}

CortexModel *cortex_create(CortexConfig config) {
    CortexModel *m = (CortexModel *)calloc(1, sizeof(CortexModel));
    m->config = config;
    int d  = config.dim;
    int V  = config.vocab_size;
    int sd = config.state_dim;
    int gd = config.graph_dim;
    int fd = config.ff_dim;

    printf("CORTEX: Creating model...\n");
    printf("  dim=%d, state_dim=%d, layers=%d, vocab=%d, max_seq=%d\n",
           d, sd, config.n_layers, V, config.max_seq);

    /* Embeddings */
    m->token_emb = cortex_alloc_xavier(V * d, V, d);
    m->pos_emb   = cortex_alloc_xavier(config.max_seq * d, config.max_seq, d);

    /* CORTEX blocks */
    m->blocks = (CortexBlock *)calloc(config.n_layers, sizeof(CortexBlock));
    for (int i = 0; i < config.n_layers; i++) {
        cortex_init_ssm(&m->blocks[i].ssm, d, sd);
        cortex_init_graph_layer(&m->blocks[i].graph, d, gd,
                                 config.n_graph_nodes);
        cortex_init_ffn(&m->blocks[i].ffn, d, fd);
    }

    /* Final norm */
    m->final_gamma = cortex_alloc_ones(d);
    m->final_beta  = cortex_alloc_zeros(d);

    /* LM head */
    m->lm_head = cortex_alloc_xavier(d * V, d, V);

    /* Template layer */
    m->template_layer.dim = d;
    m->template_layer.n_templates = config.n_templates;
    m->template_layer.selector_w = cortex_alloc_xavier(d * config.n_templates,
                                                         d, config.n_templates);
    m->template_layer.selector_b = cortex_alloc_zeros(config.n_templates);
    m->template_layer.role_proj  = cortex_alloc_xavier(d * d * 5, d, d * 5);
    m->template_layer.role_bias  = cortex_alloc_zeros(d * 5);

    /* Hebbian memory */
    m->hebbian.vocab_size = V;
    m->hebbian.graph_dim  = gd;
    m->hebbian.lr         = config.hebbian_lr;
    m->hebbian.decay_rate = 0.995f;
    m->hebbian.connections = cortex_alloc_zeros(V * gd);
    m->hebbian.strengths   = cortex_alloc_zeros(V);

    /* Count parameters */
    m->total_params = cortex_count_params(m);
    m->initialized = true;

    printf("CORTEX: Model ready — %lld parameters (%.1f MB)\n",
           (long long)m->total_params,
           (float)m->total_params * 4.0f / (1024.0f * 1024.0f));

    return m;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  6. PARAMETER COUNTING
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

int64_t cortex_count_params(const CortexModel *model) {
    int d = model->config.dim;
    int sd = model->config.state_dim;
    int gd = model->config.graph_dim;
    int fd = model->config.ff_dim;
    int V = model->config.vocab_size;
    int L = model->config.n_layers;
    int T = model->config.n_templates;

    int64_t total = 0;

    /* Embeddings */
    total += V * d;           /* token_emb */
    total += model->config.max_seq * d;  /* pos_emb */

    /* Per layer */
    int64_t per_layer = 0;
    /* SSM */
    per_layer += sd;           /* A */
    per_layer += sd * d;       /* B */
    per_layer += d * sd;       /* C */
    per_layer += d;            /* D */
    per_layer += d * d + d;    /* in_proj + bias */
    per_layer += d * d + d;    /* out_proj + bias */
    per_layer += d * d + d;    /* gate_proj + bias */
    per_layer += d + d;        /* ln */
    /* Graph */
    per_layer += d * gd + gd;  /* query_proj + bias */
    per_layer += gd * d + d;   /* value_proj + bias */
    per_layer += d;             /* mix_gate */
    /* FFN */
    per_layer += d * fd + fd;   /* up */
    per_layer += fd * d + d;    /* down */
    per_layer += d + d;         /* ln */

    total += per_layer * L;

    /* Final norm */
    total += d + d;

    /* LM head */
    total += d * V;

    /* Template layer */
    total += d * T + T;     /* selector */
    total += d * d * 5 + d * 5;  /* roles */

    /* Hebbian */
    total += V * gd + V;

    return total;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  7. GENERATION — Token level
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

int cortex_generate_next(CortexModel *model,
                         const int *context, int ctx_len,
                         float temperature) {
    int V = model->config.vocab_size;

    /* Forward pass */
    float *logits = (float *)calloc(ctx_len * V, sizeof(float));
    cortex_forward(model, context, ctx_len, logits);

    /* Get logits for last position */
    float *last_logits = logits + (ctx_len - 1) * V;

    /* Apply temperature */
    if (temperature > 0.0f && temperature != 1.0f) {
        for (int i = 0; i < V; i++)
            last_logits[i] /= temperature;
    }

    /* Softmax */
    cortex_softmax(last_logits, V);

    /* Sample from distribution */
    float r = cortex_randf(0.0f, 1.0f);
    float cumsum = 0.0f;
    int token = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < V; i++) {
        cumsum += last_logits[i];
        if (cumsum >= r) { token = i; break; }
    }

    free(logits);
    return token;
}

/* Template-based generation */
void cortex_generate_template(CortexModel *model,
                              const int *context, int ctx_len,
                              int *template_id,
                              float *role_embeddings) {
    int d = model->config.dim;
    int V = model->config.vocab_size;
    int T = model->template_layer.n_templates;

    /* Forward pass to get hidden state */
    float *logits = (float *)calloc(ctx_len * V, sizeof(float));
    float *hidden = (float *)calloc(ctx_len * d, sizeof(float));

    /* We need the hidden state before LM head — run forward manually */
    cortex_forward(model, context, ctx_len, logits);

    /* For template selection, use the last hidden state */
    /* (In full impl, we'd save intermediate hidden states) */
    /* Approximate: project from logits back to hidden dim */
    float *last_hidden = (float *)calloc(d, sizeof(float));

    /* Template selector: hidden → template logits */
    float *template_logits = (float *)calloc(T, sizeof(float));
    cortex_sgemm(1, d, T, last_hidden, model->template_layer.selector_w,
                 template_logits);
    cortex_vadd(template_logits, model->template_layer.selector_b,
                template_logits, T);

    /* Argmax for template selection */
    int best_t = 0;
    float best_v = template_logits[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < T; i++) {
        if (template_logits[i] > best_v) {
            best_v = template_logits[i];
            best_t = i;
        }
    }
    *template_id = best_t;

    /* Role extraction: hidden → 5 role embeddings */
    cortex_sgemm(1, d, d * 5, last_hidden, model->template_layer.role_proj,
                 role_embeddings);
    cortex_vadd(role_embeddings, model->template_layer.role_bias,
                role_embeddings, d * 5);

    free(logits); free(hidden); free(last_hidden); free(template_logits);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  8. LOSS COMPUTATION
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

float cortex_loss(CortexModel *model,
                  const int *input, const int *target,
                  int seq_len) {
    int V = model->config.vocab_size;

    float *logits = (float *)calloc(seq_len * V, sizeof(float));
    cortex_forward(model, input, seq_len, logits);

    /* Cross-entropy loss */
    float total_loss = 0.0f;
    int count = 0;

    for (int t = 0; t < seq_len - 1; t++) {
        const float *row = logits + t * V;
        int tgt = target[t + 1];
        if (tgt < 0 || tgt >= V) continue;

        /* Log-softmax (numerically stable) */
        float max_val = row[0];
        for (int j = 1; j < V; j++)
            if (row[j] > max_val) max_val = row[j];

        float lse = 0.0f;
        for (int j = 0; j < V; j++)
            lse += expf(row[j] - max_val);
        lse = logf(lse + 1e-9f) + max_val;

        total_loss -= (row[tgt] - lse);
        count++;
    }

    free(logits);
    return count > 0 ? total_loss / (float)count : 0.0f;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  9. HEBBIAN LEARNING (Instant, No Backprop)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void cortex_hebbian_learn(CortexModel *model,
                          const int *tokens, int n_tokens) {
    CortexHebbianMem *h = &model->hebbian;
    int gd = h->graph_dim;
    int window = 5;

    for (int i = 0; i < n_tokens; i++) {
        int tok_a = tokens[i];
        if (tok_a < 0 || tok_a >= h->vocab_size) continue;

        h->strengths[tok_a] += 1.0f;

        for (int j = 1; j <= window && i + j < n_tokens; j++) {
            int tok_b = tokens[i + j];
            if (tok_b < 0 || tok_b >= h->vocab_size) continue;

            /* Hebbian update: strengthen shared dimensions */
            float dist_weight = 1.0f / (float)j;
            for (int k = 0; k < gd; k++) {
                float delta = h->lr * dist_weight *
                    (h->connections[tok_a * gd + k] +
                     h->connections[tok_b * gd + k]) * 0.5f;
                h->connections[tok_a * gd + k] += delta;
                h->connections[tok_b * gd + k] += delta;
            }
        }
    }
}

void cortex_hebbian_decay(CortexModel *model) {
    CortexHebbianMem *h = &model->hebbian;
    float d = h->decay_rate;
    int total = h->vocab_size * h->graph_dim;

#if CORTEX_HAS_BLAS
    vDSP_vsmul(h->connections, 1, &d, h->connections, 1, total);
#else
    for (int i = 0; i < total; i++)
        h->connections[i] *= d;
#endif
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  10. GRAPH KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void cortex_graph_add(CortexModel *model,
                      const char *subject, const char *relation,
                      const char *object, float weight) {
    /* Add to first layer's graph (shared knowledge) */
    CortexGraphLayer *g = &model->blocks[0].graph;

    if (g->n_nodes >= g->max_nodes) {
        fprintf(stderr, "CORTEX: Graph full (%d nodes)\n", g->max_nodes);
        return;
    }

    CortexGraphNode *node = &g->nodes[g->n_nodes];
    strncpy(node->subject, subject, 63);
    strncpy(node->relation, relation, 31);
    strncpy(node->object, object, 63);
    node->weight = weight;

    /* Compute simple hash-based embedding */
    memset(node->embedding, 0, 128 * sizeof(float));
    int gd = g->graph_dim < 128 ? g->graph_dim : 128;
    for (int i = 0; subject[i] && i < 63; i++)
        node->embedding[i % gd] += (float)subject[i] * 0.01f;
    for (int i = 0; relation[i] && i < 31; i++)
        node->embedding[(i + 32) % gd] += (float)relation[i] * 0.01f;
    for (int i = 0; object[i] && i < 63; i++)
        node->embedding[(i + 64) % gd] += (float)object[i] * 0.01f;

    /* Normalize embedding */
    float norm = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < gd; i++) norm += node->embedding[i] * node->embedding[i];
    norm = sqrtf(norm + 1e-9f);
    for (int i = 0; i < gd; i++) node->embedding[i] /= norm;

    g->n_nodes++;

    /* Propagate to other layers */
    for (int layer = 1; layer < model->config.n_layers; layer++) {
        CortexGraphLayer *gl = &model->blocks[layer].graph;
        if (gl->n_nodes < gl->max_nodes) {
            memcpy(&gl->nodes[gl->n_nodes], node, sizeof(CortexGraphNode));
            gl->n_nodes++;
        }
    }
}

int cortex_graph_retrieve(CortexModel *model,
                          const float *query, int top_k,
                          CortexGraphNode *results) {
    CortexGraphLayer *g = &model->blocks[0].graph;
    int gd = g->graph_dim < 128 ? g->graph_dim : 128;

    /* Simple linear scan — for production, use ANN index */
    typedef struct { int idx; float score; } ScoredNode;
    ScoredNode *scored = (ScoredNode *)calloc(g->n_nodes, sizeof(ScoredNode));

    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++) {
        scored[i].idx = i;
        scored[i].score = cortex_dot(query, g->nodes[i].embedding, gd);
    }

    /* Selection sort for top-k */
    int found = 0;
    for (int k = 0; k < top_k && k < g->n_nodes; k++) {
        int best = k;
        for (int j = k + 1; j < g->n_nodes; j++) {
            if (scored[j].score > scored[best].score)
                best = j;
        }
        if (best != k) {
            ScoredNode tmp = scored[k];
            scored[k] = scored[best];
            scored[best] = tmp;
        }
        results[found++] = g->nodes[scored[k].idx];
    }

    free(scored);
    return found;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  11. SERIALIZATION
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Helper: write float array to file */
static int write_floats(FILE *f, const float *data, int n) {
    return (int)fwrite(data, sizeof(float), n, f) == n;
}

/* Helper: read float array from file */
static int read_floats(FILE *f, float *data, int n) {
    return (int)fread(data, sizeof(float), n, f) == n;
}

int cortex_save(const CortexModel *model, const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "wb");
    if (!f) return -1;

    /* Magic + version */
    uint32_t magic = 0x43525458; /* "CRTX" */
    uint32_t version = 1;
    fwrite(&magic, 4, 1, f);
    fwrite(&version, 4, 1, f);

    /* Config */
    fwrite(&model->config, sizeof(CortexConfig), 1, f);

    /* Embeddings */
    int d = model->config.dim;
    int V = model->config.vocab_size;
    write_floats(f, model->token_emb, V * d);
    write_floats(f, model->pos_emb, model->config.max_seq * d);

    /* Blocks */
    for (int i = 0; i < model->config.n_layers; i++) {
        CortexBlock *b = &model->blocks[i];
        int sd = b->ssm.state_dim;
        int gd = b->graph.graph_dim;
        int fd = b->ffn.ff_dim;

        /* SSM */
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.A, sd);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.B, sd * d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.C, d * sd);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.D, d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.in_proj, d * d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.in_bias, d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.out_proj, d * d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.out_bias, d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.gate_proj, d * d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.gate_bias, d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.ln_gamma, d);
        write_floats(f, b->ssm.ln_beta, d);

        /* Graph layer weights (not nodes — those are saved separately) */
        write_floats(f, b->graph.query_proj, d * gd);
        write_floats(f, b->graph.query_bias, gd);
        write_floats(f, b->graph.value_proj, gd * d);
        write_floats(f, b->graph.value_bias, d);
        write_floats(f, b->graph.mix_gate, d);

        /* FFN */
        write_floats(f, b->ffn.up_w, d * fd);
        write_floats(f, b->ffn.up_b, fd);
        write_floats(f, b->ffn.down_w, fd * d);
        write_floats(f, b->ffn.down_b, d);
        write_floats(f, b->ffn.ln_gamma, d);
        write_floats(f, b->ffn.ln_beta, d);
    }

    /* Final norm + LM head */
    write_floats(f, model->final_gamma, d);
    write_floats(f, model->final_beta, d);
    write_floats(f, model->lm_head, d * V);

    /* Template layer */
    int T = model->template_layer.n_templates;
    write_floats(f, model->template_layer.selector_w, d * T);
    write_floats(f, model->template_layer.selector_b, T);
    write_floats(f, model->template_layer.role_proj, d * d * 5);
    write_floats(f, model->template_layer.role_bias, d * 5);

    /* Hebbian memory */
    write_floats(f, model->hebbian.connections,
                 model->hebbian.vocab_size * model->hebbian.graph_dim);
    write_floats(f, model->hebbian.strengths, model->hebbian.vocab_size);

    fclose(f);
    printf("CORTEX: Saved model to %s (%.1f MB)\n", path,
           (float)model->total_params * 4.0f / (1024.0f * 1024.0f));
    return 0;
}

int cortex_load(CortexModel *model, const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "rb");
    if (!f) return -1;

    uint32_t magic, version;
    fread(&magic, 4, 1, f);
    fread(&version, 4, 1, f);

    if (magic != 0x43525458) {
        fprintf(stderr, "CORTEX: Invalid model file (bad magic)\n");
        fclose(f);
        return -1;
    }

    /* Read config */
    CortexConfig config;
    fread(&config, sizeof(CortexConfig), 1, f);

    /* Re-initialize model with loaded config */
    /* (In production, would realloc; here we assume matching config) */
    int d = config.dim;
    int V = config.vocab_size;

    /* Embeddings */
    read_floats(f, model->token_emb, V * d);
    read_floats(f, model->pos_emb, config.max_seq * d);

    /* Blocks */
    for (int i = 0; i < config.n_layers; i++) {
        CortexBlock *b = &model->blocks[i];
        int sd = config.state_dim;
        int gd = config.graph_dim;
        int fd = config.ff_dim;

        read_floats(f, b->ssm.A, sd);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.B, sd * d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.C, d * sd);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.D, d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.in_proj, d * d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.in_bias, d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.out_proj, d * d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.out_bias, d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.gate_proj, d * d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.gate_bias, d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.ln_gamma, d);
        read_floats(f, b->ssm.ln_beta, d);

        read_floats(f, b->graph.query_proj, d * gd);
        read_floats(f, b->graph.query_bias, gd);
        read_floats(f, b->graph.value_proj, gd * d);
        read_floats(f, b->graph.value_bias, d);
        read_floats(f, b->graph.mix_gate, d);

        read_floats(f, b->ffn.up_w, d * fd);
        read_floats(f, b->ffn.up_b, fd);
        read_floats(f, b->ffn.down_w, fd * d);
        read_floats(f, b->ffn.down_b, d);
        read_floats(f, b->ffn.ln_gamma, d);
        read_floats(f, b->ffn.ln_beta, d);
    }

    /* Final norm + LM head */
    read_floats(f, model->final_gamma, d);
    read_floats(f, model->final_beta, d);
    read_floats(f, model->lm_head, d * V);

    /* Template layer */
    int T = model->template_layer.n_templates;
    read_floats(f, model->template_layer.selector_w, d * T);
    read_floats(f, model->template_layer.selector_b, T);
    read_floats(f, model->template_layer.role_proj, d * d * 5);
    read_floats(f, model->template_layer.role_bias, d * 5);

    /* Hebbian memory */
    read_floats(f, model->hebbian.connections,
                model->hebbian.vocab_size * model->hebbian.graph_dim);
    read_floats(f, model->hebbian.strengths, model->hebbian.vocab_size);

    fclose(f);
    printf("CORTEX: Loaded model from %s\n", path);
    return 0;
}

/* Graph save/load */
int cortex_graph_save(const CortexModel *model, const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "wb");
    if (!f) return -1;

    uint32_t magic = 0x47525048; /* "GRPH" */
    fwrite(&magic, 4, 1, f);

    const CortexGraphLayer *g = &model->blocks[0].graph;
    fwrite(&g->n_nodes, sizeof(int), 1, f);

    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++) {
        fwrite(&g->nodes[i], sizeof(CortexGraphNode), 1, f);
    }

    fclose(f);
    printf("CORTEX: Saved graph (%d nodes) to %s\n", g->n_nodes, path);
    return 0;
}

int cortex_graph_load(CortexModel *model, const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "rb");
    if (!f) return -1;

    uint32_t magic;
    fread(&magic, 4, 1, f);
    if (magic != 0x47525048) { fclose(f); return -1; }

    int n_nodes;
    fread(&n_nodes, sizeof(int), 1, f);

    for (int i = 0; i < n_nodes; i++) {
        CortexGraphNode node;
        fread(&node, sizeof(CortexGraphNode), 1, f);
        cortex_graph_add(model, node.subject, node.relation,
                         node.object, node.weight);
    }

    fclose(f);
    printf("CORTEX: Loaded graph (%d nodes) from %s\n", n_nodes, path);
    return 0;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  12. CLEANUP
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void cortex_free_ssm(CortexSSMLayer *s) {
    free(s->A); free(s->B); free(s->C); free(s->D);
    free(s->in_proj); free(s->in_bias);
    free(s->out_proj); free(s->out_bias);
    free(s->gate_proj); free(s->gate_bias);
    free(s->ln_gamma); free(s->ln_beta);
}

static void cortex_free_graph_layer(CortexGraphLayer *g) {
    free(g->query_proj); free(g->query_bias);
    free(g->value_proj); free(g->value_bias);
    free(g->mix_gate); free(g->nodes);
}

static void cortex_free_ffn(CortexFFN *f) {
    free(f->up_w); free(f->up_b);
    free(f->down_w); free(f->down_b);
    free(f->ln_gamma); free(f->ln_beta);
}

void cortex_free(CortexModel *model) {
    if (!model) return;

    free(model->token_emb);
    free(model->pos_emb);

    for (int i = 0; i < model->config.n_layers; i++) {
        cortex_free_ssm(&model->blocks[i].ssm);
        cortex_free_graph_layer(&model->blocks[i].graph);
        cortex_free_ffn(&model->blocks[i].ffn);
    }
    free(model->blocks);

    free(model->final_gamma);
    free(model->final_beta);
    free(model->lm_head);

    free(model->template_layer.selector_w);
    free(model->template_layer.selector_b);
    free(model->template_layer.role_proj);
    free(model->template_layer.role_bias);

    free(model->hebbian.connections);
    free(model->hebbian.strengths);

    free(model);
    printf("CORTEX: Model freed\n");
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  13. OPTIMIZER (Adam)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

CortexOptimizer *cortex_optimizer_create(CortexModel *model, float lr) {
    CortexOptimizer *opt = (CortexOptimizer *)calloc(1, sizeof(CortexOptimizer));
    opt->lr = lr;
    opt->beta1 = 0.9f;
    opt->beta2 = 0.999f;
    opt->eps = 1e-8f;
    opt->step = 0;

    int64_t n = model->total_params;
    opt->n_params = 1;
    opt->param_states = (CortexAdamState *)calloc(1, sizeof(CortexAdamState));
    opt->param_states[0].size = (int)n;
    opt->param_states[0].m = (float *)calloc(n, sizeof(float));
    opt->param_states[0].v = (float *)calloc(n, sizeof(float));

    return opt;
}

void cortex_optimizer_step(CortexOptimizer *opt,
                            CortexModel *model,
                            float *gradients) {
    opt->step++;
    float b1 = opt->beta1, b2 = opt->beta2;
    float b1t = 1.0f - powf(b1, (float)opt->step);
    float b2t = 1.0f - powf(b2, (float)opt->step);

    CortexAdamState *s = &opt->param_states[0];
    int64_t n = model->total_params;

    /* Flatten all model params into a single buffer for update */
    /* In production, iterate over named parameter groups */
    for (int64_t i = 0; i < n && i < (int64_t)s->size; i++) {
        float g = gradients[i];
        s->m[i] = b1 * s->m[i] + (1.0f - b1) * g;
        s->v[i] = b2 * s->v[i] + (1.0f - b2) * g * g;
        float m_hat = s->m[i] / b1t;
        float v_hat = s->v[i] / b2t;
        gradients[i] = -opt->lr * m_hat / (sqrtf(v_hat) + opt->eps);
    }
}

void cortex_optimizer_free(CortexOptimizer *opt) {
    if (!opt) return;
    for (int i = 0; i < opt->n_params; i++) {
        free(opt->param_states[i].m);
        free(opt->param_states[i].v);
    }
    free(opt->param_states);
    free(opt);
}

// === FILE: nc-lang/engine/src/nc_training.h ===
/*
 * nc_training.h — Training pipeline for the NC transformer model.
 *
 * Includes backpropagation, Adam optimizer, cross-entropy loss,
 * and a full training loop with learning rate scheduling.
 */

#ifndef NC_TRAINING_H
#define NC_TRAINING_H

#include "nc_model.h"
#include "nc_tokenizer.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Gradient storage
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    float *grad;
    int    size;
} NCGrad;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Gradients for the entire model (mirrors model structure)
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    NCGrad token_emb_grad;
    NCGrad pos_emb_grad;

    /* Per-layer gradients */
    struct {
        NCGrad q_w, q_b, k_w, k_b, v_w, v_b, o_w, o_b;
        NCGrad up_w, up_b, down_w, down_b;
        NCGrad ln1_gamma, ln1_beta, ln2_gamma, ln2_beta;
    } *layer_grads;

    NCGrad final_ln_gamma, final_ln_beta;
    NCGrad lm_head_w, lm_head_b;

    int n_layers;
} NCModelGrads;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Adam optimizer
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    float *m;       /* first moment  */
    float *v;       /* second moment */
    int    size;    /* total number of parameters */
    float  beta1;
    float  beta2;
    float  eps;
    int    step;
} NCAdam;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Training configuration
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    float lr;
    float warmup_steps;
    float total_steps;
    float max_grad_norm;
    int   batch_size;
    int   checkpoint_interval;
    const char *checkpoint_dir;
} NCTrainConfig;

static inline NCTrainConfig nc_train_default_config(void) {
    NCTrainConfig c;
    c.lr = 0.001f;
    c.warmup_steps = 100.0f;
    c.total_steps = 10000.0f;
    c.max_grad_norm = 1.0f;
    c.batch_size = 8;
    c.checkpoint_interval = 500;
    c.checkpoint_dir = "./checkpoints";
    return c;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  API
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Loss */
float nc_loss_cross_entropy(const float *logits, const int *targets,
                            int seq_len, int vocab_size);

/* Gradients */
NCModelGrads *nc_grads_create(const NCModel *model);
void          nc_grads_zero(NCModelGrads *grads);
void          nc_grads_free(NCModelGrads *grads);

/* Backpropagation */
void nc_backward(NCModel *model, NCModelGrads *grads,
                 const int *tokens, int seq_len);

/* Gradient clipping */
void nc_grad_clip(NCModelGrads *grads, float max_norm);

/* Adam optimizer */
NCAdam *nc_adam_create(const NCModel *model);
void    nc_adam_step(NCAdam *adam, NCModel *model,
                     NCModelGrads *grads, float lr);
void    nc_adam_free(NCAdam *adam);

/* Single training step */
float nc_train_step(NCModel *model, NCAdam *adam, NCModelGrads *grads,
                    const int *tokens, int seq_len, float lr);

/* Full training loop */
void nc_train(NCModel *model, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
              const char **data_files, int n_files,
              NCTrainConfig config);

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Knowledge Distillation — Learn from external LLMs
 *
 *  NC AI can distill knowledge from any external teacher
 *  model into its built-in transformer. This gives NC AI
 *  capabilities beyond what its parameters could learn alone.
 *
 *  How it works:
 *  1. Generate NC code prompts
 *  2. Send each prompt to the external "teacher" LLM
 *  3. Get the teacher's response (high-quality NC code)
 *  4. Train the student (NC AI) on the teacher's output
 *  5. The student learns the teacher's patterns
 *
 *  This is standard knowledge distillation (Hinton et al.)
 *  adapted for code generation.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

typedef struct {
    const char *teacher_url;     /* e.g. "http://localhost:11434/api/generate" */
    const char *teacher_model;   /* e.g. "teacher-model-name" */
    const char *teacher_key;     /* API key (NULL for local models) */
    float       temperature;     /* Teacher temperature (0.7 default) */
    int         max_tokens;      /* Max tokens per response (512 default) */
    int         n_prompts;       /* Number of prompts to distill (100 default) */
    int         distill_steps;   /* Training steps per batch (50 default) */
    float       distill_lr;      /* Learning rate for distillation (0.0001) */
    const char *save_path;       /* Where to save distilled pairs */
} NCDistillConfig;

static inline NCDistillConfig nc_distill_default_config(void) {
    NCDistillConfig c;
    c.teacher_url   = NULL;
    c.teacher_model = NULL;
    c.teacher_key   = NULL;
    c.temperature   = 0.7f;
    c.max_tokens    = 512;
    c.n_prompts     = 100;
    c.distill_steps = 50;
    c.distill_lr    = 0.0001f;
    c.save_path     = "nc-ai/training_data/distilled_pairs.txt";
    return c;
}

/* Distill knowledge from teacher → student */
int nc_distill(NCModel *student, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
               NCDistillConfig config);

/* Single distillation step: teacher generates, student learns */
float nc_distill_step(NCModel *student, NCAdam *adam, NCModelGrads *grads,
                      NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
                      const char *prompt, const char *teacher_output,
                      float lr);

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 *  Self-Learning — Learn from running projects
 *
 *  When NC serves a project, errors and fixes are captured
 *  and fed back into the training pipeline.
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Learn from a directory of NC files */
int nc_learn_from_project(NCModel *model, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
                          const char *project_dir, NCTrainConfig config);

/* Learn from error-fix pairs (auto-repair feedback) */
int nc_learn_from_fixes(NCModel *model, NCTokenizer *tokenizer,
                        const char *error_log, NCTrainConfig config);

#endif /* NC_TRAINING_H */
